search_text: Interaction Replica: Tracking Human-Object Interaction and Scene Changes From Human Motion 交互复制品：跟踪人与物体的交互和人体运动的场景变化 Our world is not static and humans naturally cause changes in their environments through interactions, e.g., opening doors or moving furniture. Modeling changes caused by humans is essential for building digital twins, e.g., in the context of shared physical-virtual spaces (metaverses) and robotics. In order for widespread adoption of such emerging applications, the sensor setup used to capture the interactions needs to be inexpensive and easy-to-use for non-expert users. I.e., interactions should be captured and modeled by simple ego-centric sensors such as a combination of cameras and IMU sensors, not relying on any external cameras or object trackers. Yet, to the best of our knowledge, no work tackling the challenging problem of modeling human-scene interactions via such an ego-centric sensor setup exists. This paper closes this gap in the literature by developing a novel approach that combines visual localization of humans in the scene with contact-based reasoning about human-scene interactions from IMU data. Interestingly, we can show that even without visual observations of the interactions, human-scene contacts and interactions can be realistically predicted from human pose sequences. Our method, iReplica (Interaction Replica), is an essential first step towards the egocentric capture of human interactions and modeling of dynamic scenes, which is required for future AR/VR applications in immersive virtual universes and for training machines to behave like humans. Our code, data and model are available on our project page at http://virtualhumans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/ireplica/ 我们的世界不是静态的，人类自然地通过相互作用引起环境的变化，例如打开门或移动家具。对人类引起的变化进行建模对于构建数字孪生至关重要，例如在共享物理虚拟空间（元空间）和机器人技术的背景下。为了广泛采用此类新兴应用，用于捕获交互的传感器设置必须便宜且易于非专家用户使用。也就是说，交互应该通过简单的以自我为中心的传感器（例如相机和 IMU 传感器的组合）来捕获和建模，而不依赖于任何外部相机或对象跟踪器。然而，据我们所知，目前还没有任何工作可以解决通过这种以自我为中心的传感器设置来建模人类场景交互这一具有挑战性的问题。本文通过开发一种新颖的方法来弥补文献中的这一空白，该方法将场景中人类的视觉定位与基于 IMU 数据的人与场景交互的基于接触的推理相结合。有趣的是，我们可以证明，即使没有对交互的视觉观察，也可以从人类姿势序列中真实地预测人类场景的接触和交互。我们的方法 iReplica（交互复制）是朝着以自我为中心捕获人类交互和动态场景建模迈出的重要的第一步，这是未来沉浸式虚拟宇宙中的 AR/VR 应用以及训练机器像人类一样行为所必需的。我们的代码、数据和模型可在我们的项目页面上找到：http://virtual humans.mpi-inf.mpg.de/ireplica/ 本文提出iReplica方法，通过第一人称视角的传感器（如摄像头和IMU）追踪人类与物体的互动及场景变化，无需外部设备或视觉观察。 Vladimir Guzov,Julian Chibane,Riccardo Marin,Yannan He,Yunus Saracoglu,Torsten Sattler,Gerard Pons-Moll cs.CV

authors_text: Peng-Shuai Wang,Yang Liu,Xin Tong
title: Dual Octree Graph Networks for Learning Adaptive Volumetric Shape Representations
title_zh: 用于学习自适应体积形状表示的双八叉树图网络
abstract: We present an adaptive deep representation of volumetric fields of 3D shapes and an efficient approach to learn this deep representation for high-quality 3D shape reconstruction and auto-encoding. Our method encodes the volumetric field of a 3D shape with an adaptive feature volume organized by an octree and applies a compact multilayer perceptron network for mapping the features to the field value at each 3D position. An encoder-decoder network is designed to learn the adaptive feature volume based on the graph convolutions over the dual graph of octree nodes. The core of our network is a new graph convolution operator defined over a regular grid of features fused from irregular neighboring octree nodes at different levels, which not only reduces the computational and memory cost of the convolutions over irregular neighboring octree nodes, but also improves the performance of feature learning. Our method effectively encodes shape details, enables fast 3D shape reconstruction, and exhibits good generality for modeling 3D shapes out of training categories. We evaluate our method on a set of reconstruction tasks of 3D shapes and scenes and validate its superiority over other existing approaches. Our code, data, and trained models are available at https://wang-ps.github.io/dualocnn.
summary: We present an adaptive deep representation of volumetric fields of 3D shapes and an efficient approach to learn this deep representation for high-quality 3D shape reconstruction and auto-encoding. Our method encodes the volumetric field of a 3D shape with an adaptive feature volume organized by an octree and applies a compact multilayer perceptron network for mapping the features to the field value at each 3D position. An encoder-decoder network is designed to learn the adaptive feature volume based on the graph convolutions over the dual graph of octree nodes. The core of our network is a new graph convolution operator defined over a regular grid of features fused from irregular neighboring octree nodes at different levels, which not only reduces the computational and memory cost of the convolutions over irregular neighboring octree nodes, but also improves the performance of feature learning. Our method effectively encodes shape details, enables fast 3D shape reconstruction, and exhibits good generality for modeling 3D shapes out of training categories. We evaluate our method on a set of reconstruction tasks of 3D shapes and scenes and validate its superiority over other existing approaches. Our code, data, and trained models are available at https://wang-ps.github.io/dualocnn.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 3D 形状体积场的自适应深度表示，以及学习这种深度表示以实现高质量 3D 形状重建和自动编码的有效方法。我们的方法使用由八叉树组织的自适应特征体积对 3D 形状的体积场进行编码，并应用紧凑的多层感知器网络将特征映射到每个 3D 位置的场值。编码器-解码器网络被设计为基于八叉树节点对偶图上的图卷积来学习自适应特征量。我们网络的核心是在不同级别的不规则相邻八叉树节点融合的规则特征网格上定义的新图卷积算子，这不仅减少了不规则相邻八叉树节点上卷积的计算和内存成本，而且提高了特征学习的性能。我们的方法有效地编码形状细节，实现快速 3D 形状重建，并在训练类别之外的 3D 形状建模方面表现出良好的通用性。我们在一组 3D 形状和场景的重建任务上评估我们的方法，并验证其相对于其他现有方法的优越性。我们的代码、数据和训练模型可在 https://wang-ps.github.io/dualocnn 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双八叉树图网络的自适应体素形状表示方法，用于高效高质量的3D形状重建与自编码。
AI.motivation: 传统3D形状表示方法在处理复杂几何细节时存在计算效率低、表示能力不足的问题，需设计更适应多尺度特征的自适应表示框架。
AI.method: 构建基于八叉树的自适应特征体素，结合双图卷积网络（节点图与八叉树层级图）实现多尺度特征融合，通过改进的图卷积算子降低不规则邻域计算成本。
AI.result: 在形状重建任务中优于现有方法，实现细节保留与快速重建，对训练类别外的3D形状具有良好泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 双八叉树图网络有效平衡了表示精度与计算效率，为复杂3D形状建模提供了新型自适应框架。

Our method encodes the volumetric field of a 3D shape with an adaptive feature volume organized by an octree and applies a compact multilayer perceptron network for mapping the features to the field value at each 3D position. An encoder-decoder network is designed to learn the adaptive feature volume based on the graph convolutions over the dual graph of octree nodes. The core of our network is a new graph convolution operator defined over a regular grid of features fused from irregular neighboring octree nodes at different levels, which not only reduces the computational and memory cost of the convolutions over irregular neighboring octree nodes, but also improves the performance of feature learning. Our method effectively encodes shape details, enables fast 3D shape reconstruction, and exhibits good generality for modeling 3D shapes out of training categories. We evaluate our method on a set of reconstruction tasks of 3D shapes and scenes and validate its superiority over other existing approaches. authors_text: Gabriel B Margolis,Ge Yang,Kartik Paigwar,Tao Chen,Pulkit Agrawal
title: Rapid Locomotion via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习实现快速运动
comment: Accepted for publication at Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) 2022
abstract: Agile maneuvers such as sprinting and high-speed turning in the wild are challenging for legged robots. We present an end-to-end learned controller that achieves record agility for the MIT Mini Cheetah, sustaining speeds up to 3.9 m/s. This system runs and turns fast on natural terrains like grass, ice, and gravel and responds robustly to disturbances. Our controller is a neural network trained in simulation via reinforcement learning and transferred to the real world. The two key components are (i) an adaptive curriculum on velocity commands and (ii) an online system identification strategy for sim-to-real transfer leveraged from prior work. Videos of the robot's behaviors are available at: https://agility.csail.mit.edu/
summary: Agile maneuvers such as sprinting and high-speed turning in the wild are challenging for legged robots. We present an end-to-end learned controller that achieves record agility for the MIT Mini Cheetah, sustaining speeds up to 3.9 m/s. This system runs and turns fast on natural terrains like grass, ice, and gravel and responds robustly to disturbances. Our controller is a neural network trained in simulation via reinforcement learning and transferred to the real world. The two key components are (i) an adaptive curriculum on velocity commands and (ii) an online system identification strategy for sim-to-real transfer leveraged from prior work. Videos of the robot's behaviors are available at: https://agility.csail.mit.edu/
abstract_zh: 在野外进行冲刺和高速转弯等敏捷动作对于腿式机器人来说是一项挑战。我们提出了一种端到端学习控制器，它为 MIT Mini Cheetah 实现了创纪录的敏捷性，维持高达 3.9 m/s 的速度。该系统可以在草地、冰和砾石等自然地形上快速运行和转向，并对干扰做出强有力的响应。我们的控制器是一个通过强化学习进行模拟训练并转移到现实世界的神经网络。这两个关键组成部分是（i）关于速度命令的自适应课程和（ii）利用先前工作的模拟到真实传输的在线系统识别策略。有关机器人行为的视频，请访问：https://agility.csail.mit.edu/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过强化学习实现的端到端控制方法，使MIT Mini Cheetah机器人在复杂地形中实现高速奔跑和敏捷转向。
AI.motivation: 腿式机器人在自然地形中实现高速敏捷动作（如冲刺和急转）面临重大挑战，现有方法难以兼顾速度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于模拟环境的强化学习训练神经网络控制器，结合自适应速度指令课程和在线系统识别策略实现仿真到现实的迁移。
AI.result: 机器人实现在草丛、冰面、碎石等地形以3.9m/s速度稳定移动，并成功应对干扰，创下了敏捷性新纪录。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过课程学习与在线系统识别的结合，有效解决了仿真到现实的迁移问题，为高机动性腿式机器人控制提供了新范式。

search_text: Rapid Locomotion via Reinforcement Learning 通过强化学习实现快速运动 Agile maneuvers such as sprinting and high-speed turning in the wild are challenging for legged robots. We present an end-to-end learned controller that achieves record agility for the MIT Mini Cheetah, sustaining speeds up to 3.9 m/s. This system runs and turns fast on natural terrains like grass, ice, and gravel and responds robustly to disturbances. Our controller is a neural network trained in simulation via reinforcement learning and transferred to the real world. The two key components are (i) an adaptive curriculum on velocity commands and (ii) an online system identification strategy for sim-to-real transfer leveraged from prior work. Videos of the robot's behaviors are available at: https://agility.csail.mit.edu/ 在野外进行冲刺和高速转弯等敏捷动作对于腿式机器人来说是一项挑战。我们提出了一种端到端学习控制器，它为 MIT Mini Cheetah 实现了创纪录的敏捷性，维持高达 3.9 m/s 的速度。该系统可以在草地、冰和砾石等自然地形上快速运行和转向，并对干扰做出强有力的响应。我们的控制器是一个通过强化学习进行模拟训练并转移到现实世界的神经网络。这两个关键组成部分是（i）关于速度命令的自适应课程和（ii）利用先前工作的模拟到真实传输的在线系统识别策略。有关机器人行为的视频，请访问：https://agility.csail.mit.edu/ 本文提出了一种通过强化学习实现的端到端控制方法，使MIT Mini Cheetah机器人在复杂地形中实现高速奔跑和敏捷转向。 Gabriel B Margolis,Ge Yang,Kartik Paigwar,Tao Chen,Pulkit Agrawal cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ben Cameron,Aysu Gündoğan,Joe Sawada
title: Cut-Down de Bruijn Sequences
title_zh: 布鲁因序列的删减
abstract: A cut-down de Bruijn sequence is a cyclic string of length $L$, where $1 \leq L \leq k^n$, such that every substring of length $n$ appears at most once. Etzion [Theor. Comp. Sci 44 (1986)] gives an algorithm to construct binary cut-down de Bruijn sequences that requires $o(n)$ simple $n$-bit operations per symbol generated. In this paper, we simplify the algorithm and improve the running time to $\mathcal{O}(n)$ time per symbol generated using $\mathcal{O}(n)$ space. We then provide the first successor-rule approach for constructing a binary cut-down de Bruijn sequence by leveraging recent ranking algorithms for fixed-density Lyndon words. Finally, we develop an algorithm to generate cut-down de Bruijn sequences for $k>2$ that runs in $\mathcal{O}(n)$ time per symbol using $\mathcal{O}(n)$ space after some initialization. While our $k$-ary algorithm is based on our simplified version of Etzion's binary algorithm, a number of non-trivial adaptations are required to generalize to larger alphabets.
summary: A cut-down de Bruijn sequence is a cyclic string of length $L$, where $1 \leq L \leq k^n$, such that every substring of length $n$ appears at most once. Etzion [Theor. Comp. Sci 44 (1986)] gives an algorithm to construct binary cut-down de Bruijn sequences that requires $o(n)$ simple $n$-bit operations per symbol generated. In this paper, we simplify the algorithm and improve the running time to $\mathcal{O}(n)$ time per symbol generated using $\mathcal{O}(n)$ space. We then provide the first successor-rule approach for constructing a binary cut-down de Bruijn sequence by leveraging recent ranking algorithms for fixed-density Lyndon words. Finally, we develop an algorithm to generate cut-down de Bruijn sequences for $k>2$ that runs in $\mathcal{O}(n)$ time per symbol using $\mathcal{O}(n)$ space after some initialization. While our $k$-ary algorithm is based on our simplified version of Etzion's binary algorithm, a number of non-trivial adaptations are required to generalize to larger alphabets.
abstract_zh: 缩减的 de Bruijn 序列是长度为 $L$ 的循环字符串，其中 $1 \leq L \leq k^n$，使得长度为 $n$ 的每个子字符串最多出现一次。埃齐翁[理论。比较。 Sci 44 (1986)] 给出了一种构造二进制缩减 de Bruijn 序列的算法，该算法需要对每个生成的符号执行 $o(n)$ 简单的 $n$ 位操作。在本文中，我们简化了算法，并将使用 $\mathcal{O}(n)$ 空间生成的每个符号的运行时间提高到 $\mathcal{O}(n)$ 时间。然后，我们提供了第一个后继规则方法，通过利用最新的固定密度 Lyndon 词的排名算法来构建二进制削减 de Bruijn 序列。最后，我们开发了一种算法，用于生成 $k>2$ 的缩减 de Bruijn 序列，该算法在初始化后使用 $\mathcal{O}(n)$ 空间，每个符号运行 $\mathcal{O}(n)$ 时间。虽然我们的 $k$-ary 算法基于 Etzion 二进制算法的简化版本，但需要进行一些重要的调整才能推广到更大的字母表。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在改进生成截断德布鲁因序列的算法，提高其时间效率并扩展至更大字母表。
AI.motivation: 现有算法生成二进制截断德布鲁因序列的时间复杂度为o(n)，但需进一步优化至O(n)，并缺乏针对多字母表的通用方法。
AI.method: 简化Etzion的二进制算法，采用基于固定密度Lyndon字排名算法的后继规则方法，并对k>2的情况进行非平凡适配。
AI.result: 实现O(n)时间复杂度和空间复杂度的二进制序列生成，首次提出后继规则方法，并扩展至k>2的字母表。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法优化和推广，显著提升了截断德布鲁因序列的生成效率，并为多字母表场景提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Fabien C. Y. Benureau,Jun Tani
title: Morphological Wobbling Can Help Robots Learn
title_zh: 形态摆动可以帮助机器人学习
abstract: We propose to make the physical characteristics of a robot oscillate while it learns to improve its behavioral performance. We consider quantities such as mass, actuator strength, and size that are usually fixed in a robot, and show that when those quantities oscillate at the beginning of the learning process on a simulated 2D soft robot, the performance on a locomotion task can be significantly improved. We investigate the dynamics of the phenomenon and conclude that in our case, surprisingly, a high-frequency oscillation with a large amplitude for a large portion of the learning duration leads to the highest performance benefits. Furthermore, we show that morphological wobbling significantly increases exploration of the search space.
summary: We propose to make the physical characteristics of a robot oscillate while it learns to improve its behavioral performance. We consider quantities such as mass, actuator strength, and size that are usually fixed in a robot, and show that when those quantities oscillate at the beginning of the learning process on a simulated 2D soft robot, the performance on a locomotion task can be significantly improved. We investigate the dynamics of the phenomenon and conclude that in our case, surprisingly, a high-frequency oscillation with a large amplitude for a large portion of the learning duration leads to the highest performance benefits. Furthermore, we show that morphological wobbling significantly increases exploration of the search space.
abstract_zh: 我们建议让机器人的物理特性在学习改善其行为表现的同时产生振荡。我们考虑了机器人中通常固定的质量、执行器强度和尺寸等量，并表明，当这些量在模拟 2D 软体机器人的学习过程开始时发生振荡时，运动任务的性能可以显着提高。我们研究了这种现象的动态，并得出结论，令人惊讶的是，在我们的例子中，在学习持续时间的大部分时间内，大幅度的高频振荡会带来最高的性能优势。此外，我们表明形态摆动显着增加了对搜索空间的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过让机器人在学习过程中物理特征振荡以提升行为表现
AI.motivation: 传统机器人物理参数固定，限制了学习效率，通过引入振荡可能提升探索和性能
AI.method: 在模拟的2D软机器人中，让质量、执行器强度和尺寸等参数在学习初期进行振荡
AI.result: 振荡显著提升移动任务表现，高频大振幅振荡在长时间学习中效果最佳，并增强探索空间
AI.conclusion: 形态振荡能有效提升机器人学习性能，促进探索，为机器人设计提供新思路

authors_text: Zhuohong He,Ali Mottaghi,Aidean Sharghi,Muhammad Abdullah Jamal,Omid Mohareri
title: An Empirical Study on Activity Recognition in Long Surgical Videos
title_zh: 长手术视频中活动识别的实证研究
abstract: Activity recognition in surgical videos is a key research area for developing next-generation devices and workflow monitoring systems. Since surgeries are long processes with highly-variable lengths, deep learning models used for surgical videos often consist of a two-stage setup using a backbone and temporal sequence model. In this paper, we investigate many state-of-the-art backbones and temporal models to find architectures that yield the strongest performance for surgical activity recognition. We first benchmark the models performance on a large-scale activity recognition dataset containing over 800 surgery videos captured in multiple clinical operating rooms. We further evaluate the models on the two smaller public datasets, the Cholec80 and Cataract-101 datasets, containing only 80 and 101 videos respectively. We empirically found that Swin-Transformer+BiGRU temporal model yielded strong performance on both datasets. Finally, we investigate the adaptability of the model to new domains by fine-tuning models to a new hospital and experimenting with a recent unsupervised domain adaptation approach.
summary: Activity recognition in surgical videos is a key research area for developing next-generation devices and workflow monitoring systems. Since surgeries are long processes with highly-variable lengths, deep learning models used for surgical videos often consist of a two-stage setup using a backbone and temporal sequence model. In this paper, we investigate many state-of-the-art backbones and temporal models to find architectures that yield the strongest performance for surgical activity recognition. We first benchmark the models performance on a large-scale activity recognition dataset containing over 800 surgery videos captured in multiple clinical operating rooms. We further evaluate the models on the two smaller public datasets, the Cholec80 and Cataract-101 datasets, containing only 80 and 101 videos respectively. We empirically found that Swin-Transformer+BiGRU temporal model yielded strong performance on both datasets. Finally, we investigate the adaptability of the model to new domains by fine-tuning models to a new hospital and experimenting with a recent unsupervised domain adaptation approach.
abstract_zh: 手术视频中的活动识别是开发下一代设备和工作流程监控系统的关键研究领域。由于手术是一个长度变化很大的漫长过程，因此用于手术视频的深度学习模型通常由使用主干模型和时间序列模型的两阶段设置组成。在本文中，我们研究了许多最先进的主干网络和时间模型，以找到能够为手术活动识别提供最强性能的架构。我们首先在大规模活动识别数据集上对模型性能进行基准测试，该数据集包含在多个临床手术室捕获的 800 多个手术视频。我们进一步在两个较小的公共数据集（Cholec80 和 Cataract-101 数据集）上评估模型，这两个数据集分别仅包含 80 和 101 个视频。我们凭经验发现 Swin-Transformer+BiGRU 时间模型在两个数据集上都产生了很强的性能。最后，我们通过对新医院的模型进行微调并尝试最近的无监督领域适应方法来研究模型对新领域的适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过实验研究不同深度学习架构在手术视频活动识别中的性能，以优化下一代医疗设备和工作流监控系统。
AI.motivation: 手术视频时长不一且内容复杂，现有两阶段模型（骨干网络+时序模型）性能参差，需系统评估最优架构以提升识别准确率和适应性。
AI.method: 在包含800+手术视频的大规模数据集及两个公开数据集（Cholec80、Cataract-101）上，对比多种骨干网络与时序模型组合，验证Swin-Transformer+BiGRU架构效果，并测试模型在新医院场景下的领域适应性。
AI.result: Swin-Transformer结合双向门控循环单元（BiGRU）的时序模型在所有数据集上表现最佳，且通过微调和无监督领域适应方法有效提升了跨医院场景的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Swin-Transformer+BiGRU是手术视频活动识别的高效架构，领域适应技术可增强模型在新医疗环境中的实用性，为智能手术监控提供技术支撑。

search_text: An Empirical Study on Activity Recognition in Long Surgical Videos 长手术视频中活动识别的实证研究 Activity recognition in surgical videos is a key research area for developing next-generation devices and workflow monitoring systems. Since surgeries are long processes with highly-variable lengths, deep learning models used for surgical videos often consist of a two-stage setup using a backbone and temporal sequence model. In this paper, we investigate many state-of-the-art backbones and temporal models to find architectures that yield the strongest performance for surgical activity recognition. We first benchmark the models performance on a large-scale activity recognition dataset containing over 800 surgery videos captured in multiple clinical operating rooms. We further evaluate the models on the two smaller public datasets, the Cholec80 and Cataract-101 datasets, containing only 80 and 101 videos respectively. We empirically found that Swin-Transformer+BiGRU temporal model yielded strong performance on both datasets. Finally, we investigate the adaptability of the model to new domains by fine-tuning models to a new hospital and experimenting with a recent unsupervised domain adaptation approach. 手术视频中的活动识别是开发下一代设备和工作流程监控系统的关键研究领域。由于手术是一个长度变化很大的漫长过程，因此用于手术视频的深度学习模型通常由使用主干模型和时间序列模型的两阶段设置组成。在本文中，我们研究了许多最先进的主干网络和时间模型，以找到能够为手术活动识别提供最强性能的架构。我们首先在大规模活动识别数据集上对模型性能进行基准测试，该数据集包含在多个临床手术室捕获的 800 多个手术视频。我们进一步在两个较小的公共数据集（Cholec80 和 Cataract-101 数据集）上评估模型，这两个数据集分别仅包含 80 和 101 个视频。我们凭经验发现 Swin-Transformer+BiGRU 时间模型在两个数据集上都产生了很强的性能。最后，我们通过对新医院的模型进行微调并尝试最近的无监督领域适应方法来研究模型对新领域的适应性。 本文旨在通过实验研究不同深度学习架构在手术视频活动识别中的性能，以优化下一代医疗设备和工作流监控系统。 Zhuohong He,Ali Mottaghi,Aidean Sharghi,Muhammad Abdullah Jamal,Omid Mohareri cs.CV

authors_text: Shourya Verma
title: Development of Interpretable Machine Learning Models to Detect Arrhythmia based on ECG Data
title_zh: 开发可解释的机器学习模型以基于心电图数据检测心律失常
abstract: The analysis of electrocardiogram (ECG) signals can be time consuming as it is performed manually by cardiologists. Therefore, automation through machine learning (ML) classification is being increasingly proposed which would allow ML models to learn the features of a heartbeat and detect abnormalities. The lack of interpretability hinders the application of Deep Learning in healthcare. Through interpretability of these models, we would understand how a machine learning algorithm makes its decisions and what patterns are being followed for classification. This thesis builds Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) classifiers based on state-of-the-art models and compares their performance and interpretability to shallow classifiers. Here, both global and local interpretability methods are exploited to understand the interaction between dependent and independent variables across the entire dataset and to examine model decisions in each sample, respectively. Partial Dependence Plots, Shapley Additive Explanations, Permutation Feature Importance, and Gradient Weighted Class Activation Maps (Grad-Cam) are the four interpretability techniques implemented on time-series ML models classifying ECG rhythms. In particular, we exploit Grad-Cam, which is a local interpretability technique and examine whether its interpretability varies between correctly and incorrectly classified ECG beats within each class. Furthermore, the classifiers are evaluated using K-Fold cross-validation and Leave Groups Out techniques, and we use non-parametric statistical testing to examine whether differences are significant. It was found that Grad-CAM was the most effective interpretability technique at explaining predictions of proposed CNN and LSTM models. We concluded that all high performing classifiers looked at the QRS complex of the ECG rhythm when making predictions.
summary: The analysis of electrocardiogram (ECG) signals can be time consuming as it is performed manually by cardiologists. Therefore, automation through machine learning (ML) classification is being increasingly proposed which would allow ML models to learn the features of a heartbeat and detect abnormalities. The lack of interpretability hinders the application of Deep Learning in healthcare. Through interpretability of these models, we would understand how a machine learning algorithm makes its decisions and what patterns are being followed for classification. This thesis builds Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) classifiers based on state-of-the-art models and compares their performance and interpretability to shallow classifiers. Here, both global and local interpretability methods are exploited to understand the interaction between dependent and independent variables across the entire dataset and to examine model decisions in each sample, respectively. Partial Dependence Plots, Shapley Additive Explanations, Permutation Feature Importance, and Gradient Weighted Class Activation Maps (Grad-Cam) are the four interpretability techniques implemented on time-series ML models classifying ECG rhythms. In particular, we exploit Grad-Cam, which is a local interpretability technique and examine whether its interpretability varies between correctly and incorrectly classified ECG beats within each class. Furthermore, the classifiers are evaluated using K-Fold cross-validation and Leave Groups Out techniques, and we use non-parametric statistical testing to examine whether differences are significant. It was found that Grad-CAM was the most effective interpretability technique at explaining predictions of proposed CNN and LSTM models. We concluded that all high performing classifiers looked at the QRS complex of the ECG rhythm when making predictions.
abstract_zh: 心电图 (ECG) 信号的分析可能非常耗时，因为它是由心脏病专家手动执行的。因此，越来越多地提出通过机器学习 (ML) 分类实现自动化，这将使 ML 模型能够学习心跳特征并检测异常。缺乏可解释性阻碍了深度学习在医疗保健中的应用。通过这些模型的可解释性，我们将了解机器学习算法如何做出决策以及分类遵循哪些模式。本论文基于最先进的模型构建了卷积神经网络（CNN）和长短期记忆（LSTM）分类器，并将它们的性能和可解释性与浅层分类器进行了比较。在这里，利用全局和局部可解释性方法来理解整个数据集中因变量和自变量之间的相互作用，并分别检查每个样本中的模型决策。部分依赖图、Shapley 加法解释、排列特征重要性和梯度加权类激活图 (Grad-Cam) 是在对 ECG 心律进行分类的时间序列 ML 模型上实现的四种可解释性技术。特别是，我们利用 Grad-Cam（一种局部可解释性技术），并检查其可解释性在每个类别中正确分类和错误分类的心电图心跳之间是否存在差异。此外，使用 K-Fold 交叉验证和 Leave Groups Out 技术来评估分类器，并且我们使用非参数统计测试来检查差异是否显着。研究发现，Grad-CAM 是解释所提出的 CNN 和 LSTM 模型预测的最有效的可解释性技术。我们得出的结论是，所有高性能分类器在进行预测时都会查看心电图节律的 QRS 复合波。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了基于ECG数据的可解释机器学习模型以检测心律失常，并比较了CNN和LSTM分类器的性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 人工分析心电图（ECG）信号耗时且效率低，而深度学习模型的不可解释性阻碍了其在医疗领域的应用，需通过可解释性方法提升模型可信度。
AI.method: 构建CNN和LSTM分类器，结合全局（如部分依赖图、SHAP）和局部（如Grad-CAM）可解释性方法，通过K折交叉验证和非参数统计检验评估模型性能差异。
AI.result: Grad-CAM被证明是解释CNN和LSTM模型预测的最有效方法，高性能分类器均关注ECG信号中的QRS复合波特征。
AI.conclusion: 可解释机器学习模型（尤其Grad-CAM）能有效检测心律失常，其决策依据为QRS复合波分析，为临床应用提供可靠支持。

authors_text: Yiwei Li,Shaoxiong Feng,Bin Sun,Kan Li
title: Diversifying Neural Dialogue Generation via Negative Distillation
title_zh: 通过负蒸馏使神经对话生成多样化
abstract: Generative dialogue models suffer badly from the generic response problem, limiting their applications to a few toy scenarios. Recently, an interesting approach, namely negative training, has been proposed to alleviate this problem by reminding the model not to generate high-frequency responses during training. However, its performance is hindered by two issues, ignoring low-frequency but generic responses and bringing low-frequency but meaningless responses. In this paper, we propose a novel negative training paradigm, called negative distillation, to keep the model away from the undesirable generic responses while avoiding the above problems. First, we introduce a negative teacher model that can produce query-wise generic responses, and then the student model is required to maximize the distance with multi-level negative knowledge. Empirical results show that our method outperforms previous negative training methods significantly.
summary: Generative dialogue models suffer badly from the generic response problem, limiting their applications to a few toy scenarios. Recently, an interesting approach, namely negative training, has been proposed to alleviate this problem by reminding the model not to generate high-frequency responses during training. However, its performance is hindered by two issues, ignoring low-frequency but generic responses and bringing low-frequency but meaningless responses. In this paper, we propose a novel negative training paradigm, called negative distillation, to keep the model away from the undesirable generic responses while avoiding the above problems. First, we introduce a negative teacher model that can produce query-wise generic responses, and then the student model is required to maximize the distance with multi-level negative knowledge. Empirical results show that our method outperforms previous negative training methods significantly.
abstract_zh: 生成对话模型受到通用响应问题的严重影响，将其应用限制在一些玩具场景中。最近，人们提出了一种有趣的方法，即负训练，通过提醒模型在训练过程中不要生成高频响应来缓解这个问题。然而，它的性能受到两个问题的阻碍，忽略低频但通用的响应和带来低频但无意义的响应。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的负训练范式，称为负蒸馏，以使模型远离不良的通用响应，同时避免上述问题。首先，我们引入一个可以产生查询式通用响应的负教师模型，然后学生模型需要最大化多级负知识的距离。实证结果表明，我们的方法显着优于以前的负训练方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为负向蒸馏的新方法，通过改进负向训练来解决生成式对话模型中的通用响应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有负向训练方法存在忽略低频通用响应和引入无意义低频响应的问题，导致模型多样性不足。
AI.method: 引入负向教师模型生成查询相关的通用响应，学生模型通过最大化与多级负向知识的距离进行学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于之前的负向训练方法，在对话多样性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 负向蒸馏有效解决了通用响应问题，在保持对话质量的同时提升了响应多样性。

search_text: Diversifying Neural Dialogue Generation via Negative Distillation 通过负蒸馏使神经对话生成多样化 Generative dialogue models suffer badly from the generic response problem, limiting their applications to a few toy scenarios. Recently, an interesting approach, namely negative training, has been proposed to alleviate this problem by reminding the model not to generate high-frequency responses during training. However, its performance is hindered by two issues, ignoring low-frequency but generic responses and bringing low-frequency but meaningless responses. In this paper, we propose a novel negative training paradigm, called negative distillation, to keep the model away from the undesirable generic responses while avoiding the above problems. First, we introduce a negative teacher model that can produce query-wise generic responses, and then the student model is required to maximize the distance with multi-level negative knowledge. Empirical results show that our method outperforms previous negative training methods significantly. 生成对话模型受到通用响应问题的严重影响，将其应用限制在一些玩具场景中。最近，人们提出了一种有趣的方法，即负训练，通过提醒模型在训练过程中不要生成高频响应来缓解这个问题。然而，它的性能受到两个问题的阻碍，忽略低频但通用的响应和带来低频但无意义的响应。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的负训练范式，称为负蒸馏，以使模型远离不良的通用响应，同时避免上述问题。首先，我们引入一个可以产生查询式通用响应的负教师模型，然后学生模型需要最大化多级负知识的距离。实证结果表明，我们的方法显着优于以前的负训练方法。 本文提出一种名为负向蒸馏的新方法，通过改进负向训练来解决生成式对话模型中的通用响应问题。 Yiwei Li,Shaoxiong Feng,Bin Sun,Kan Li cs.CL,cs.AI

authors: A. B. M. Alim Al Islam

authors_text: Waqar Hassan Khan,Md Al Imran,Ahmed Nafis Fuad,Mohammed Latif Siddiq,A. B. M. Alim Al Islam
title: Shashthosheba: Dissecting Perception of Bangladeshi People towards Telemedicine Apps through the Lens of Features of the Apps
title_zh: Shashthosheba：通过应用程序的功能剖析孟加拉国人民对远程医疗应用程序的看法
abstract: Bangladesh, a developing country with a large and dense population, has recently seen significant economic as well as technological developments. The growth of technology has resulted in a dramatic increase in the number of smartphone users in Bangladesh, and as such, mobile apps have become an increasingly important part of peoples' life, even encompassing healthcare services. However, the apps used in healthcare (telemedicine to be specific) in Bangladesh are yet to be studied from the perspective of their features as per the voices of the users as well as service providers. Therefore, in this study, we focus on the features of the telemedicine apps used in Bangladesh. First, we evaluated the present status of existing telemedicine apps in Bangladesh, as well as their benefits and drawbacks in the context of HCI. We analyzed publicly accessible reviews of several Bangladeshi telemedicine apps (N = 14) to evaluate the user impressions. Additionally, to ascertain the public opinion of these apps, we performed a survey in which the patients (N = 87) participated willingly. Our analysis of the collected opinions reveals what users experience, what they appreciate, and what they are concerned about when they use telemedicine apps. Additionally, our study demonstrates what users expect from telemedicine apps, independent of their past experience. Finally, we explore how to address the issues we discovered and how telemedicine may be used to effectively offer healthcare services throughout the country. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first to analyze the perception of the people of Bangladesh towards telemedicine apps from the perspective of features of the apps.
summary: Bangladesh, a developing country with a large and dense population, has recently seen significant economic as well as technological developments. The growth of technology has resulted in a dramatic increase in the number of smartphone users in Bangladesh, and as such, mobile apps have become an increasingly important part of peoples' life, even encompassing healthcare services. However, the apps used in healthcare (telemedicine to be specific) in Bangladesh are yet to be studied from the perspective of their features as per the voices of the users as well as service providers. Therefore, in this study, we focus on the features of the telemedicine apps used in Bangladesh. First, we evaluated the present status of existing telemedicine apps in Bangladesh, as well as their benefits and drawbacks in the context of HCI. We analyzed publicly accessible reviews of several Bangladeshi telemedicine apps (N = 14) to evaluate the user impressions. Additionally, to ascertain the public opinion of these apps, we performed a survey in which the patients (N = 87) participated willingly. Our analysis of the collected opinions reveals what users experience, what they appreciate, and what they are concerned about when they use telemedicine apps. Additionally, our study demonstrates what users expect from telemedicine apps, independent of their past experience. Finally, we explore how to address the issues we discovered and how telemedicine may be used to effectively offer healthcare services throughout the country. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first to analyze the perception of the people of Bangladesh towards telemedicine apps from the perspective of features of the apps.
abstract_zh: 孟加拉国是一个人口众多、人口稠密的发展中国家，最近经济和技术取得了显着的发展。技术的发展导致孟加拉国智能手机用户数量急剧增加，因此移动应用程序已成为人们生活中越来越重要的一部分，甚至包括医疗保健服务。然而，孟加拉国用于医疗保健（特别是远程医疗）的应用程序尚未根据用户和服务提供商的声音从其功能的角度进行研究。因此，在本研究中，我们重点关注孟加拉国使用的远程医疗应用程序的功能。首先，我们评估了孟加拉国现有远程医疗应用程序的现状，以及它们在人机交互背景下的优缺点。我们分析了几个孟加拉国远程医疗应用程序 (N = 14) 的公开评论，以评估用户印象。此外，为了确定这些应用程序的公众意见，我们进行了一项患者（N = 87）自愿参与的调查。我们对收集的意见的分析揭示了用户在使用远程医疗应用程序时的体验、他们欣赏的内容以及他们关心的内容。此外，我们的研究还展示了用户对远程医疗应用程序的期望，而与他们过去的经验无关。最后，我们探讨了如何解决我们发现的问题以及如何利用远程医疗在全国范围内有效地提供医疗保健服务。据我们所知，这项研究首次从应用程序的功能角度分析了孟加拉国人民对远程医疗应用程序的看法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析孟加拉国用户对远程医疗应用功能的感知，探讨其使用体验与需求。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉国智能手机用户激增，但远程医疗应用的功能设计尚未从用户和提供者视角进行系统研究。
AI.method: 评估现有远程医疗应用现状，分析14款应用的公开评论，并对87名患者进行问卷调查。
AI.result: 用户对应用的便捷性、功能完整性和隐私保护存在显著关注，同时提出改进建议。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次从功能视角分析孟加拉国用户对远程医疗应用的感知，为优化服务提供依据。

authors_text: Peter Macgregor,He Sun
title: Finding Bipartite Components in Hypergraphs
title_zh: 寻找超图中的二分分量
abstract: Hypergraphs are important objects to model ternary or higher-order relations of objects, and have a number of applications in analysing many complex datasets occurring in practice. In this work we study a new heat diffusion process in hypergraphs, and employ this process to design a polynomial-time algorithm that approximately finds bipartite components in a hypergraph. We theoretically prove the performance of our proposed algorithm, and compare it against the previous state-of-the-art through extensive experimental analysis on both synthetic and real-world datasets. We find that our new algorithm consistently and significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art across a wide range of hypergraphs.
summary: Hypergraphs are important objects to model ternary or higher-order relations of objects, and have a number of applications in analysing many complex datasets occurring in practice. In this work we study a new heat diffusion process in hypergraphs, and employ this process to design a polynomial-time algorithm that approximately finds bipartite components in a hypergraph. We theoretically prove the performance of our proposed algorithm, and compare it against the previous state-of-the-art through extensive experimental analysis on both synthetic and real-world datasets. We find that our new algorithm consistently and significantly outperforms the previous state-of-the-art across a wide range of hypergraphs.
abstract_zh: 超图是对对象的三元或高阶关系进行建模的重要对象，并且在分析实践中出现的许多复杂数据集方面具有许多应用。在这项工作中，我们研究了超图中的一种新的热扩散过程，并利用该过程设计了一种多项式时间算法，可以近似地找到超图中的二分分量。我们从理论上证明了我们提出的算法的性能，并通过对合成数据集和真实数据集进行广泛的实验分析，将其与之前的最先进算法进行比较。我们发现，我们的新算法在各种超图上始终显着优于以前的最先进算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于热扩散过程的多项式时间算法，用于近似寻找超图中的二分分量。
AI.motivation: 超图能有效建模高阶关系，但现有方法在分解超图二分分量时存在效率或精度不足的问题，需探索更优算法。
AI.method: 设计新的热扩散过程模型，结合理论分析证明算法性能，并通过合成与真实数据集的实验对比验证效果。
AI.result: 新算法在多种超图数据集上显著优于现有最佳方法，且具有稳定的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 提出的热扩散算法为超图二分分解提供了高效解决方案，验证了其理论有效性与实际应用优势。

authors_text: Zulun Zhu,Jiaying Peng,Jintang Li,Liang Chen,Qi Yu,Siqiang Luo
title: Spiking Graph Convolutional Networks
title_zh: 尖峰图卷积网络
comment: Accepted by IJCAI 2022; Code available at https://github.com/ZulunZhu/SpikingGCN
comments: Accepted by IJCAI 2022; Code available at https://github.com/ZulunZhu/SpikingGCN
abstract: Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) achieve an impressive performance due to the remarkable representation ability in learning the graph information. However, GCNs, when implemented on a deep network, require expensive computation power, making them difficult to be deployed on battery-powered devices. In contrast, Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), which perform a bio-fidelity inference process, offer an energy-efficient neural architecture. In this work, we propose SpikingGCN, an end-to-end framework that aims to integrate the embedding of GCNs with the biofidelity characteristics of SNNs. The original graph data are encoded into spike trains based on the incorporation of graph convolution. We further model biological information processing by utilizing a fully connected layer combined with neuron nodes. In a wide range of scenarios (e.g. citation networks, image graph classification, and recommender systems), our experimental results show that the proposed method could gain competitive performance against state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, we show that SpikingGCN on a neuromorphic chip can bring a clear advantage of energy efficiency into graph data analysis, which demonstrates its great potential to construct environment-friendly machine learning models.

The original graph data are encoded into spike trains based on the incorporation of graph convolution. In a wide range of scenarios (e.g. citation networks, image graph classification, and recommender systems), our experimental results show that the proposed method could gain competitive performance against state-of-the-art approaches. Furthermore, we show that SpikingGCN on a neuromorphic chip can bring a clear advantage of energy efficiency into graph data analysis, which demonstrates its great potential to construct environment-friendly machine learning models.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）由于学习图信息的卓越表示能力而取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，GCN 在深度网络上实现时需要昂贵的计算能力，这使得它们很难部署在电池供电的设备上。相比之下，执行生物保真度推理过程的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 提供了一种节能的神经架构。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SpikingGCN，这是一个端到端框架，旨在将 GCN 的嵌入与 SNN 的生物保真度特征相结合。基于图卷积的结合，原始图数据被编码成脉冲序列。我们通过利用与神经元节点相结合的全连接层进一步模拟生物信息处理。在广泛的场景中（例如引文网络、图像图分类和推荐系统），我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以获得与最先进的方法相比的竞争性能。此外，我们还表明，神经形态芯片上的 SpikingGCN 可以为图数据分析带来明显的能源效率优势，这展示了其构建环境友好型机器学习模型的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合图卷积网络（GCN）与脉冲神经网络（SNN）特性的新型框架SpikingGCN，旨在提升图数据处理的能效比。
AI.motivation: 传统GCN在深度网络中计算成本高，难以部署于电池供电设备；而SNN具有生物仿真性且能耗低，因此需融合两者优势以实现高效图数据分析。
AI.method: 通过图卷积将原始图数据编码为脉冲序列，并结合全连接层与神经元节点建模生物信息处理机制，构建端到端的SpikingGCN框架。
AI.result: 在引文网络、图像图分类及推荐系统等场景中，SpikingGCN性能优于现有方法；在神经形态芯片上运行时展现出显著的能效优势。
AI.conclusion: SpikingGCN通过整合GCN的表征能力与SNN的能效特性，为构建环保型机器学习模型提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Sahraoui Dhelim,Tahar Kechadi,Liming Chen,Nyothiri Aung,Huansheng Ning,Luigi Atzori
title: Edge-enabled Metaverse: The Convergence of Metaverse and Mobile Edge Computing
title_zh: 支持边缘的 Metaverse：Metaverse 与移动边缘计算的融合
abstract: The Metaverse is a virtual environment where users are represented by avatars to navigate a virtual world, which has strong links with the physical one. State-of-the-art Metaverse architectures rely on a cloud-based approach for avatar physics emulation and graphics rendering computation. Such centralized design is unfavorable as it suffers from several drawbacks caused by the long latency required for cloud access, such as low quality visualization. To solve this issue, in this paper, we propose a Fog-Edge hybrid computing architecture for Metaverse applications that leverage an edge-enabled distributed computing paradigm, which makes use of edge devices computing power to fulfil the required computational cost for heavy tasks such as collision detection in virtual universe and computation of 3D physics in virtual simulation. The computational cost related to an entity in the Metaverse such as collision detection or physics emulation are performed at the end-device of the associated physical entity. To prove the effectiveness of the proposed architecture, we simulate a distributed social metaverse application. Simulation results shows that the proposed architecture can reduce the latency by 50% when compared with the legacy cloud-based Metaverse applications.
summary: The Metaverse is a virtual environment where users are represented by avatars to navigate a virtual world, which has strong links with the physical one. State-of-the-art Metaverse architectures rely on a cloud-based approach for avatar physics emulation and graphics rendering computation. Such centralized design is unfavorable as it suffers from several drawbacks caused by the long latency required for cloud access, such as low quality visualization. To solve this issue, in this paper, we propose a Fog-Edge hybrid computing architecture for Metaverse applications that leverage an edge-enabled distributed computing paradigm, which makes use of edge devices computing power to fulfil the required computational cost for heavy tasks such as collision detection in virtual universe and computation of 3D physics in virtual simulation. The computational cost related to an entity in the Metaverse such as collision detection or physics emulation are performed at the end-device of the associated physical entity. To prove the effectiveness of the proposed architecture, we simulate a distributed social metaverse application. Simulation results shows that the proposed architecture can reduce the latency by 50% when compared with the legacy cloud-based Metaverse applications.
abstract_zh: 元宇宙是一种虚拟环境，用户以化身为代表在虚拟世界中导航，虚拟世界与物理世界有着紧密的联系。最先进的 Metaverse 架构依赖于基于云的方法来进行虚拟形象物理模拟和图形渲染计算。这种集中式设计是不利的，因为它存在云访问所需的长延迟所带来的一些缺点，例如低质量的可视化。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种适用于元界应用程序的雾边缘混合计算架构，该架构利用边缘支持的分布式计算范式，利用边缘设备的计算能力来满足繁重任务所需的计算成本，例如虚拟宇宙中的碰撞检测和虚拟仿真中的3D物理计算。与元宇宙中的实体相关的计算成本（例如碰撞检测或物理仿真）在相关物理实体的终端设备上执行。为了证明所提出的架构的有效性，我们模拟了一个分布式社交元宇宙应用程序。仿真结果表明，与传统基于云的元界应用程序相比，所提出的架构可以减少 50% 的延迟。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种雾-边混合计算架构，通过边缘计算解决元宇宙应用中的高延迟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有元宇宙架构依赖云端计算导致延迟高、可视化质量差，需通过边缘计算优化性能。
AI.method: 设计雾-边混合架构，将碰撞检测、3D物理计算等任务下沉至终端设备，并模拟分布式社交元宇宙应用验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，该架构相比传统云架构将延迟降低50%。
AI.conclusion: 边缘计算能有效提升元宇宙应用的实时性与交互体验，为未来虚实融合提供新思路。

authors_text: Mulong Luo,G. Edward Suh
title: Accelerating Path Planning for Autonomous Driving with Hardware-Assisted Memoization
title_zh: 通过硬件辅助记忆加速自动驾驶的路径规划
abstract: Path planning for autonomous driving with dynamic obstacles poses a challenge because it needs to perform a higher-dimensional search (with time-dimension) while still meeting real-time constraints. This paper proposes an algorithm-hardware co-optimization approach to accelerate path planning with high-dimensional search space. First, we reduce the time for a nearest neighbor search and collision detection by mapping nodes and obstacles to a lower-dimensional space and memoizing recent search results. Then, we propose a hardware extension for efficient memoization. The experimental results on a modern processor and a cycle-level simulator show that the hardware-assisted memoization significantly reduces the execution time of path planning.
summary: Path planning for autonomous driving with dynamic obstacles poses a challenge because it needs to perform a higher-dimensional search (with time-dimension) while still meeting real-time constraints. This paper proposes an algorithm-hardware co-optimization approach to accelerate path planning with high-dimensional search space. First, we reduce the time for a nearest neighbor search and collision detection by mapping nodes and obstacles to a lower-dimensional space and memoizing recent search results. Then, we propose a hardware extension for efficient memoization. The experimental results on a modern processor and a cycle-level simulator show that the hardware-assisted memoization significantly reduces the execution time of path planning.
abstract_zh: 具有动态障碍物的自动驾驶的路径规划提出了挑战，因为它需要执行更高维度的搜索（具有时间维度），同时仍满足实时约束。本文提出了一种算法-硬件协同优化方法来加速高维搜索空间的路径规划。首先，我们通过将节点和障碍物映射到低维空间并记住最近的搜索结果来减少最近邻搜索和碰撞检测的时间。然后，我们提出了一种用于高效记忆的硬件扩展。现代处理器和周期级模拟器上的实验结果表明，硬件辅助记忆显着减少了路径规划的执行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种硬件辅助记忆化方法，通过算法与硬件协同优化加速自动驾驶中的高维路径规划。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶路径规划需处理高维时空搜索空间，传统方法难以兼顾实时性与计算效率，亟需新的优化方案。
AI.method: 将节点与障碍物映射至低维空间以加速最近邻搜索与碰撞检测，并设计硬件扩展模块实现高效记忆化结果存储与复用。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在现代处理器及周期级模拟器上显著降低了路径规划的执行时间。
AI.conclusion: 硬件辅助记忆化有效提升路径规划效率，为高维搜索问题的算法-硬件协同优化提供新思路。

search_text: Accelerating Path Planning for Autonomous Driving with Hardware-Assisted Memoization 通过硬件辅助记忆加速自动驾驶的路径规划 Path planning for autonomous driving with dynamic obstacles poses a challenge because it needs to perform a higher-dimensional search (with time-dimension) while still meeting real-time constraints. This paper proposes an algorithm-hardware co-optimization approach to accelerate path planning with high-dimensional search space. First, we reduce the time for a nearest neighbor search and collision detection by mapping nodes and obstacles to a lower-dimensional space and memoizing recent search results. Then, we propose a hardware extension for efficient memoization. The experimental results on a modern processor and a cycle-level simulator show that the hardware-assisted memoization significantly reduces the execution time of path planning. 具有动态障碍物的自动驾驶的路径规划提出了挑战，因为它需要执行更高维度的搜索（具有时间维度），同时仍满足实时约束。本文提出了一种算法-硬件协同优化方法来加速高维搜索空间的路径规划。首先，我们通过将节点和障碍物映射到低维空间并记住最近的搜索结果来减少最近邻搜索和碰撞检测的时间。然后，我们提出了一种用于高效记忆的硬件扩展。现代处理器和周期级模拟器上的实验结果表明，硬件辅助记忆显着减少了路径规划的执行时间。 本文提出一种硬件辅助记忆化方法，通过算法与硬件协同优化加速自动驾驶中的高维路径规划。 Mulong Luo,G. Edward Suh cs.RO,cs.AR

authors_text: Tim S. Lyon,Lucía Gómez Álvarez
title: Automating Reasoning with Standpoint Logic via Nested Sequents
title_zh: 通过嵌套序列使用立场逻辑自动推理
abstract: Standpoint logic is a recently proposed formalism in the context of knowledge integration, which advocates a multi-perspective approach permitting reasoning with a selection of diverse and possibly conflicting standpoints rather than forcing their unification. In this paper, we introduce nested sequent calculi for propositional standpoint logics--proof systems that manipulate trees whose nodes are multisets of formulae--and show how to automate standpoint reasoning by means of non-deterministic proof-search algorithms. To obtain worst-case complexity-optimal proof-search, we introduce a novel technique in the context of nested sequents, referred to as "coloring," which consists of taking a formula as input, guessing a certain coloring of its subformulae, and then running proof-search in a nested sequent calculus on the colored input. Our technique lets us decide the validity of standpoint formulae in CoNP since proof-search only produces a partial proof relative to each permitted coloring of the input. We show how all partial proofs can be fused together to construct a complete proof when the input is valid, and how certain partial proofs can be transformed into a counter-model when the input is invalid. These "certificates" (i.e. proofs and counter-models) serve as explanations of the (in)validity of the input.
summary: Standpoint logic is a recently proposed formalism in the context of knowledge integration, which advocates a multi-perspective approach permitting reasoning with a selection of diverse and possibly conflicting standpoints rather than forcing their unification. In this paper, we introduce nested sequent calculi for propositional standpoint logics--proof systems that manipulate trees whose nodes are multisets of formulae--and show how to automate standpoint reasoning by means of non-deterministic proof-search algorithms. To obtain worst-case complexity-optimal proof-search, we introduce a novel technique in the context of nested sequents, referred to as "coloring," which consists of taking a formula as input, guessing a certain coloring of its subformulae, and then running proof-search in a nested sequent calculus on the colored input. Our technique lets us decide the validity of standpoint formulae in CoNP since proof-search only produces a partial proof relative to each permitted coloring of the input. We show how all partial proofs can be fused together to construct a complete proof when the input is valid, and how certain partial proofs can be transformed into a counter-model when the input is invalid. These "certificates" (i.e. proofs and counter-models) serve as explanations of the (in)validity of the input.
abstract_zh: 立场逻辑是最近在知识整合背景下提出的一种形式主义，它提倡采用多视角方法，允许选择不同且可能相互冲突的立场进行推理，而不是强迫它们统一。在本文中，我们介绍了命题立场逻辑的嵌套顺序演算（操纵节点为多组公式的树的证明系统），并展示了如何通过非确定性证明搜索算法来自动化立场推理。为了获得最坏情况的复杂性最优证明搜索，我们在嵌套序列的背景下引入了一种新颖的技术，称为“着色”，它包括将公式作为输入，猜测其子公式的某种颜色，然后在彩色输入上的嵌套序列演算中运行证明搜索。我们的技术让我们能够决定 CoNP 中观点公式的有效性，因为证明搜索仅产生相对于每个允许的输入颜色的部分证明。我们展示了当输入有效时如何将所有部分证明融合在一起以构造完整的证明，以及当输入无效时如何将某些部分证明转换为反模型。这些“证书”（即证明和反模型）用作输入有效性的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过嵌套序数和非确定性证明搜索算法，实现立场逻辑的自动化推理，并引入'着色'技术优化证明搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 立场逻辑允许多视角并行推理，但缺乏高效的自动化推理方法，需解决冲突立场的验证与解释问题。
AI.method: 设计嵌套序数证明系统，结合'着色'技术对子公式进行猜测性标记，通过部分证明融合或反模型生成实现验证。
AI.result: 在CoNP复杂度下判定立场公式有效性，生成证明或反模型作为验证依据，提供可解释的推理结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了立场逻辑的高效自动化推理，为多视角知识整合提供了理论支持与实用工具。

authors_text: Madhu Sudan
title: Streaming and Sketching Complexity of CSPs: A survey
title_zh: CSP 的流式传输和草图复杂性：一项调查
abstract: In this survey we describe progress over the last decade or so in understanding the complexity of solving constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) approximately in the streaming and sketching models of computation. After surveying some of the results we give some sketches of the proofs and in particular try to explain why there is a tight dichotomy result for sketching algorithms working in subpolynomial space regime.
summary: In this survey we describe progress over the last decade or so in understanding the complexity of solving constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) approximately in the streaming and sketching models of computation. After surveying some of the results we give some sketches of the proofs and in particular try to explain why there is a tight dichotomy result for sketching algorithms working in subpolynomial space regime.
abstract_zh: 在本次调查中，我们描述了过去十年左右在理解在计算流和草图模型中解决约束满足问题 (CSP) 的复杂性方面取得的进展。在调查了一些结果之后，我们给出了一些证明的草图，特别是尝试解释为什么在次多项式空间体系中工作的草图算法存在严格的二分法结果。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了过去十年关于在流式和草图计算模型中近似求解约束满足问题（CSPs）复杂性的研究进展。
AI.motivation: 旨在总结流式和草图模型下CSPs近似求解的复杂性研究成果，并解释子多项式空间下草图算法的紧致二分法结果。
AI.method: 通过回顾相关结果并提供证明概要，重点阐述子多项式空间下草图算法的二分法结论。
AI.result: 明确了子多项式空间下草图算法对于CSPs的紧致二分法结果，划分了可解与不可解问题的界限。
AI.conclusion: 流式与草图模型下的CSPs复杂性研究为算法设计和理论计算机科学提供了重要理论支撑。

authors_text: Youhuan Yang,Lei Sun,Leyu Dai,Song Guo,Xiuqing Mao,Xiaoqin Wang,Bayi Xu
title: Rethinking Classifier and Adversarial Attack
title_zh: 重新思考分类器和对抗性攻击
abstract: Various defense models have been proposed to resist adversarial attack algorithms, but existing adversarial robustness evaluation methods always overestimate the adversarial robustness of these models (i.e., not approaching the lower bound of robustness). To solve this problem, this paper uses the proposed decouple space method to divide the classifier into two parts: non-linear and linear. Then, this paper defines the representation vector of the original example (and its space, i.e., the representation space) and uses the iterative optimization of Absolute Classification Boundaries Initialization (ACBI) to obtain a better attack starting point. Particularly, this paper applies ACBI to nearly 50 widely-used defense models (including 8 architectures). Experimental results show that ACBI achieves lower robust accuracy in all cases.
summary: Various defense models have been proposed to resist adversarial attack algorithms, but existing adversarial robustness evaluation methods always overestimate the adversarial robustness of these models (i.e., not approaching the lower bound of robustness). To solve this problem, this paper uses the proposed decouple space method to divide the classifier into two parts: non-linear and linear. Then, this paper defines the representation vector of the original example (and its space, i.e., the representation space) and uses the iterative optimization of Absolute Classification Boundaries Initialization (ACBI) to obtain a better attack starting point. Particularly, this paper applies ACBI to nearly 50 widely-used defense models (including 8 architectures). Experimental results show that ACBI achieves lower robust accuracy in all cases.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了各种防御模型来抵抗对抗性攻击算法，但现有的对抗性鲁棒性评估方法总是高估这些模型的对抗性鲁棒性（即未接近鲁棒性的下限）。为了解决这个问题，本文使用提出的解耦空间方法将分类器分为非线性和线性两部分。然后，本文定义了原始样本的表示向量（及其空间，即表示空间），并利用绝对分类边界初始化（ACBI）的迭代优化来获得更好的攻击起点。特别是，本文将ACBI应用于近50种广泛使用的防御模型（包括8种架构）。实验结果表明，ACBI 在所有情况下都实现了较低的鲁棒精度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决现有对抗鲁棒性评估方法高估防御模型的问题，提出解耦空间方法与ACBI优化策略以更准确评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击评估方法未能接近鲁棒性下界，导致防御模型的鲁棒性被高估，需更可靠的方法测试其真实防御能力。
AI.method: 通过解耦空间方法将分类器分为非线性与线性部分，定义原始样本的表示空间，并采用ACBI迭代优化获取更优攻击起点。
AI.result: ACBI在近50种主流防御模型（含8种架构）上均实现更低的鲁棒准确率，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ACBI方法可更精确评估防御模型的真实鲁棒性，揭示现有评估体系的不足，为对抗攻击研究提供新方向。

search_text: Rethinking Classifier and Adversarial Attack 重新思考分类器和对抗性攻击 Various defense models have been proposed to resist adversarial attack algorithms, but existing adversarial robustness evaluation methods always overestimate the adversarial robustness of these models (i.e., not approaching the lower bound of robustness). To solve this problem, this paper uses the proposed decouple space method to divide the classifier into two parts: non-linear and linear. Then, this paper defines the representation vector of the original example (and its space, i.e., the representation space) and uses the iterative optimization of Absolute Classification Boundaries Initialization (ACBI) to obtain a better attack starting point. Particularly, this paper applies ACBI to nearly 50 widely-used defense models (including 8 architectures). Experimental results show that ACBI achieves lower robust accuracy in all cases. 人们提出了各种防御模型来抵抗对抗性攻击算法，但现有的对抗性鲁棒性评估方法总是高估这些模型的对抗性鲁棒性（即未接近鲁棒性的下限）。为了解决这个问题，本文使用提出的解耦空间方法将分类器分为非线性和线性两部分。然后，本文定义了原始样本的表示向量（及其空间，即表示空间），并利用绝对分类边界初始化（ACBI）的迭代优化来获得更好的攻击起点。特别是，本文将ACBI应用于近50种广泛使用的防御模型（包括8种架构）。实验结果表明，ACBI 在所有情况下都实现了较低的鲁棒精度。 本文旨在解决现有对抗鲁棒性评估方法高估防御模型的问题，提出解耦空间方法与ACBI优化策略以更准确评估模型鲁棒性。 Youhuan Yang,Lei Sun,Leyu Dai,Song Guo,Xiuqing Mao,Xiaoqin Wang,Bayi Xu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Youhuan Yang,Lei Sun,Leyu Dai,Song Guo,Xiuqing Mao,Xiaoqin Wang,Bayi Xu
title: CE-based white-box adversarial attacks will not work using super-fitting
title_zh: 基于 CE 的白盒对抗攻击无法使用超拟合
abstract: Deep neural networks are widely used in various fields because of their powerful performance. However, recent studies have shown that deep learning models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, i.e., adding a slight perturbation to the input will make the model obtain wrong results. This is especially dangerous for some systems with high-security requirements, so this paper proposes a new defense method by using the model super-fitting state to improve the model's adversarial robustness (i.e., the accuracy under adversarial attacks). This paper mathematically proves the effectiveness of super-fitting and enables the model to reach this state quickly by minimizing unrelated category scores (MUCS). Theoretically, super-fitting can resist any existing (even future) CE-based white-box adversarial attacks. In addition, this paper uses a variety of powerful attack algorithms to evaluate the adversarial robustness of super-fitting, and the proposed method is compared with nearly 50 defense models from recent conferences. The experimental results show that the super-fitting method in this paper can make the trained model obtain the highest adversarial robustness.
summary: Deep neural networks are widely used in various fields because of their powerful performance. However, recent studies have shown that deep learning models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, i.e., adding a slight perturbation to the input will make the model obtain wrong results. This is especially dangerous for some systems with high-security requirements, so this paper proposes a new defense method by using the model super-fitting state to improve the model's adversarial robustness (i.e., the accuracy under adversarial attacks). This paper mathematically proves the effectiveness of super-fitting and enables the model to reach this state quickly by minimizing unrelated category scores (MUCS). Theoretically, super-fitting can resist any existing (even future) CE-based white-box adversarial attacks. In addition, this paper uses a variety of powerful attack algorithms to evaluate the adversarial robustness of super-fitting, and the proposed method is compared with nearly 50 defense models from recent conferences. The experimental results show that the super-fitting method in this paper can make the trained model obtain the highest adversarial robustness.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络因其强大的性能而被广泛应用于各个领域。然而，最近的研究表明深度学习模型很容易受到对抗性攻击，即对输入添加轻微的扰动就会使模型获得错误的结果。这对于一些安全性要求较高的系统来说尤其危险，因此本文提出了一种新的防御方法，利用模型超拟合状态来提高模型的对抗鲁棒性（即对抗攻击下的准确性）。本文从数学上证明了超拟合的有效性，并通过最小化不相关类别分数（MUCS）使模型能够快速达到这种状态。理论上，超拟合可以抵抗任何现有（甚至未来）基于CE的白盒对抗攻击。此外，本文使用多种强大的攻击算法来评估超拟合的对抗鲁棒性，并将所提出的方法与最近会议的近50个防御模型进行了比较。实验结果表明，本文的超拟合方法可以使训练后的模型获得最高的对抗鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超拟合状态的新防御方法，以提高深度神经网络对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型易受对抗攻击影响，现有防御方法存在局限性，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过数学证明超拟合的有效性，并利用最小化无关类别得分（MUCS）快速使模型进入超拟合状态。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法使模型在对抗攻击下的准确率达到最高，且能抵御现有及未来可能的基于交叉熵的白盒攻击。
AI.conclusion: 超拟合状态能有效增强模型对抗CE-based白盒攻击的鲁棒性，且优于近期近50种防御模型。

authors_text: Marc Mitjans,David M. Levine,Louis N. Awad,Roberto Tron
title: Koopman pose predictions for temporally consistent human walking estimations
title_zh: 库普曼提出了时间一致的人类步行估计的预测
abstract: We tackle the problem of tracking the human lower body as an initial step toward an automatic motion assessment system for clinical mobility evaluation, using a multimodal system that combines Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) data, RGB images, and point cloud depth measurements. This system applies the factor graph representation to an optimization problem that provides 3-D skeleton joint estimations. In this paper, we focus on improving the temporal consistency of the estimated human trajectories to greatly extend the range of operability of the depth sensor. More specifically, we introduce a new factor graph factor based on Koopman theory that embeds the nonlinear dynamics of several lower-limb movement activities. This factor performs a two-step process: first, a custom activity recognition module based on spatial temporal graph convolutional networks recognizes the walking activity; then, a Koopman pose prediction of the subsequent skeleton is used as an a priori estimation to drive the optimization problem toward more consistent results. We tested the performance of this module on datasets composed of multiple clinical lowerlimb mobility tests, and we show that our approach reduces outliers on the skeleton form by almost 1 m, while preserving natural walking trajectories at depths up to more than 10 m.
summary: We tackle the problem of tracking the human lower body as an initial step toward an automatic motion assessment system for clinical mobility evaluation, using a multimodal system that combines Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) data, RGB images, and point cloud depth measurements. This system applies the factor graph representation to an optimization problem that provides 3-D skeleton joint estimations. In this paper, we focus on improving the temporal consistency of the estimated human trajectories to greatly extend the range of operability of the depth sensor. More specifically, we introduce a new factor graph factor based on Koopman theory that embeds the nonlinear dynamics of several lower-limb movement activities. This factor performs a two-step process: first, a custom activity recognition module based on spatial temporal graph convolutional networks recognizes the walking activity; then, a Koopman pose prediction of the subsequent skeleton is used as an a priori estimation to drive the optimization problem toward more consistent results. We tested the performance of this module on datasets composed of multiple clinical lowerlimb mobility tests, and we show that our approach reduces outliers on the skeleton form by almost 1 m, while preserving natural walking trajectories at depths up to more than 10 m.
abstract_zh: 我们使用结合了惯性测量单元 (IMU) 数据、RGB 图像和点云深度测量的多模态系统，解决跟踪人体下半身的问题，作为临床移动性评估自动运动评估系统的第一步。该系统将因子图表示应用于提供 3D 骨架联合估计的优化问题。在本文中，我们致力于提高估计的人体轨迹的时间一致性，以大大扩展深度传感器的可操作范围。更具体地说，我们引入了一种基于库普曼理论的新因子图因子，该因子嵌入了几种下肢运动活动的非线性动力学。该因子执行两步过程：首先，基于时空图卷积网络的自定义活动识别模块识别步行活动；然后，将后续骨架的库普曼姿态预测用作先验估计，以推动优化问题获得更一致的结果。我们在由多个临床下肢活动测试组成的数据集上测试了该模块的性能，结果表明我们的方法将骨骼形态上的异常值减少了近 1 m，同时在深度超过 10 m 时保留了自然行走轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Koopman理论的因子图方法，通过多模态数据融合提升人体行走轨迹的时间一致性，用于临床运动评估系统。
AI.motivation: 现有深度传感器在远距离或复杂环境下易产生骨骼轨迹异常值，需提升估计鲁棒性以扩展临床应用范围。
AI.method: 融合IMU、RGB和深度数据构建因子图，引入Koopman理论因子：1）通过时空图卷积网络识别行走活动；2）利用Koopman模型预测后续骨骼姿态作为优化先验。
AI.result: 在临床数据集测试中，骨骼异常值减少近1米，保持10米以上深度的自然行走轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动力学建模与优化结合，显著提升远距离人体运动估计的准确性和鲁棒性，适用于临床移动性评估。

We tested the performance of this module on datasets composed of multiple clinical lowerlimb mobility tests, and we show that our approach reduces outliers on the skeleton form by almost 1 m, while preserving natural walking trajectories at depths up to more than 10 m. 我们使用结合了惯性测量单元 (IMU) 数据、RGB 图像和点云深度测量的多模态系统，解决跟踪人体下半身的问题，作为临床移动性评估自动运动评估系统的第一步。该系统将因子图表示应用于提供 3D 骨架联合估计的优化问题。在本文中，我们致力于提高估计的人体轨迹的时间一致性，以大大扩展深度传感器的可操作范围。更具体地说，我们引入了一种基于库普曼理论的新因子图因子，该因子嵌入了几种下肢运动活动的非线性动力学。该因子执行两步过程：首先，基于时空图卷积网络的自定义活动识别模块识别步行活动；然后，将后续骨架的库普曼姿态预测用作先验估计，以推动优化问题获得更一致的结果。我们在由多个临床下肢活动测试组成的数据集上测试了该模块的性能，结果表明我们的方法将骨骼形态上的异常值减少了近 1 m，同时在深度超过 10 m 时保留了自然行走轨迹。 本文提出基于Koopman理论的因子图方法，通过多模态数据融合提升人体行走轨迹的时间一致性，用于临床运动评估系统。 Marc Mitjans,David M. Levine,Louis N. Awad,Roberto Tron cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Yujia Wang,Lu Lin,Jinghui Chen
title: Communication-Efficient Adaptive Federated Learning
title_zh: 高效沟通的自适应联邦学习
comment: Updated version. A previous version is accepted by ICML 2022 (37 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables)
comments: Updated version. A previous version is accepted by ICML 2022 (37 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables)
abstract: Federated learning is a machine learning training paradigm that enables clients to jointly train models without sharing their own localized data. However, the implementation of federated learning in practice still faces numerous challenges, such as the large communication overhead due to the repetitive server-client synchronization and the lack of adaptivity by SGD-based model updates. Despite that various methods have been proposed for reducing the communication cost by gradient compression or quantization, and the federated versions of adaptive optimizers such as FedAdam are proposed to add more adaptivity, the current federated learning framework still cannot solve the aforementioned challenges all at once. In this paper, we propose a novel communication-efficient adaptive federated learning method (FedCAMS) with theoretical convergence guarantees. We show that in the nonconvex stochastic optimization setting, our proposed FedCAMS achieves the same convergence rate of $O(\frac{1}{\sqrt{TKm}})$ as its non-compressed counterparts. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks verify our theoretical analysis.
summary: Federated learning is a machine learning training paradigm that enables clients to jointly train models without sharing their own localized data. However, the implementation of federated learning in practice still faces numerous challenges, such as the large communication overhead due to the repetitive server-client synchronization and the lack of adaptivity by SGD-based model updates. Despite that various methods have been proposed for reducing the communication cost by gradient compression or quantization, and the federated versions of adaptive optimizers such as FedAdam are proposed to add more adaptivity, the current federated learning framework still cannot solve the aforementioned challenges all at once. In this paper, we propose a novel communication-efficient adaptive federated learning method (FedCAMS) with theoretical convergence guarantees. We show that in the nonconvex stochastic optimization setting, our proposed FedCAMS achieves the same convergence rate of $O(\frac{1}{\sqrt{TKm}})$ as its non-compressed counterparts. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks verify our theoretical analysis.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种机器学习训练范例，使客户能够联合训练模型，而无需共享自己的本地数据。然而，联邦学习在实践中的实施仍然面临着许多挑战，例如由于重复的服务器-客户端同步而导致的巨大通信开销以及基于SGD的模型更新缺乏适应性。尽管已经提出了各种通过梯度压缩或量化来降低通信成本的方法，并且提出了联邦版本的自适应优化器（例如FedAdam）来增加更多的适应性，但当前的联邦学习框架仍然无法一次性解决上述挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有理论收敛保证的新型通信高效自适应联邦学习方法（FedCAMS）。我们表明，在非凸随机优化设置中，我们提出的 FedCAMS 实现了与其非压缩对应物相同的收敛速度 $O(\frac{1}{\sqrt{TKm}})$。对各种基准的大量实验验证了我们的理论分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FedCAMS的通信高效自适应联邦学习方法，旨在解决联邦学习中的通信开销大和模型更新缺乏自适应性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习框架在减少通信成本（如梯度压缩）和引入自适应优化器（如FedAdam）方面存在局限，无法同时有效解决通信效率与模型自适应性问题。
AI.method: 设计FedCAMS方法，结合通信压缩技术与自适应优化机制，在非凸随机优化场景下提供理论收敛性保证。
AI.result: 实验验证FedCAMS在多个基准数据集上达到与非压缩方法相同的收敛速率$O(1/\\sqrt{TKm})$，理论分析成立。
AI.conclusion: FedCAMS通过兼顾通信效率与自适应优化，为联邦学习提供了兼顾性能与实用性的新解决方案。

authors_text: Min Yang,Guo Chen,Yin-Dong Zheng,Tong Lu,Limin Wang
title: BasicTAD: an Astounding RGB-Only Baseline for Temporal Action Detection
title_zh: BasicTAD：用于时间动作检测的令人惊叹的纯 RGB 基线
abstract: Temporal action detection (TAD) is extensively studied in the video understanding community by generally following the object detection pipeline in images. However, complex designs are not uncommon in TAD, such as two-stream feature extraction, multi-stage training, complex temporal modeling, and global context fusion. In this paper, we do not aim to introduce any novel technique for TAD. Instead, we study a simple, straightforward, yet must-known baseline given the current status of complex design and low detection efficiency in TAD. In our simple baseline (termed BasicTAD), we decompose the TAD pipeline into several essential components: data sampling, backbone design, neck construction, and detection head. We extensively investigate the existing techniques in each component for this baseline, and more importantly, perform end-to-end training over the entire pipeline thanks to the simplicity of design. As a result, this simple BasicTAD yields an astounding and real-time RGB-Only baseline very close to the state-of-the-art methods with two-stream inputs. In addition, we further improve the BasicTAD by preserving more temporal and spatial information in network representation (termed as PlusTAD). Empirical results demonstrate that our PlusTAD is very efficient and significantly outperforms the previous methods on the datasets of THUMOS14 and FineAction. Meanwhile, we also perform in-depth visualization and error analysis on our proposed method and try to provide more insights on the TAD problem. Our approach can serve as a strong baseline for future TAD research. The code and model will be released at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/BasicTAD.
summary: Temporal action detection (TAD) is extensively studied in the video understanding community by generally following the object detection pipeline in images. However, complex designs are not uncommon in TAD, such as two-stream feature extraction, multi-stage training, complex temporal modeling, and global context fusion. In this paper, we do not aim to introduce any novel technique for TAD. Instead, we study a simple, straightforward, yet must-known baseline given the current status of complex design and low detection efficiency in TAD. In our simple baseline (termed BasicTAD), we decompose the TAD pipeline into several essential components: data sampling, backbone design, neck construction, and detection head. We extensively investigate the existing techniques in each component for this baseline, and more importantly, perform end-to-end training over the entire pipeline thanks to the simplicity of design. As a result, this simple BasicTAD yields an astounding and real-time RGB-Only baseline very close to the state-of-the-art methods with two-stream inputs. In addition, we further improve the BasicTAD by preserving more temporal and spatial information in network representation (termed as PlusTAD). Empirical results demonstrate that our PlusTAD is very efficient and significantly outperforms the previous methods on the datasets of THUMOS14 and FineAction. Meanwhile, we also perform in-depth visualization and error analysis on our proposed method and try to provide more insights on the TAD problem. Our approach can serve as a strong baseline for future TAD research. The code and model will be released at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/BasicTAD.
abstract_zh: 时间动作检测（TAD）在视频理解社区中得到了广泛的研究，通常遵循图像中的对象检测流程。然而，复杂的设计在 TAD 中并不少见，例如两流特征提取、多阶段训练、复杂时间建模和全局上下文融合。在本文中，我们的目的不是介绍任何 TAD 新技术。相反，鉴于 TAD 设计复杂且检测效率低下的现状，我们研究了一个简单、直接但必须已知的基线。在我们的简单基线（称为 BasicTAD）中，我们将 TAD 管道分解为几个基本组件：数据采样、主干设计、颈部结构和检测头。我们对该基线的每个组件中的现有技术进行了广泛的研究，更重要的是，由于设计的简单性，我们在整个管道上执行端到端的训练。因此，这个简单的 BasicTAD 产生了令人惊叹的实时 RGB-Only 基线，非常接近具有双流输入的最先进方法。此外，我们通过在网络表示中保留更多的时间和空间信息（称为 PlusTAD）来进一步改进 BasicTAD。实证结果表明，我们的 PlusTAD 非常高效，并且在 THUMOS14 和 FineAction 数据集上显着优于以前的方法。同时，我们还对我们提出的方法进行了深入的可视化和误差分析，并尝试对 TAD 问题提供更多见解。我们的方法可以作为未来 TAD 研究的有力基准。代码和模型将在https://github.com/MCG-NJU/BasicTAD发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RGB视频的简单高效时序动作检测基线方法BasicTAD，并通过保留时空信息的改进版本PlusTAD实现性能提升。
AI.motivation: 针对现有时序动作检测方法设计复杂、检测效率低的问题，提出简单且高效的基线方案以推动领域研究。
AI.method: 将TAD流程分解为数据采样、主干网络、颈部结构和检测头四个核心组件，采用现有技术组合并进行端到端训练，改进版PlusTAD通过保留更多时空信息优化表示。
AI.result: BasicTAD在仅使用RGB输入时达到接近双流方法的实时检测效果，PlusTAD在THUMOS14和FineAction数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为时序动作检测提供了高效且强效的基线方法，可作为未来研究的重要参考。

authors_text: Bangbang Yang,Yinda Zhang,Yijin Li,Zhaopeng Cui,Sean Fanello,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang
title: Neural Rendering in a Room: Amodal 3D Understanding and Free-Viewpoint Rendering for the Closed Scene Composed of Pre-Captured Objects
title_zh: 房间中的神经渲染：由预先捕获的对象组成的封闭场景的 Amodal 3D 理解和自由视点渲染
comment: Accepted to ACM ToG (SIGGRAPH 2022). Project Page: https://zju3dv.github.io/nr_in_a_room/
comments: Accepted to ACM ToG (SIGGRAPH 2022). Project Page: https://zju3dv.github.io/nr_in_a_room/
abstract: We, as human beings, can understand and picture a familiar scene from arbitrary viewpoints given a single image, whereas this is still a grand challenge for computers. We hereby present a novel solution to mimic such human perception capability based on a new paradigm of amodal 3D scene understanding with neural rendering for a closed scene. Specifically, we first learn the prior knowledge of the objects in a closed scene via an offline stage, which facilitates an online stage to understand the room with unseen furniture arrangement. During the online stage, given a panoramic image of the scene in different layouts, we utilize a holistic neural-rendering-based optimization framework to efficiently estimate the correct 3D scene layout and deliver realistic free-viewpoint rendering. In order to handle the domain gap between the offline and online stage, our method exploits compositional neural rendering techniques for data augmentation in the offline training. The experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that our two-stage design achieves robust 3D scene understanding and outperforms competing methods by a large margin, and we also show that our realistic free-viewpoint rendering enables various applications, including scene touring and editing. Code and data are available on the project webpage: https://zju3dv.github.io/nr_in_a_room/.
summary: We, as human beings, can understand and picture a familiar scene from arbitrary viewpoints given a single image, whereas this is still a grand challenge for computers. We hereby present a novel solution to mimic such human perception capability based on a new paradigm of amodal 3D scene understanding with neural rendering for a closed scene. Specifically, we first learn the prior knowledge of the objects in a closed scene via an offline stage, which facilitates an online stage to understand the room with unseen furniture arrangement. During the online stage, given a panoramic image of the scene in different layouts, we utilize a holistic neural-rendering-based optimization framework to efficiently estimate the correct 3D scene layout and deliver realistic free-viewpoint rendering. In order to handle the domain gap between the offline and online stage, our method exploits compositional neural rendering techniques for data augmentation in the offline training. The experiments on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that our two-stage design achieves robust 3D scene understanding and outperforms competing methods by a large margin, and we also show that our realistic free-viewpoint rendering enables various applications, including scene touring and editing. Code and data are available on the project webpage: https://zju3dv.github.io/nr_in_a_room/.
abstract_zh: 作为人类，我们可以从给定的单个图像的任意角度理解和描绘熟悉的场景，但这对计算机来说仍然是一个巨大的挑战。我们特此提出一种新颖的解决方案，基于非模态 3D 场景理解的新范式以及针对封闭场景的神经渲染来模拟这种人类感知能力。具体来说，我们首先通过离线阶段学习封闭场景中物体的先验知识，这有助于在线阶段了解有看不见的家具布置的房间。在在线阶段，给定不同布局的场景全景图像，我们利用基于神经渲染的整体优化框架来有效估计正确的 3D 场景布局并提供逼真的自由视点渲染。为了处理离线和在线阶段之间的域差距，我们的方法利用组合神经渲染技术在离线训练中进行数据增强。对合成数据集和真实数据集的实验表明，我们的两阶段设计实现了强大的 3D 场景理解，并且大幅优于竞争方法，而且我们还表明，我们的逼真的自由视点渲染支持各种应用，包括场景游览和编辑。代码和数据可在项目网页上获取：https://zju3dv.github.io/nr_in_a_room/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无模态3D场景理解与神经渲染的新方法，实现封闭场景中预捕获物体的自由视角渲染。
AI.motivation: 人类可从单视角图像推断场景全貌，但计算机在复杂封闭场景的3D重建与自由视角渲染仍面临挑战，需模仿人类感知能力。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：离线阶段学习场景物体先验知识并进行数据增强；在线阶段通过全景图像优化估计3D布局，结合组合神经渲染技术实现高质量渲染。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均优于现有方法，实现了鲁棒的3D场景理解与真实感自由视角渲染，支持场景游览与编辑等应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过离线-在线协同优化有效解决了封闭场景的3D理解难题，为虚拟现实与场景编辑提供了新思路。

authors_text: Peter Sörries,Judith Glaser,Claudia Müller-Birn,Thomas Ness,Carola Zwick
title: Coding IxD: Enabling Interdisciplinary Education by Sparking Reflection
title_zh: Coding IxD：通过激发反思实现跨学科教育
abstract: Educating students from diverse disciplinary backgrounds is challenging. In this article, we report on our interdisciplinary course coding interaction and design (Coding IxD), which is designed for computer science and design students alike. This course has been developed over several years by consciously deliberating on existing hurdles within the educational concept. First, we motivate the need for Coding IxD and introduce the teaching principles that helped shape the course's general structure. Our teaching principles materialize in four method-based phases derived from research through design. Each phase consists of several methods that emerged to be suitable in an interdisciplinary context. Then, based on two selected student projects, we exemplify how interdisciplinary teams can arrive at novel interactive prototypes. We conclude by reflecting on our teaching practice as essential for a meaningful learning experience.
summary: Educating students from diverse disciplinary backgrounds is challenging. In this article, we report on our interdisciplinary course coding interaction and design (Coding IxD), which is designed for computer science and design students alike. This course has been developed over several years by consciously deliberating on existing hurdles within the educational concept. First, we motivate the need for Coding IxD and introduce the teaching principles that helped shape the course's general structure. Our teaching principles materialize in four method-based phases derived from research through design. Each phase consists of several methods that emerged to be suitable in an interdisciplinary context. Then, based on two selected student projects, we exemplify how interdisciplinary teams can arrive at novel interactive prototypes. We conclude by reflecting on our teaching practice as essential for a meaningful learning experience.
abstract_zh: 教育来自不同学科背景的学生具有挑战性。在本文中，我们报告了我们的跨学科课程编码交互和设计（Coding IxD），该课程是为计算机科学和设计专业的学生设计的。本课程是通过有意识地思考教育理念中现有的障碍而开发的。首先，我们激发了对 Coding IxD 的需求，并介绍了有助于塑造课程总体结构的教学原则。我们的教学原则体现在从研究到设计的四个基于方法的阶段。每个阶段都包含几种适合跨学科背景的方法。然后，根据两个选定的学生项目，我们举例说明了跨学科团队如何得出新颖的交互式原型。最后，我们反思了我们的教学实践对于有意义的学习体验至关重要。

AI.tldr: 介绍跨学科课程Coding IxD的设计与实施，旨在通过反思促进不同学科学生的协作学习
AI.motivation: 现有跨学科教育存在障碍，需通过反思促进不同学科学生的协作与创新
AI.method: 采用基于研究设计的四个阶段方法，结合具体项目案例，促进跨学科团队合作与原型开发
AI.result: 通过两个学生项目案例，展示了跨学科团队在课程中成功开发出创新交互原型的过程
AI.conclusion: 跨学科教学实践是提升学生协作与创新能力的关键，反思过程有助于深化学习体验
