authors_text: Xin Chen,Qingtao Tang,Ke Hu,Yue Xu,Shihang Qiu,Jia Cheng,Jun Lei
title: Hybrid CNN Based Attention with Category Prior for User Image Behavior Modeling
title_zh: 基于混合 CNN 的注意力和类别先验，用于用户图像行为建模
abstract: User historical behaviors are proved useful for Click Through Rate (CTR) prediction in online advertising system. In Meituan, one of the largest e-commerce platform in China, an item is typically displayed with its image and whether a user clicks the item or not is usually influenced by its image, which implies that user's image behaviors are helpful for understanding user's visual preference and improving the accuracy of CTR prediction. Existing user image behavior models typically use a two-stage architecture, which extracts visual embeddings of images through off-the-shelf Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in the first stage, and then jointly trains a CTR model with those visual embeddings and non-visual features. We find that the two-stage architecture is sub-optimal for CTR prediction. Meanwhile, precisely labeled categories in online ad systems contain abundant visual prior information, which can enhance the modeling of user image behaviors. However, off-the-shelf CNNs without category prior may extract category unrelated features, limiting CNN's expression ability. To address the two issues, we propose a hybrid CNN based attention module, unifying user's image behaviors and category prior, for CTR prediction. Our approach achieves significant improvements in both online and offline experiments on a billion scale real serving dataset.
summary: User historical behaviors are proved useful for Click Through Rate (CTR) prediction in online advertising system. In Meituan, one of the largest e-commerce platform in China, an item is typically displayed with its image and whether a user clicks the item or not is usually influenced by its image, which implies that user's image behaviors are helpful for understanding user's visual preference and improving the accuracy of CTR prediction. Existing user image behavior models typically use a two-stage architecture, which extracts visual embeddings of images through off-the-shelf Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in the first stage, and then jointly trains a CTR model with those visual embeddings and non-visual features. We find that the two-stage architecture is sub-optimal for CTR prediction. Meanwhile, precisely labeled categories in online ad systems contain abundant visual prior information, which can enhance the modeling of user image behaviors. However, off-the-shelf CNNs without category prior may extract category unrelated features, limiting CNN's expression ability. To address the two issues, we propose a hybrid CNN based attention module, unifying user's image behaviors and category prior, for CTR prediction. Our approach achieves significant improvements in both online and offline experiments on a billion scale real serving dataset.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，用户历史行为对于在线广告系统中的点击率（CTR）预测很有用。在中国最大的电子商务平台之一的美团中，商品通常通过图像来展示，用户是否点击该商品通常受到其图像的影响，这意味着用户的图像行为有助于了解用户的视觉偏好并提高CTR预测的准确性。现有的用户图像行为模型通常采用两阶段架构，第一阶段通过现成的卷积神经网络（CNN）提取图像的视觉嵌入，然后使用这些视觉嵌入和非视觉特征联合训练 CTR 模型。我们发现两阶段架构对于点击率预测来说并不是最优的。同时，在线广告系统中精确标记的类别包含丰富的视觉先验信息，可以增强对用户图像行为的建模。然而，没有类别先验的现成 CNN 可能会提取与类别无关的特征，从而限制了 CNN 的表达能力。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种基于混合 CNN 的注意力模块，统一用户的图像行为和类别先验，用于 CTR 预测。我们的方法在十亿规模的真实服务数据集上的在线和离线实验中取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合类别先验信息的混合CNN注意力模块，用于用户图像行为建模以提升点击率预测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段模型在CTR预测中存在次优性，且未利用广告系统中丰富的类别先验信息，导致CNN提取的特征与类别相关性不足。
AI.method: 设计混合CNN注意力模块，统一用户图像行为特征与类别先验信息，增强视觉特征表达能力。
AI.result: 在美团百亿级真实数据集上，该方法在线下和线上实验均取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 融合类别先验的混合CNN注意力机制能有效提升用户图像行为建模效果，进而优化CTR预测性能。

ai_content.result: 在美团百亿级真实数据集上，该方法在线下和线上实验均取得显著性能提升。

search_text: Hybrid CNN Based Attention with Category Prior for User Image Behavior Modeling 基于混合 CNN 的注意力和类别先验，用于用户图像行为建模 User historical behaviors are proved useful for Click Through Rate (CTR) prediction in online advertising system. In Meituan, one of the largest e-commerce platform in China, an item is typically displayed with its image and whether a user clicks the item or not is usually influenced by its image, which implies that user's image behaviors are helpful for understanding user's visual preference and improving the accuracy of CTR prediction. Existing user image behavior models typically use a two-stage architecture, which extracts visual embeddings of images through off-the-shelf Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in the first stage, and then jointly trains a CTR model with those visual embeddings and non-visual features. We find that the two-stage architecture is sub-optimal for CTR prediction. Meanwhile, precisely labeled categories in online ad systems contain abundant visual prior information, which can enhance the modeling of user image behaviors. However, off-the-shelf CNNs without category prior may extract category unrelated features, limiting CNN's expression ability. To address the two issues, we propose a hybrid CNN based attention module, unifying user's image behaviors and category prior, for CTR prediction. Our approach achieves significant improvements in both online and offline experiments on a billion scale real serving dataset. 事实证明，用户历史行为对于在线广告系统中的点击率（CTR）预测很有用。在中国最大的电子商务平台之一的美团中，商品通常通过图像来展示，用户是否点击该商品通常受到其图像的影响，这意味着用户的图像行为有助于了解用户的视觉偏好并提高CTR预测的准确性。现有的用户图像行为模型通常采用两阶段架构，第一阶段通过现成的卷积神经网络（CNN）提取图像的视觉嵌入，然后使用这些视觉嵌入和非视觉特征联合训练 CTR 模型。我们发现两阶段架构对于点击率预测来说并不是最优的。同时，在线广告系统中精确标记的类别包含丰富的视觉先验信息，可以增强对用户图像行为的建模。然而，没有类别先验的现成 CNN 可能会提取与类别无关的特征，从而限制了 CNN 的表达能力。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种基于混合 CNN 的注意力模块，统一用户的图像行为和类别先验，用于 CTR 预测。我们的方法在十亿规模的真实服务数据集上的在线和离线实验中取得了显着的改进。 本文提出一种结合类别先验信息的混合CNN注意力模块，用于用户图像行为建模以提升点击率预测效果。 Xin Chen,Qingtao Tang,Ke Hu,Yue Xu,Shihang Qiu,Jia Cheng,Jun Lei cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Ibrahim Shaer,Abdallah Shami
title: Sound Event Classification in an Industrial Environment: Pipe Leakage Detection Use Case
title_zh: 工业环境中的声音事件分类：管道泄漏检测用例
comment: Accepted at the 18th International Wireless Communications and Mobile Computing Conference (IWCMC)
comments: Accepted at the 18th International Wireless Communications and Mobile Computing Conference (IWCMC)
abstract: In this work, a multi-stage Machine Learning (ML) pipeline is proposed for pipe leakage detection in an industrial environment. As opposed to other industrial and urban environments, the environment under study includes many interfering background noises, complicating the identification of leaks. Furthermore, the harsh environmental conditions limit the amount of data collected and impose the use of low-complexity algorithms. To address the environment's constraints, the developed ML pipeline applies multiple steps, each addressing the environment's challenges. The proposed ML pipeline first reduces the data dimensionality by feature selection techniques and then incorporates time correlations by extracting time-based features. The resultant features are fed to a Support Vector Machine (SVM) of low-complexity that generalizes well to a small amount of data. An extensive experimental procedure was carried out on two datasets, one with background industrial noise and one without, to evaluate the validity of the proposed pipeline. The SVM hyper-parameters and parameters specific to the pipeline steps were tuned as part of the experimental procedure. The best models obtained from the dataset with industrial noise and leaks were applied to datasets without noise and with and without leaks to test their generalizability. The results show that the model produces excellent results with 99\% accuracy and an F1-score of 0.93 and 0.9 for the respective datasets.
summary: In this work, a multi-stage Machine Learning (ML) pipeline is proposed for pipe leakage detection in an industrial environment. As opposed to other industrial and urban environments, the environment under study includes many interfering background noises, complicating the identification of leaks. Furthermore, the harsh environmental conditions limit the amount of data collected and impose the use of low-complexity algorithms. To address the environment's constraints, the developed ML pipeline applies multiple steps, each addressing the environment's challenges. The proposed ML pipeline first reduces the data dimensionality by feature selection techniques and then incorporates time correlations by extracting time-based features. The resultant features are fed to a Support Vector Machine (SVM) of low-complexity that generalizes well to a small amount of data. An extensive experimental procedure was carried out on two datasets, one with background industrial noise and one without, to evaluate the validity of the proposed pipeline. The SVM hyper-parameters and parameters specific to the pipeline steps were tuned as part of the experimental procedure. The best models obtained from the dataset with industrial noise and leaks were applied to datasets without noise and with and without leaks to test their generalizability. The results show that the model produces excellent results with 99\% accuracy and an F1-score of 0.93 and 0.9 for the respective datasets.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了一种多级机器学习（ML）管道，用于工业环境中的管道泄漏检测。与其他工业和城市环境不同，所研究的环境包含许多干扰背景噪音，使泄漏识别变得复杂。此外，恶劣的环境条件限制了收集的数据量，并强制使用低复杂度算法。为了解决环境的限制，开发的机器学习管道应用了多个步骤，每个步骤都解决了环境的挑战。所提出的机器学习管道首先通过特征选择技术降低数据维度，然后通过提取基于时间的特征来合并时间相关性。由此产生的特征被输入到低复杂度的支持向量机（SVM）中，可以很好地推广到少量数据。在两个数据集（一个具有背景工业噪声，另一个没有背景工业噪声）上进行了广泛的实验程序，以评估所提议管道的有效性。作为实验过程的一部分，对 SVM 超参数和特定于流程步骤的参数进行了调整。从具有工业噪声和泄漏的数据集中获得的最佳模型应用于无噪声、有泄漏和无泄漏的数据集，以测试其普遍性。结果表明，该模型产生了出色的结果，准确率达到 99%，各个数据集的 F1 分数分别为 0.93 和 0.9。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多阶段机器学习（ML）流水线，用于工业环境中管道泄漏检测的声事件分类。
AI.motivation: 工业环境中的管道泄漏检测面临背景噪声干扰、数据量有限及算法复杂度低等挑战，传统方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: 通过特征选择降低数据维度，提取时间相关特征，并采用低复杂度支持向量机（SVM）进行分类。在包含和不包含工业噪声的两个数据集上进行实验，并调整超参数以优化模型性能。
AI.result: 模型在含噪声数据集上达到99%的准确率，F1分数分别为0.93和0.9，展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效应对了工业环境的复杂性，验证了多阶段ML流水线在小样本和噪声条件下的可行性。

Furthermore, the harsh environmental conditions limit the amount of data collected and impose the use of low-complexity algorithms. To address the environment's constraints, the developed ML pipeline applies multiple steps, each addressing the environment's challenges. The best models obtained from the dataset with industrial noise and leaks were applied to datasets without noise and with and without leaks to test their generalizability. authors_text: Konstantin Kobs,Michael Steininger,Andrzej Dulny,Andreas Hotho
title: Do Different Deep Metric Learning Losses Lead to Similar Learned Features?
title_zh: 不同的深度度量学习损失是否会导致相似的学习特征？
abstract: Recent studies have shown that many deep metric learning loss functions perform very similarly under the same experimental conditions. One potential reason for this unexpected result is that all losses let the network focus on similar image regions or properties. In this paper, we investigate this by conducting a two-step analysis to extract and compare the learned visual features of the same model architecture trained with different loss functions: First, we compare the learned features on the pixel level by correlating saliency maps of the same input images. Second, we compare the clustering of embeddings for several image properties, e.g. object color or illumination. To provide independent control over these properties, photo-realistic 3D car renders similar to images in the Cars196 dataset are generated. In our analysis, we compare 14 pretrained models from a recent study and find that, even though all models perform similarly, different loss functions can guide the model to learn different features. We especially find differences between classification and ranking based losses. Our analysis also shows that some seemingly irrelevant properties can have significant influence on the resulting embedding. We encourage researchers from the deep metric learning community to use our methods to get insights into the features learned by their proposed methods.
summary: Recent studies have shown that many deep metric learning loss functions perform very similarly under the same experimental conditions. One potential reason for this unexpected result is that all losses let the network focus on similar image regions or properties. In this paper, we investigate this by conducting a two-step analysis to extract and compare the learned visual features of the same model architecture trained with different loss functions: First, we compare the learned features on the pixel level by correlating saliency maps of the same input images. Second, we compare the clustering of embeddings for several image properties, e.g. object color or illumination. To provide independent control over these properties, photo-realistic 3D car renders similar to images in the Cars196 dataset are generated. In our analysis, we compare 14 pretrained models from a recent study and find that, even though all models perform similarly, different loss functions can guide the model to learn different features. We especially find differences between classification and ranking based losses. Our analysis also shows that some seemingly irrelevant properties can have significant influence on the resulting embedding. We encourage researchers from the deep metric learning community to use our methods to get insights into the features learned by their proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，许多深度度量学习损失函数在相同的实验条件下表现非常相似。造成这一意外结果的一个潜在原因是所有损失都让网络专注于相似的图像区域或属性。在本文中，我们通过进行两步分析来提取和比较使用不同损失函数训练的相同模型架构的学习视觉特征来研究这一点：首先，我们通过关联相同输入图像的显着性图来比较像素级别的学习特征。其次，我们比较几个图像属性的嵌入聚类，例如物体颜色或照明。为了提供对这些属性的独立控制，生成了类似于 Cars196 数据集中的图像的逼真 3D 汽车渲染。在我们的分析中，我们比较了最近研究中的 14 个预训练模型，发现尽管所有模型的表现相似，但不同的损失函数可以指导模型学习不同的特征。我们特别发现基于分类和排名的损失之间的差异。我们的分析还表明，一些看似不相关的属性可能会对最终的嵌入产生重大影响。我们鼓励深度度量学习社区的研究人员使用我们的方法来深入了解他们提出的方法所学到的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文研究不同深度度量学习损失函数是否会导致相似的特征学习，通过分析特征和嵌入聚类来比较其差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管多种损失函数表现相似，但可能因关注相似图像属性而产生类似特征，需验证此假设并探索差异。
AI.method: 采用两步分析法：比较像素级激活图相关性及嵌入聚类，使用生成的3D汽车图像控制属性变量。
AI.result: 发现不同损失函数引导模型学习不同特征，分类与排序损失差异显著，部分无关属性对嵌入有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 鼓励研究者采用该方法深入分析其提出的度量学习方法所学特征，以提升模型理解。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究不同深度度量学习损失函数是否会导致相似的特征学习，通过分析特征和嵌入聚类来比较其差异。

We especially find differences between classification and ranking based losses. Our analysis also shows that some seemingly irrelevant properties can have significant influence on the resulting embedding. We encourage researchers from the deep metric learning community to use our methods to get insights into the features learned by their proposed methods. 最近的研究表明，许多深度度量学习损失函数在相同的实验条件下表现非常相似。造成这一意外结果的一个潜在原因是所有损失都让网络专注于相似的图像区域或属性。在本文中，我们通过进行两步分析来提取和比较使用不同损失函数训练的相同模型架构的学习视觉特征来研究这一点：首先，我们通过关联相同输入图像的显着性图来比较像素级别的学习特征。其次，我们比较几个图像属性的嵌入聚类，例如物体颜色或照明。为了提供对这些属性的独立控制，生成了类似于 Cars196 数据集中的图像的逼真 3D 汽车渲染。在我们的分析中，我们比较了最近研究中的 14 个预训练模型，发现尽管所有模型的表现相似，但不同的损失函数可以指导模型学习不同的特征。我们特别发现基于分类和排名的损失之间的差异。我们的分析还表明，一些看似不相关的属性可能会对最终的嵌入产生重大影响。我们鼓励深度度量学习社区的研究人员使用我们的方法来深入了解他们提出的方法所学到的特征。 本文研究不同深度度量学习损失函数是否会导致相似的特征学习，通过分析特征和嵌入聚类来比较其差异。 Konstantin Kobs,Michael Steininger,Andrzej Dulny,Andreas Hotho cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Martijn Bartelds,Martijn Wieling
title: Quantifying Language Variation Acoustically with Few Resources
title_zh: 用很少的资源从声学角度量化语言变化
abstract: Deep acoustic models represent linguistic information based on massive amounts of data. Unfortunately, for regional languages and dialects such resources are mostly not available. However, deep acoustic models might have learned linguistic information that transfers to low-resource languages. In this study, we evaluate whether this is the case through the task of distinguishing low-resource (Dutch) regional varieties. By extracting embeddings from the hidden layers of various wav2vec 2.0 models (including new models which are pre-trained and/or fine-tuned on Dutch) and using dynamic time warping, we compute pairwise pronunciation differences averaged over 10 words for over 100 individual dialects from four (regional) languages. We then cluster the resulting difference matrix in four groups and compare these to a gold standard, and a partitioning on the basis of comparing phonetic transcriptions. Our results show that acoustic models outperform the (traditional) transcription-based approach without requiring phonetic transcriptions, with the best performance achieved by the multilingual XLSR-53 model fine-tuned on Dutch. On the basis of only six seconds of speech, the resulting clustering closely matches the gold standard.
summary: Deep acoustic models represent linguistic information based on massive amounts of data. Unfortunately, for regional languages and dialects such resources are mostly not available. However, deep acoustic models might have learned linguistic information that transfers to low-resource languages. In this study, we evaluate whether this is the case through the task of distinguishing low-resource (Dutch) regional varieties. By extracting embeddings from the hidden layers of various wav2vec 2.0 models (including new models which are pre-trained and/or fine-tuned on Dutch) and using dynamic time warping, we compute pairwise pronunciation differences averaged over 10 words for over 100 individual dialects from four (regional) languages. We then cluster the resulting difference matrix in four groups and compare these to a gold standard, and a partitioning on the basis of comparing phonetic transcriptions. Our results show that acoustic models outperform the (traditional) transcription-based approach without requiring phonetic transcriptions, with the best performance achieved by the multilingual XLSR-53 model fine-tuned on Dutch. On the basis of only six seconds of speech, the resulting clustering closely matches the gold standard.
abstract_zh: 深度声学模型表示基于大量数据的语言信息。不幸的是，对于地方语言和方言来说，此类资源大多不可用。然而，深度声学模型可能已经学习了转移到低资源语言的语言信息。在本研究中，我们通过区分低资源（荷兰）区域品种的任务来评估情况是否如此。通过从各种 wav2vec 2.0 模型（包括在荷兰语上预训练和/或微调的新模型）的隐藏层中提取嵌入并使用动态时间扭曲，我们计算了四种（区域）语言的 100 多种方言的平均超过 10 个单词的成对发音差异。然后，我们将所得的差异矩阵分为四组，并将它们与黄金标准进行比较，并在比较语音转录的基础上进行划分。我们的结果表明，声学模型优于（传统）基于转录的方法，无需语音转录，其中在荷兰语上进行微调的多语言 XLSR-53 模型实现了最佳性能。基于仅六秒的语音，所得聚类与黄金标准非常接近。

AI.tldr: 评估深度声学模型在低资源语言方言区分中的有效性
AI.motivation: 传统方言区分方法依赖大量数据和音标转录，而低资源语言缺乏这些材料，需探索替代方案
AI.method: 使用wav2vec 2.0模型提取语音嵌入，结合动态时间规整计算发音差异，通过聚类分析方言分布
AI.result: 声学模型在无需音标转录情况下优于传统方法，微调后的XLSR-53模型仅需6秒语音即可匹配标准方言划分
AI.conclusion: 声学模型为低资源语言方言研究提供有效工具，证明跨语言迁移学习在语音分析中的可行性

authors_text: Xianda Guo,Zheng Zhu,Tian Yang,Beibei Lin,Junjie Huang,Jiankang Deng,Guan Huang,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: Gait Recognition in the Wild: A Large-scale Benchmark and NAS-based Baseline
title_zh: 野外步态识别：大规模基准和基于 NAS 的基线
abstract: Gait benchmarks empower the research community to train and evaluate high-performance gait recognition systems. Even though growing efforts have been devoted to cross-view recognition, academia is restricted by current existing databases captured in the controlled environment. In this paper, we contribute a new benchmark and strong baseline for Gait REcognition in the Wild (GREW). The GREW dataset is constructed from natural videos, which contain hundreds of cameras and thousands of hours of streams in open systems. With tremendous manual annotations, the GREW consists of 26K identities and 128K sequences with rich attributes for unconstrained gait recognition. Moreover, we add a distractor set of over 233K sequences, making it more suitable for real-world applications. Compared with prevailing predefined cross-view datasets, the GREW has diverse and practical view variations, as well as more naturally challenging factors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first large-scale dataset for gait recognition in the wild. Equipped with this benchmark, we dissect the unconstrained gait recognition problem, where representative appearance-based and model-based methods are explored. The proposed GREW benchmark proves to be essential for both training and evaluating gait recognizers in unconstrained scenarios. In addition, we propose the Single Path One-Shot neural architecture search with uniform sampling for Gait recognition, named SPOSGait, which is the first NAS-based gait recognition model. In experiments, SPOSGait achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CASIA-B, OU-MVLP, Gait3D, and GREW benchmarks, outperforming existing approaches by a large margin. The code will be released at https://github.com/XiandaGuo/SPOSGait.
summary: Gait benchmarks empower the research community to train and evaluate high-performance gait recognition systems. Even though growing efforts have been devoted to cross-view recognition, academia is restricted by current existing databases captured in the controlled environment. In this paper, we contribute a new benchmark and strong baseline for Gait REcognition in the Wild (GREW). The GREW dataset is constructed from natural videos, which contain hundreds of cameras and thousands of hours of streams in open systems. With tremendous manual annotations, the GREW consists of 26K identities and 128K sequences with rich attributes for unconstrained gait recognition. Moreover, we add a distractor set of over 233K sequences, making it more suitable for real-world applications. Compared with prevailing predefined cross-view datasets, the GREW has diverse and practical view variations, as well as more naturally challenging factors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first large-scale dataset for gait recognition in the wild. Equipped with this benchmark, we dissect the unconstrained gait recognition problem, where representative appearance-based and model-based methods are explored. The proposed GREW benchmark proves to be essential for both training and evaluating gait recognizers in unconstrained scenarios. In addition, we propose the Single Path One-Shot neural architecture search with uniform sampling for Gait recognition, named SPOSGait, which is the first NAS-based gait recognition model. In experiments, SPOSGait achieves state-of-the-art performance on the CASIA-B, OU-MVLP, Gait3D, and GREW benchmarks, outperforming existing approaches by a large margin. The code will be released at https://github.com/XiandaGuo/SPOSGait.
abstract_zh: 步态基准使研究界能够训练和评估高性能步态识别系统。尽管人们在跨视图识别方面做出了越来越多的努力，但学术界仍受到受控环境中捕获的现有数据库的限制。在本文中，我们为野外步态识别（GREW）提供了一个新的基准和强大的基线。 GREW 数据集是根据自然视频构建的，其中包含开放系统中的数百个摄像机和数千小时的流。凭借大量的手动注释，GREW 由 26K 身份和 128K 序列组成，具有丰富的属性，可实现无约束步态识别。此外，我们添加了超过 233K 序列的干扰集，使其更适合实际应用。与流行的预定义跨视图数据集相比，GREW 具有多样化且实用的视图变化，以及更自然的挑战性因素。据我们所知，这是第一个用于野外步态识别的大规模数据集。配备此基准，我们剖析了无约束步态识别问题，其中探索了代表性的基于外观和基于模型的方法。事实证明，拟议的 GREW 基准对于在不受约束的场景中训练和评估步态识别器至关重要。此外，我们提出了用于步态识别的均匀采样的单路径一次性神经架构搜索，称为SPOSGait，这是第一个基于NAS的步态识别模型。在实验中，SPOSGait 在 CASIA-B、OU-MVLP、Gait3D 和 GREW 基准上实现了最先进的性能，大大优于现有方法。代码将发布在https://github.com/XiandaGuo/SPOSGait。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模步态识别基准数据集GREW和首个基于神经架构搜索的步态识别模型SPOSGait，以解决真实场景下的步态识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有步态数据集多为受控环境采集，缺乏真实场景多样性与挑战性，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 构建包含26K身份、128K序列及233K干扰序列的GREW数据集，并设计基于单路径一次性神经网络架构搜索的SPOSGait模型。
AI.result: SPOSGait在CASIA-B、OU-MVLP、Gait3D和GREW基准测试中均达到SOTA性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: GREW基准与SPOSGait模型为真实场景步态识别研究提供了关键支撑，推动了该领域的发展。

authors_text: Katrina Yezzi-Woodley,Jeff Calder,Mckenzie Sweno,Chloe Siewert,Peter J. Olver
title: The Batch Artifact Scanning Protocol: A new method using computed tomography (CT) to rapidly create three-dimensional models of objects from large collections en masse
title_zh: 批量工件扫描协议：一种使用计算机断层扫描 (CT) 从大量集合中快速创建物体三维模型的新方法
abstract: Within anthropology, the use of three-dimensional (3D) imaging has become increasingly common and widespread since it broadens the available avenues for addressing a wide range of key anthropological issues. The ease with which 3D models can be generated and shared has major impact on research, cultural heritage, education, science communication, and public engagement, as well as contributing to the preservation of the physical specimens and archiving collections in widely accessible data bases. Current scanning protocols have the ability to create the required research quality 3D models; however, they tend to be time and labor intensive and not practical when working with large collections. Here we describe a streamlined Batch Artifact Scanning Protocol to rapidly create 3D models using a medical CT scanner. While this method can be used on a variety of material types, we have, for specificity, applied our protocol to a large collection of experimentally broken ungulate limb bones. By employing the Batch Artifact Scanning Protocol, we were able to efficiently create 3D models of 2,474 bone fragments at a rate of less than 4 minutes per specimen.
summary: Within anthropology, the use of three-dimensional (3D) imaging has become increasingly common and widespread since it broadens the available avenues for addressing a wide range of key anthropological issues. The ease with which 3D models can be generated and shared has major impact on research, cultural heritage, education, science communication, and public engagement, as well as contributing to the preservation of the physical specimens and archiving collections in widely accessible data bases. Current scanning protocols have the ability to create the required research quality 3D models; however, they tend to be time and labor intensive and not practical when working with large collections. Here we describe a streamlined Batch Artifact Scanning Protocol to rapidly create 3D models using a medical CT scanner. While this method can be used on a variety of material types, we have, for specificity, applied our protocol to a large collection of experimentally broken ungulate limb bones. By employing the Batch Artifact Scanning Protocol, we were able to efficiently create 3D models of 2,474 bone fragments at a rate of less than 4 minutes per specimen.
abstract_zh: 在人类学领域，三维 (3D) 成像的使用变得越来越普遍和广泛，因为它拓宽了解决各种关键人类学问题的可用途径。轻松生成和共享 3D 模型对研究、文化遗产、教育、科学传播和公众参与产生重大影响，并有助于在可广泛访问的数据库中保存物理标本和归档收藏。当前的扫描协议能够创建所需的研究质量 3D 模型；然而，它们往往是时间和劳动力密集型的，并且在处理大量藏品时并不实用。在这里，我们描述了一种简化的批量工件扫描协议，可使用医疗 CT 扫描仪快速创建 3D 模型。虽然这种方法可以用于各种材料类型，但为了特异性，我们将我们的协议应用于大量实验性破碎的有蹄类动物肢体骨骼。通过采用批量文物扫描协议，我们能够以每个样本不到 4 分钟的速度高效创建 2,474 个骨碎片的 3D 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种使用计算机断层扫描（CT）快速批量创建大量物体三维模型的新方法。
AI.motivation: 当前的扫描协议虽然能够生成高质量的三维模型，但耗时且劳动密集，难以处理大规模的藏品。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为'批量文物扫描协议'的方法，利用医学CT扫描仪对多种材料类型进行快速扫描，特别应用于实验性断裂的哺乳动物肢体骨骼。
AI.result: 通过该协议，研究人员成功高效地创建了2,474块骨碎片的三维模型，每件标本的扫描时间少于4分钟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模藏品的三维建模提供了一种高效、可行的解决方案，有助于研究、文化遗产保护和科学传播。

authors_text: Van-Cam Nguyen,Hong-Tuan-Dinh Le,Huu-Thuan Huynh
title: Hardware System Implementation for Human Detection using HOG and SVM Algorithm
title_zh: 使用 HOG 和 SVM 算法实现人体检测的硬件系统
abstract: Human detection is a popular issue and has been widely used in many applications. However, including complexities in computation, leading to the human detection system implemented hardly in real-time applications. This paper presents the architecture of hardware, a human detection system that was simulated in the ModelSim tool. As a co-processor, this system was built to off-load to Central Processor Unit (CPU) and speed up the computation timing. The 130x66 RGB pixels of static input image attracted features and classify by using the Histogram of Oriented Gradient (HOG) algorithm and Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm, respectively. As a result, the accuracy rate of this system reaches 84.35 percent. And the timing for detection decreases to 0.757 ms at 50MHz frequency (54 times faster when this system was implemented in software by using the Matlab tool).
summary: Human detection is a popular issue and has been widely used in many applications. However, including complexities in computation, leading to the human detection system implemented hardly in real-time applications. This paper presents the architecture of hardware, a human detection system that was simulated in the ModelSim tool. As a co-processor, this system was built to off-load to Central Processor Unit (CPU) and speed up the computation timing. The 130x66 RGB pixels of static input image attracted features and classify by using the Histogram of Oriented Gradient (HOG) algorithm and Support Vector Machine (SVM) algorithm, respectively. As a result, the accuracy rate of this system reaches 84.35 percent. And the timing for detection decreases to 0.757 ms at 50MHz frequency (54 times faster when this system was implemented in software by using the Matlab tool).
abstract_zh: 人体检测是一个流行的问题，并已广泛应用于许多应用中。然而，包括计算的复杂性，导致人体检测系统很难在实时应用中实现。本文介绍了硬件架构，即在 ModelSim 工具中模拟的人体检测系统。作为协处理器，该系统旨在将负载卸载到中央处理器单元 (CPU) 并加快计算速度。静态输入图像的130x66 RGB像素分别使用定向梯度直方图（HOG）算法和支持向量机（SVM）算法进行特征提取和分类。结果，该系统的准确率达到84.35%。在 50MHz 频率下，检测时间缩短至 0.757 ms（使用 Matlab 工具在软件中实现该系统时，检测时间加快了 54 倍）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于HOG和SVM算法的硬件系统实现方案，用于提升人体检测的实时性。
AI.motivation: 传统人体检测算法计算复杂度高，难以满足实时应用需求，需通过硬件加速优化性能。
AI.method: 设计基于ModelSim的硬件架构作为协处理器，采用HOG提取130x66 RGB图像特征，结合SVM分类器实现检测加速。
AI.result: 系统检测准确率达84.35%，在50MHz频率下检测耗时0.757ms，较Matlab软件实现提速54倍。
AI.conclusion: 硬件协处理器有效降低了计算延迟，验证了HOG-SVM算法在实时人体检测中的可行性。

authors_text: Yaron Gurovich,Sagie Benaim,Lior Wolf
title: On Disentangled and Locally Fair Representations
title_zh: 论解开和当地公平的代表
abstract: We study the problem of performing classification in a manner that is fair for sensitive groups, such as race and gender. This problem is tackled through the lens of disentangled and locally fair representations. We learn a locally fair representation, such that, under the learned representation, the neighborhood of each sample is balanced in terms of the sensitive attribute. For instance, when a decision is made to hire an individual, we ensure that the $K$ most similar hired individuals are racially balanced. Crucially, we ensure that similar individuals are found based on attributes not correlated to their race. To this end, we disentangle the embedding space into two representations. The first of which is correlated with the sensitive attribute while the second is not. We apply our local fairness objective only to the second, uncorrelated, representation. Through a set of experiments, we demonstrate the necessity of both disentangled and local fairness for obtaining fair and accurate representations. We evaluate our method on real-world settings such as predicting income and re-incarceration rate and demonstrate the advantage of our method.
summary: We study the problem of performing classification in a manner that is fair for sensitive groups, such as race and gender. This problem is tackled through the lens of disentangled and locally fair representations. We learn a locally fair representation, such that, under the learned representation, the neighborhood of each sample is balanced in terms of the sensitive attribute. For instance, when a decision is made to hire an individual, we ensure that the $K$ most similar hired individuals are racially balanced. Crucially, we ensure that similar individuals are found based on attributes not correlated to their race. To this end, we disentangle the embedding space into two representations. The first of which is correlated with the sensitive attribute while the second is not. We apply our local fairness objective only to the second, uncorrelated, representation. Through a set of experiments, we demonstrate the necessity of both disentangled and local fairness for obtaining fair and accurate representations. We evaluate our method on real-world settings such as predicting income and re-incarceration rate and demonstrate the advantage of our method.
abstract_zh: 我们研究以对种族和性别等敏感群体公平的方式进行分类的问题。这个问题是通过解开和局部公平的表征的视角来解决的。我们学习局部公平的表示，这样，在学习的表示下，每个样本的邻域在敏感属性方面是平衡的。例如，当决定雇用某人时，我们确保 $K$ 最相似的雇用人员在种族上是平衡的。至关重要的是，我们确保根据与种族无关的属性找到相似的个体。为此，我们将嵌入空间分解为两种表示形式。第一个与敏感属性相关，而第二个则不相关。我们仅将本地公平目标应用于第二个不相关的表示。通过一组实验，我们证明了分离公平和局部公平对于获得公平和准确表示的必要性。我们在现实环境中评估我们的方法，例如预测收入和再监禁率，并证明我们方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过解耦和局部公平表示进行公平分类，确保敏感群体（如种族、性别）在决策中的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法可能无法同时实现分类准确性与对敏感属性的公平性，尤其在局部决策（如雇佣、贷款）中需保证相似个体的群体平衡。
AI.method: 将嵌入空间解耦为两部分：一部分与敏感属性相关，另一部分不相关。仅对无相关性的部分应用局部公平约束，确保相似个体的敏感属性分布均衡。
AI.result: 在收入预测和再入狱率预测等实际场景中验证了方法的有效性，证明解耦与局部公平结合能提升公平性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦表示与局部公平约束的结合是实现公平且准确分类的关键，未来需进一步探索其在更多场景中的适用性。

search_text: On Disentangled and Locally Fair Representations 论解开和当地公平的代表 We study the problem of performing classification in a manner that is fair for sensitive groups, such as race and gender. This problem is tackled through the lens of disentangled and locally fair representations. We learn a locally fair representation, such that, under the learned representation, the neighborhood of each sample is balanced in terms of the sensitive attribute. For instance, when a decision is made to hire an individual, we ensure that the $K$ most similar hired individuals are racially balanced. Crucially, we ensure that similar individuals are found based on attributes not correlated to their race. To this end, we disentangle the embedding space into two representations. The first of which is correlated with the sensitive attribute while the second is not. We apply our local fairness objective only to the second, uncorrelated, representation. Through a set of experiments, we demonstrate the necessity of both disentangled and local fairness for obtaining fair and accurate representations. We evaluate our method on real-world settings such as predicting income and re-incarceration rate and demonstrate the advantage of our method. 我们研究以对种族和性别等敏感群体公平的方式进行分类的问题。这个问题是通过解开和局部公平的表征的视角来解决的。我们学习局部公平的表示，这样，在学习的表示下，每个样本的邻域在敏感属性方面是平衡的。例如，当决定雇用某人时，我们确保 $K$ 最相似的雇用人员在种族上是平衡的。至关重要的是，我们确保根据与种族无关的属性找到相似的个体。为此，我们将嵌入空间分解为两种表示形式。第一个与敏感属性相关，而第二个则不相关。我们仅将本地公平目标应用于第二个不相关的表示。通过一组实验，我们证明了分离公平和局部公平对于获得公平和准确表示的必要性。我们在现实环境中评估我们的方法，例如预测收入和再监禁率，并证明我们方法的优势。 本文研究如何通过解耦和局部公平表示进行公平分类，确保敏感群体（如种族、性别）在决策中的公平性。 Yaron Gurovich,Sagie Benaim,Lior Wolf cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jae Hee Lee,Matthias Kerzel,Kyra Ahrens,Cornelius Weber,Stefan Wermter
title: What is Right for Me is Not Yet Right for You: A Dataset for Grounding Relative Directions via Multi-Task Learning
title_zh: 适合我的东西还不适合你：通过多任务学习奠定相对方向的数据集
abstract: Understanding spatial relations is essential for intelligent agents to act and communicate in the physical world. Relative directions are spatial relations that describe the relative positions of target objects with regard to the intrinsic orientation of reference objects. Grounding relative directions is more difficult than grounding absolute directions because it not only requires a model to detect objects in the image and to identify spatial relation based on this information, but it also needs to recognize the orientation of objects and integrate this information into the reasoning process. We investigate the challenging problem of grounding relative directions with end-to-end neural networks. To this end, we provide GRiD-3D, a novel dataset that features relative directions and complements existing visual question answering (VQA) datasets, such as CLEVR, that involve only absolute directions. We also provide baselines for the dataset with two established end-to-end VQA models. Experimental evaluations show that answering questions on relative directions is feasible when questions in the dataset simulate the necessary subtasks for grounding relative directions. We discover that those subtasks are learned in an order that reflects the steps of an intuitive pipeline for processing relative directions.
summary: Understanding spatial relations is essential for intelligent agents to act and communicate in the physical world. Relative directions are spatial relations that describe the relative positions of target objects with regard to the intrinsic orientation of reference objects. Grounding relative directions is more difficult than grounding absolute directions because it not only requires a model to detect objects in the image and to identify spatial relation based on this information, but it also needs to recognize the orientation of objects and integrate this information into the reasoning process. We investigate the challenging problem of grounding relative directions with end-to-end neural networks. To this end, we provide GRiD-3D, a novel dataset that features relative directions and complements existing visual question answering (VQA) datasets, such as CLEVR, that involve only absolute directions. We also provide baselines for the dataset with two established end-to-end VQA models. Experimental evaluations show that answering questions on relative directions is feasible when questions in the dataset simulate the necessary subtasks for grounding relative directions. We discover that those subtasks are learned in an order that reflects the steps of an intuitive pipeline for processing relative directions.
abstract_zh: 理解空间关系对于智能体在物理世界中行动和交流至关重要。相对方向是描述目标对象相对于参考对象的固有方向的相对位置的空间关系。确定相对方向比确定绝对方向更困难，因为它不仅需要模型来检测图像中的对象并基于此信息识别空间关系，而且还需要识别对象的方向并将此信息集成到推理过程中。我们研究了使用端到端神经网络来确定相对方向的挑战性问题。为此，我们提供了 GRiD-3D，这是一种新颖的数据集，其特征是相对方向，并补充了现有的视觉问答 (VQA) 数据集，例如仅涉及绝对方向的 CLEVR。我们还通过两个已建立的端到端 VQA 模型为数据集提供基线。实验评估表明，当数据集中的问题模拟基础相对方向所需的子任务时，回答相对方向的问题是可行的。我们发现这些子任务的学习顺序反映了处理相对方向的直观管道的步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRiD-3D数据集，通过多任务学习解决相对方向的 grounding 问题，并验证其可行性。
AI.motivation: 相对方向的 grounding 需要同时识别物体位置、方向及空间关系，但现有数据集（如CLEVR）仅支持绝对方向，缺乏对相对方向的系统研究。
AI.method: 构建包含相对方向标注的GRiD-3D数据集，结合端到端神经网络模型（如VQA基线模型），通过多任务学习模拟相对方向的子任务处理流程。
AI.result: 实验表明，当数据集包含必要子任务时，模型可有效回答相对方向问题，且子任务学习顺序符合直观处理流程。
AI.conclusion: GRiD-3D为相对方向 grounding 提供了有效数据支持，揭示了子任务学习顺序与人类直观处理逻辑的一致性，填补了现有VQA数据集的空白。

authors_text: Gavin Strunk
title: Greedy Clustering-Based Algorithm for Improving Multi-point Robotic Manipulation Sequencing
title_zh: 基于贪婪聚类的改进多点机器人操作排序的算法
abstract: The problem of optimizing a sequence of tasks for a robot, also known as multi-point manufacturing, is a well-studied problem. Many of these solutions use a variant of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) and seek to find the minimum distance or time solution. Optimal solution methods struggle to run in real-time and scale for larger problems. In online planning applications where the tasks being executed are fast, the computational time to optimize the ordering can dominate the total execution time. The optimal solution in this application is defined as the computational time for planning plus the execution time. Therefore, the algorithm presented here balances the quality of the solution with the total execution time by finding a locally optimal sequence. The algorithm is comprised of waypoint generation, spatial clustering, and waypoint optimization. Significant improvements in time reduction were seen and validated against a base case algorithm in simulation and on a real UR5 robot.
summary: The problem of optimizing a sequence of tasks for a robot, also known as multi-point manufacturing, is a well-studied problem. Many of these solutions use a variant of the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) and seek to find the minimum distance or time solution. Optimal solution methods struggle to run in real-time and scale for larger problems. In online planning applications where the tasks being executed are fast, the computational time to optimize the ordering can dominate the total execution time. The optimal solution in this application is defined as the computational time for planning plus the execution time. Therefore, the algorithm presented here balances the quality of the solution with the total execution time by finding a locally optimal sequence. The algorithm is comprised of waypoint generation, spatial clustering, and waypoint optimization. Significant improvements in time reduction were seen and validated against a base case algorithm in simulation and on a real UR5 robot.
abstract_zh: 优化机器人任务序列的问题（也称为多点制造）是一个经过充分研究的问题。其中许多解决方案都使用旅行商问题 (TSP) 的变体，并寻求找到最小距离或时间解决方案。最优解决方法很难实时运行并扩展以解决更大的问题。在任务执行速度很快的在线规划应用程序中，优化排序的计算时间可能会主导总执行时间。该应用程序中的最佳解决方案被定义为规划的计算时间加上执行时间。因此，这里提出的算法通过寻找局部最优序列来平衡解决方案的质量与总执行时间。该算法由航点生成、空间聚类和航点优化组成。根据模拟中的基本案例算法和真实的 UR5 机器人，可以看到并验证了时间减少的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贪心聚类算法的多点机器人操作序列优化方法，旨在减少计算时间并提高执行效率。
AI.motivation: 传统多点机器人任务序列优化方法（如TSP变体）在实时性和大规模问题上存在计算时间过长的缺陷，需在规划时间与执行质量间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 算法结合航路点生成、空间聚类和航路点优化三部分，通过局部最优策略实现快速序列规划。
AI.result: 仿真与实际UR5机器人测试显示，该算法在计算时间上较基准算法有显著改进，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过贪心聚类策略有效平衡了解的质量与总执行时间，适用于实时在线规划场景。

authors_text: Zied Bouraoui,Sebastien Konieczny,Thanh Ma,Nicolas Schwind,Ivan Varzinczak
title: Region-Based Merging of Open-Domain Terminological Knowledge
title_zh: 开放领域术语知识的基于区域的合并
comment: 13 pages, 19th International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, KR'22
comments: 13 pages, 19th International Conference on Principles of Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, KR'22
abstract: This paper introduces a novel method for merging open-domain terminological knowledge. It takes advantage of the Region Connection Calculus (RCC5), a formalism used to represent regions in a topological space and to reason about their set-theoretic relationships. To this end, we first propose a faithful translation of terminological knowledge provided by several and potentially conflicting sources into region spaces. The merging is then performed on these spaces, and the result is translated back into the underlying language of the input sources. Our approach allows us to benefit from the expressivity and the flexibility of RCC5 while dealing with conflicting knowledge in a principled way.
summary: This paper introduces a novel method for merging open-domain terminological knowledge. It takes advantage of the Region Connection Calculus (RCC5), a formalism used to represent regions in a topological space and to reason about their set-theoretic relationships. To this end, we first propose a faithful translation of terminological knowledge provided by several and potentially conflicting sources into region spaces. The merging is then performed on these spaces, and the result is translated back into the underlying language of the input sources. Our approach allows us to benefit from the expressivity and the flexibility of RCC5 while dealing with conflicting knowledge in a principled way.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种合并开放领域术语知识的新方法。它利用区域连接微积分 (RCC5)，这是一种用于表示拓扑空间中的区域并推理它们的集合论关系的形式主义。为此，我们首先提出将多个可能存在冲突的来源提供的术语知识忠实地翻译到区域空间中。然后对这些空间执行合并，并将结果翻译回输入源的底层语言。我们的方法使我们能够受益于 RCC5 的表现力和灵活性，同时以原则性的方式处理相互冲突的知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域连接演算（RCC5）的开放领域术语知识合并方法，通过将多源术语知识转化为区域空间进行合并处理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以系统处理开放领域中多源术语知识的冲突问题，需借助RCC5的表达性与灵活性实现原理化合并。
AI.method: 将多源术语知识翻译为区域空间表示，利用RCC5进行拓扑关系推理合并，再转换回原始语言表达。
AI.result: 验证了该方法能有效处理冲突知识，同时保留RCC5的表达能力与合并灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为开放领域术语知识合并提供了系统化解决方案，可处理多源冲突知识的原理化整合。

search_text: Region-Based Merging of Open-Domain Terminological Knowledge 开放领域术语知识的基于区域的合并 This paper introduces a novel method for merging open-domain terminological knowledge. It takes advantage of the Region Connection Calculus (RCC5), a formalism used to represent regions in a topological space and to reason about their set-theoretic relationships. To this end, we first propose a faithful translation of terminological knowledge provided by several and potentially conflicting sources into region spaces. The merging is then performed on these spaces, and the result is translated back into the underlying language of the input sources. Our approach allows us to benefit from the expressivity and the flexibility of RCC5 while dealing with conflicting knowledge in a principled way. 本文介绍了一种合并开放领域术语知识的新方法。它利用区域连接微积分 (RCC5)，这是一种用于表示拓扑空间中的区域并推理它们的集合论关系的形式主义。为此，我们首先提出将多个可能存在冲突的来源提供的术语知识忠实地翻译到区域空间中。然后对这些空间执行合并，并将结果翻译回输入源的底层语言。我们的方法使我们能够受益于 RCC5 的表现力和灵活性，同时以原则性的方式处理相互冲突的知识。 本文提出一种基于区域连接演算（RCC5）的开放领域术语知识合并方法，通过将多源术语知识转化为区域空间进行合并处理。 Zied Bouraoui,Sebastien Konieczny,Thanh Ma,Nicolas Schwind,Ivan Varzinczak cs.LO,cs.AI

authors_text: Tobias Schlagenhauf,Markus Netzer,Jan Hillinger
title: Text Detection on Technical Drawings for the Digitization of Brown-field Processes
title_zh: 用于棕地流程数字化的技术图纸文本检测
abstract: This paper addresses the issue of autonomously detecting text on technical drawings. The detection of text on technical drawings is a critical step towards autonomous production machines, especially for brown-field processes, where no closed CAD-CAM solutions are available yet. Automating the process of reading and detecting text on technical drawings reduces the effort for handling inefficient media interruptions due to paper-based processes, which are often todays quasi-standard in brown-field processes. However, there are no reliable methods available yet to solve the issue of automatically detecting text on technical drawings. The unreliable detection of the contents on technical drawings using classical detection and object character recognition (OCR) tools is mainly due to the limited number of technical drawings and the captcha-like structure of the contents. Text is often combined with unknown symbols and interruptions by lines. Additionally, due to intellectual property rights and technical know-how issues, there are no out-of-the box training datasets available in the literature to train such models. This paper combines a domain knowledge-based generator to generate realistic technical drawings with a state-of-the-art object detection model to solve the issue of detecting text on technical drawings. The generator yields artificial technical drawings in a large variety and can be considered as a data augmentation generator. These artificial drawings are used for training, while the model is tested on real data. The authors show that artificially generated data of technical drawings improve the detection quality with an increasing number of drawings.

Text is often combined with unknown symbols and interruptions by lines. Additionally, due to intellectual property rights and technical know-how issues, there are no out-of-the box training datasets available in the literature to train such models. This paper combines a domain knowledge-based generator to generate realistic technical drawings with a state-of-the-art object detection model to solve the issue of detecting text on technical drawings. The generator yields artificial technical drawings in a large variety and can be considered as a data augmentation generator. These artificial drawings are used for training, while the model is tested on real data. The authors show that artificially generated data of technical drawings improve the detection quality with an increasing number of drawings.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了技术图纸上自主检测文本的问题。技术图纸上的文本检测是迈向自主生产机器的关键一步，特别是对于尚无封闭 CAD-CAM 解决方案的棕地流程。自动化读取和检测技术图纸上的文本的过程减少了处理由于纸质流程而造成的低效媒体中断的工作量，而纸质流程通常是当今棕地流程的准标准。然而，目前还没有可靠的方法来解决自动检测技术图纸上文本的问题。使用经典检测和对象字符识别（OCR）工具对技术图纸内容进行不可靠的检测主要是由于技术图纸数量有限以及内容的类似验证码的结构。文本通常与未知符号和线条中断组合在一起。此外，由于知识产权和技术知识问题，文献中没有现成的训练数据集来训练此类模型。本文将基于领域知识的生成器与最先进的对象检测模型相结合，生成逼真的技术图纸，以解决技术图纸上的文本检测问题。该生成器生成各种各样的人工技术图纸，可以被视为数据增强生成器。这些人工绘图用于训练，而模型则在真实数据上进行测试。作者表明，随着图纸数量的增加，人工生成的技术图纸数据可以提高检测质量。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种自动检测技术图纸上文本的方法，以促进棕地流程的数字化。
AI.motivation: 当前棕地流程中依赖纸质文件导致效率低下，但缺乏可靠的技术图纸文本自动检测方法及训练数据集，亟需解决此问题以实现自动化生产。
AI.method: 结合基于领域知识的生成器生成逼真的技术图纸作为合成数据，并利用先进目标检测模型进行训练与测试。
AI.result: 合成数据量增加时，文本检测质量显著提升，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域知识生成的合成数据可有效提升技术图纸文本检测性能，为棕地流程数字化提供可行方案。

authors_text: Wojciech Nadara,Michał Pilipczuk,Marcin Smulewicz
title: Computing treedepth in polynomial space and linear fpt time
title_zh: 在多项式空间和线性 fpt 时间中计算树深度
abstract: The treedepth of a graph $G$ is the least possible depth of an elimination forest of $G$: a rooted forest on the same vertex set where every pair of vertices adjacent in $G$ is bound by the ancestor/descendant relation. We propose an algorithm that given a graph $G$ and an integer $d$, either finds an elimination forest of $G$ of depth at most $d$ or concludes that no such forest exists; thus the algorithm decides whether the treedepth of $G$ is at most $d$. The running time is $2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ and the space usage is polynomial in $n$. Further, by allowing randomization, the time and space complexities can be improved to $2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n$ and $d^{O(1)}\cdot n$, respectively. This improves upon the algorithm of Reidl et al. [ICALP 2014], which also has time complexity $2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n$, but uses exponential space.
summary: The treedepth of a graph $G$ is the least possible depth of an elimination forest of $G$: a rooted forest on the same vertex set where every pair of vertices adjacent in $G$ is bound by the ancestor/descendant relation. We propose an algorithm that given a graph $G$ and an integer $d$, either finds an elimination forest of $G$ of depth at most $d$ or concludes that no such forest exists; thus the algorithm decides whether the treedepth of $G$ is at most $d$. The running time is $2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ and the space usage is polynomial in $n$. Further, by allowing randomization, the time and space complexities can be improved to $2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n$ and $d^{O(1)}\cdot n$, respectively. This improves upon the algorithm of Reidl et al. [ICALP 2014], which also has time complexity $2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n$, but uses exponential space.
abstract_zh: 图 $G$ 的树深度是 $G$ 消除森林的最小可能深度：同一顶点集上的有根森林，其中 $G$ 中相邻的每对顶点都受到祖先/后代关系的约束。我们提出了一种算法，给定图 $G$ 和整数 $d$，要么找到深度最多为 $d$ 的 $G$ 消除森林，要么得出这样的森林不存在的结论；因此，算法决定$G$的树深度是否至多为$d$。运行时间为$2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n^{O(1)}$，空间使用量为$n$的多项式。此外，通过允许随机化，时间和空间复杂度可以分别提高到 $2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n$ 和 $d^{O(1)}\cdot n$。这改进了 Reidl 等人的算法。 [ICALP 2014]，时间复杂度也为 $2^{O(d^2)}\cdot n$，但使用指数空间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多项式空间和线性FPT时间内计算图的树深度的算法。
AI.motivation: 树深度是图论中的重要参数，但现有算法在空间复杂度上存在不足，需改进时间和空间效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种基于消除森林的算法，并通过随机化技术优化时间与空间复杂度。
AI.result: 算法时间复杂度为$2^{O(d^2)}\\cdot n$，空间复杂度为多项式级；随机化版本空间复杂度降至$d^{O(1)}\\cdot n$。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保持时间效率的同时显著降低了空间需求，优于之前的指数级空间方法。

authors_text: Yixuan Su,Tian Lan,Yahui Liu,Fangyu Liu,Dani Yogatama,Yan Wang,Lingpeng Kong,Nigel Collier
title: Language Models Can See: Plugging Visual Controls in Text Generation
title_zh: 语言模型可以看到：在文本生成中插入视觉控件
comment: 21 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables; (v2 adds some experimental details)
comments: 21 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables; (v2 adds some experimental details)
abstract: Generative language models (LMs) such as GPT-2/3 can be prompted to generate text with remarkable quality. While they are designed for text-prompted generation, it remains an open question how the generation process could be guided by modalities beyond text such as images. In this work, we propose a training-free framework, called MAGIC (iMAge-Guided text generatIon with CLIP), for plugging in visual controls in the generation process and enabling LMs to perform multimodal tasks (e.g., image captioning) in a zero-shot manner. MAGIC is a simple yet efficient plug-and-play framework, which directly combines an off-the-shelf LM (i.e., GPT-2) and an image-text matching model (i.e., CLIP) for image-grounded text generation. During decoding, MAGIC influences the generation of the LM by introducing a CLIP-induced score, called magic score, which regularizes the generated result to be semantically related to a given image while being coherent to the previously generated context. Notably, the proposed decoding scheme does not involve any gradient update operation, therefore being computationally efficient. On the challenging task of zero-shot image captioning, MAGIC outperforms the state-of-the-art method by notable margins with a nearly 27 times decoding speedup. MAGIC is a flexible framework and is theoretically compatible with any text generation tasks that incorporate image grounding. In the experiments, we showcase that it is also capable of performing visually grounded story generation given both an image and a text prompt.
summary: Generative language models (LMs) such as GPT-2/3 can be prompted to generate text with remarkable quality. While they are designed for text-prompted generation, it remains an open question how the generation process could be guided by modalities beyond text such as images. In this work, we propose a training-free framework, called MAGIC (iMAge-Guided text generatIon with CLIP), for plugging in visual controls in the generation process and enabling LMs to perform multimodal tasks (e.g., image captioning) in a zero-shot manner. MAGIC is a simple yet efficient plug-and-play framework, which directly combines an off-the-shelf LM (i.e., GPT-2) and an image-text matching model (i.e., CLIP) for image-grounded text generation. During decoding, MAGIC influences the generation of the LM by introducing a CLIP-induced score, called magic score, which regularizes the generated result to be semantically related to a given image while being coherent to the previously generated context. Notably, the proposed decoding scheme does not involve any gradient update operation, therefore being computationally efficient. On the challenging task of zero-shot image captioning, MAGIC outperforms the state-of-the-art method by notable margins with a nearly 27 times decoding speedup. MAGIC is a flexible framework and is theoretically compatible with any text generation tasks that incorporate image grounding. In the experiments, we showcase that it is also capable of performing visually grounded story generation given both an image and a text prompt.
abstract_zh: 可以提示 GPT-2/3 等生成语言模型 (LM) 生成质量卓越的文本。虽然它们是为文本提示生成而设计的，但如何通过文本之外的模式（例如图像）来指导生成过程仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个名为 MAGIC（使用 CLIP 的图像引导文本生成）的免训练框架，用于在生成过程中插入视觉控件，并使 LM 能够以零样本的方式执行多模态任务（例如图像字幕）。 MAGIC 是一个简单而高效的即插即用框架，它直接结合了现成的 LM（即 GPT-2）和图像文本匹配模型（即 CLIP）来生成基于图像的文本。在解码过程中，MAGIC 通过引入 CLIP 引发的分数（称为 magic 分数）来影响 LM 的生成，该分数将生成的结果正则化，使其在语义上与给定图像相关，同时与先前生成的上下文保持一致。值得注意的是，所提出的解码方案不涉及任何梯度更新操作，因此计算效率高。在零样本图像字幕这一具有挑战性的任务中，MAGIC 的解码速度提高了近 27 倍，明显优于最先进的方法。 MAGIC 是一个灵活的框架，理论上与任何包含图像基础的文本生成任务兼容。在实验中，我们展示了它还能够在给定图像和文本提示的情况下执行基于视觉的故事生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的框架MAGIC，通过结合CLIP模型和语言模型（如GPT-2），实现图像引导的文本生成，使语言模型能够执行零样本多模态任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管生成式语言模型在文本生成方面表现优异，但如何通过非文本模态（如图像）引导生成过程仍是一个开放问题。现有方法通常需要复杂训练或微调，限制了灵活性和效率。
AI.method: MAGIC框架直接结合现成的语言模型（GPT-2）和图像-文本匹配模型（CLIP），通过引入CLIP诱导的'magic score'在解码阶段调节生成结果，使其与给定图像语义相关且保持上下文连贯，无需梯度更新。
AI.result: 在零样本图像描述任务中，MAGIC相比最先进方法性能提升显著，解码速度提升近27倍，并成功扩展到视觉引导的故事生成等任务。
AI.conclusion: MAGIC提供了一种高效、灵活的解决方案，使语言模型能够通过视觉控制完成多模态任务，理论兼容任何需要图像 grounding 的文本生成场景。

authors_text: Marcel Wienöbst,Max Bannach,Maciej Liśkiewicz
title: Polynomial-Time Algorithms for Counting and Sampling Markov Equivalent DAGs with Applications
title_zh: 用于计数和采样马尔可夫等效 DAG 的多项式时间算法及其应用
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.09679
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2012.09679
abstract: Counting and sampling directed acyclic graphs from a Markov equivalence class are fundamental tasks in graphical causal analysis. In this paper we show that these tasks can be performed in polynomial time, solving a long-standing open problem in this area. Our algorithms are effective and easily implementable. As we show in experiments, these breakthroughs make thought-to-be-infeasible strategies in active learning of causal structures and causal effect identification with regard to a Markov equivalence class practically applicable.
summary: Counting and sampling directed acyclic graphs from a Markov equivalence class are fundamental tasks in graphical causal analysis. In this paper we show that these tasks can be performed in polynomial time, solving a long-standing open problem in this area. Our algorithms are effective and easily implementable. As we show in experiments, these breakthroughs make thought-to-be-infeasible strategies in active learning of causal structures and causal effect identification with regard to a Markov equivalence class practically applicable.
abstract_zh: 对马尔可夫等价类的有向无环图进行计数和采样是图形因果分析中的基本任务。在本文中，我们证明这些任务可以在多项式时间内执行，解决了该领域长期存在的开放问题。我们的算法有效且易于实施。正如我们在实验中所表明的，这些突破使得在马尔可夫等价类的因果结构主动学习和因果效应识别方面被认为不可行的策略变得实际可行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多项式时间算法用于计数和采样马尔可夫等价类中的有向无环图（DAG），并应用于因果结构学习领域。
AI.motivation: 马尔可夫等价类的DAG计数与采样是因果分析中的基础任务，但此前被认为计算不可行，限制了相关算法的实际应用。
AI.method: 设计并实现基于图论的多项式时间算法，通过有效遍历马尔可夫等价类的结构特性完成计数与采样。
AI.result: 实验验证算法效率，使基于马尔可夫等价类的因果结构主动学习和因果效应识别策略首次具备实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本工作解决了因果分析领域的核心计算难题，为后续因果推理方法提供了关键算法支持。

authors_text: Arthur Moreau,Thomas Gilles,Nathan Piasco,Dzmitry Tsishkou,Bogdan Stanciulescu,Arnaud de La Fortelle
title: ImPosing: Implicit Pose Encoding for Efficient Visual Localization
title_zh: ImPosing：用于高效视觉定位的隐式姿势编码
abstract: We propose a novel learning-based formulation for visual localization of vehicles that can operate in real-time in city-scale environments. Visual localization algorithms determine the position and orientation from which an image has been captured, using a set of geo-referenced images or a 3D scene representation. Our new localization paradigm, named Implicit Pose Encoding (ImPosing), embeds images and camera poses into a common latent representation with 2 separate neural networks, such that we can compute a similarity score for each image-pose pair. By evaluating candidates through the latent space in a hierarchical manner, the camera position and orientation are not directly regressed but incrementally refined. Very large environments force competitors to store gigabytes of map data, whereas our method is very compact independently of the reference database size. In this paper, we describe how to effectively optimize our learned modules, how to combine them to achieve real-time localization, and demonstrate results on diverse large scale scenarios that significantly outperform prior work in accuracy and computational efficiency.
summary: We propose a novel learning-based formulation for visual localization of vehicles that can operate in real-time in city-scale environments. Visual localization algorithms determine the position and orientation from which an image has been captured, using a set of geo-referenced images or a 3D scene representation. Our new localization paradigm, named Implicit Pose Encoding (ImPosing), embeds images and camera poses into a common latent representation with 2 separate neural networks, such that we can compute a similarity score for each image-pose pair. By evaluating candidates through the latent space in a hierarchical manner, the camera position and orientation are not directly regressed but incrementally refined. Very large environments force competitors to store gigabytes of map data, whereas our method is very compact independently of the reference database size. In this paper, we describe how to effectively optimize our learned modules, how to combine them to achieve real-time localization, and demonstrate results on diverse large scale scenarios that significantly outperform prior work in accuracy and computational efficiency.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的基于学习的车辆视觉定位方案，可以在城市规模的环境中实时运行。视觉定位算法使用一组地理参考图像或 3D 场景表示来确定捕获图像的位置和方向。我们的新定位范例名为隐式姿势编码（ImPosing），将图像和相机姿势嵌入到具有 2 个独立神经网络的公共潜在表示中，以便我们可以计算每个图像姿势对的相似度得分。通过以分层方式通过潜在空间评估候选者，相机位置和方向不是直接回归，而是增量细化。非常大的环境迫使竞争对手存储千兆字节的地图数据，而我们的方法非常紧凑，与参考数据库的大小无关。在本文中，我们描述了如何有效地优化我们的学习模块，如何将它们组合起来以实现实时定位，并在各种大规模场景中展示结果，这些结果在准确性和计算效率方面显着优于先前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ImPosing的隐式姿态编码方法，用于在城市规模环境中实现车辆的高效实时视觉定位。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位方法在处理大规模环境时需存储大量地图数据，且难以实现实时性，因此需要更高效且紧凑的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过两个独立神经网络将图像和相机姿态映射到共享的潜在空间，利用相似度分数分层评估候选姿态，逐步优化位置和方向而非直接回归。
AI.result: 在多种大规模场景中，该方法在定位精度和计算效率上均显著优于现有技术，且存储需求与参考数据库大小无关。
AI.conclusion: ImPosing方法在保持高定位精度的同时大幅降低存储开销，为大规模环境下的实时视觉定位提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: ImPosing方法在保持高定位精度的同时大幅降低存储开销，为大规模环境下的实时视觉定位提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为ImPosing的隐式姿态编码方法，用于在城市规模环境中实现车辆的高效实时视觉定位。
motivation: 现有视觉定位方法在处理大规模环境时需存储大量地图数据，且难以实现实时性，因此需要更高效且紧凑的解决方案。
method: 通过两个独立神经网络将图像和相机姿态映射到共享的潜在空间，利用相似度分数分层评估候选姿态，逐步优化位置和方向而非直接回归。
result: 在多种大规模场景中，该方法在定位精度和计算效率上均显著优于现有技术，且存储需求与参考数据库大小无关。
conclusion: ImPosing方法在保持高定位精度的同时大幅降低存储开销，为大规模环境下的实时视觉定位提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: ImPosing: Implicit Pose Encoding for Efficient Visual Localization ImPosing：用于高效视觉定位的隐式姿势编码 We propose a novel learning-based formulation for visual localization of vehicles that can operate in real-time in city-scale environments. Visual localization algorithms determine the position and orientation from which an image has been captured, using a set of geo-referenced images or a 3D scene representation. Our new localization paradigm, named Implicit Pose Encoding (ImPosing), embeds images and camera poses into a common latent representation with 2 separate neural networks, such that we can compute a similarity score for each image-pose pair. By evaluating candidates through the latent space in a hierarchical manner, the camera position and orientation are not directly regressed but incrementally refined. Very large environments force competitors to store gigabytes of map data, whereas our method is very compact independently of the reference database size. In this paper, we describe how to effectively optimize our learned modules, how to combine them to achieve real-time localization, and demonstrate results on diverse large scale scenarios that significantly outperform prior work in accuracy and computational efficiency. 我们提出了一种新颖的基于学习的车辆视觉定位方案，可以在城市规模的环境中实时运行。视觉定位算法使用一组地理参考图像或 3D 场景表示来确定捕获图像的位置和方向。我们的新定位范例名为隐式姿势编码（ImPosing），将图像和相机姿势嵌入到具有 2 个独立神经网络的公共潜在表示中，以便我们可以计算每个图像姿势对的相似度得分。通过以分层方式通过潜在空间评估候选者，相机位置和方向不是直接回归，而是增量细化。非常大的环境迫使竞争对手存储千兆字节的地图数据，而我们的方法非常紧凑，与参考数据库的大小无关。在本文中，我们描述了如何有效地优化我们的学习模块，如何将它们组合起来以实现实时定位，并在各种大规模场景中展示结果，这些结果在准确性和计算效率方面显着优于先前的工作。 本文提出一种名为ImPosing的隐式姿态编码方法，用于在城市规模环境中实现车辆的高效实时视觉定位。 Arthur Moreau,Thomas Gilles,Nathan Piasco,Dzmitry Tsishkou,Bogdan Stanciulescu,Arnaud de La Fortelle cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Peizhuo Li,Kfir Aberman,Zihan Zhang,Rana Hanocka,Olga Sorkine-Hornung
title: GANimator: Neural Motion Synthesis from a Single Sequence
title_zh: GANimator：单个序列的神经运动合成
abstract: We present GANimator, a generative model that learns to synthesize novel motions from a single, short motion sequence. GANimator generates motions that resemble the core elements of the original motion, while simultaneously synthesizing novel and diverse movements. Existing data-driven techniques for motion synthesis require a large motion dataset which contains the desired and specific skeletal structure. By contrast, GANimator only requires training on a single motion sequence, enabling novel motion synthesis for a variety of skeletal structures e.g., bipeds, quadropeds, hexapeds, and more. Our framework contains a series of generative and adversarial neural networks, each responsible for generating motions in a specific frame rate. The framework progressively learns to synthesize motion from random noise, enabling hierarchical control over the generated motion content across varying levels of detail. We show a number of applications, including crowd simulation, key-frame editing, style transfer, and interactive control, which all learn from a single input sequence. Code and data for this paper are at https://peizhuoli.github.io/ganimator.
summary: We present GANimator, a generative model that learns to synthesize novel motions from a single, short motion sequence. GANimator generates motions that resemble the core elements of the original motion, while simultaneously synthesizing novel and diverse movements. Existing data-driven techniques for motion synthesis require a large motion dataset which contains the desired and specific skeletal structure. By contrast, GANimator only requires training on a single motion sequence, enabling novel motion synthesis for a variety of skeletal structures e.g., bipeds, quadropeds, hexapeds, and more. Our framework contains a series of generative and adversarial neural networks, each responsible for generating motions in a specific frame rate. The framework progressively learns to synthesize motion from random noise, enabling hierarchical control over the generated motion content across varying levels of detail. We show a number of applications, including crowd simulation, key-frame editing, style transfer, and interactive control, which all learn from a single input sequence. Code and data for this paper are at https://peizhuoli.github.io/ganimator.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 GANimator，这是一种生成模型，可以学习从单个短运动序列合成新颖的运动。 GANimator 生成类似于原始动作核心元素的动作，同时合成新颖且多样化的动作。现有的运动合成数据驱动技术需要包含所需的特定骨骼结构的大型运动数据集。相比之下，GANimator 只需要对单个运动序列进行训练，即可为各种骨骼结构（例如两足动物、四足动物、六足动物等）进行新颖的运动合成。我们的框架包含一系列生成和对抗神经网络，每个神经网络负责以特定帧速率生成运动。该框架逐步学习从随机噪声中合成运动，从而能够跨不同细节级别对生成的运动内容进行分层控制。我们展示了许多应用程序，包括人群模拟、关键帧编辑、风格转换和交互控制，这些应用程序都从单个输入序列中学习。本文的代码和数据位于https://peizhuoli.github.io/ganimator。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GANimator模型，能够从单个短运动序列中生成符合原始运动核心特征且多样化的新型运动，适用于多种骨骼结构。
AI.motivation: 现有运动合成方法依赖大规模特定骨骼结构的数据集，难以灵活适配不同生物形态。本文旨在通过单序列训练实现跨骨骼结构的运动生成。
AI.method: 构建多阶段生成对抗网络框架，每个网络负责特定帧率的运动生成，通过分层噪声输入实现细节级别的运动内容控制。
AI.result: 成功应用于人群模拟、关键帧编辑、风格迁移等场景，代码与数据集已公开，验证了单序列训练在多骨骼结构中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GANimator突破了传统数据驱动方法的局限性，证明了基于生成对抗网络的单序列运动合成在跨形态应用中的可行性与扩展性。

authors_text: Fabian Oboril,Cornelius Buerkle,Alon Sussmann,Simcha Bitton,Simone Fabris
title: MTBF Model for AVs -- From Perception Errors to Vehicle-Level Failures
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的 MTBF 模型——从感知错误到车辆级故障
comment: to be published in the proceedings of the IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2022
comments: to be published in the proceedings of the IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium 2022
abstract: The development of Automated Vehicles (AVs) is progressing quickly and the first robotaxi services are being deployed worldwide. However, to receive authority certification for mass deployment, manufactures need to justify that their AVs operate safer than human drivers. This in turn creates the need to estimate and model the collision rate (failure rate) of an AV taking all possible errors and driving situations into account. In other words, there is the strong demand for comprehensive Mean Time Between Failure (MTBF) models for AVs. In this paper, we will introduce such a generic and scalable model that creates a link between errors in the perception system to vehicle-level failures (collisions). Using this model, we are able to derive requirements for the perception quality based on the desired vehicle-level MTBF or vice versa to obtain an MTBF value given a certain mission profile and perception quality.
summary: The development of Automated Vehicles (AVs) is progressing quickly and the first robotaxi services are being deployed worldwide. However, to receive authority certification for mass deployment, manufactures need to justify that their AVs operate safer than human drivers. This in turn creates the need to estimate and model the collision rate (failure rate) of an AV taking all possible errors and driving situations into account. In other words, there is the strong demand for comprehensive Mean Time Between Failure (MTBF) models for AVs. In this paper, we will introduce such a generic and scalable model that creates a link between errors in the perception system to vehicle-level failures (collisions). Using this model, we are able to derive requirements for the perception quality based on the desired vehicle-level MTBF or vice versa to obtain an MTBF value given a certain mission profile and perception quality.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的发展进展迅速，首个机器人出租车服务正在全球部署。然而，为了获得大规模部署的权威认证，制造商需要证明他们的自动驾驶汽车比人类驾驶员更安全。这反过来又需要对自动驾驶汽车的碰撞率（故障率）进行估计和建模，同时考虑所有可能的错误和驾驶情况。换句话说，自动驾驶汽车对全面的平均故障间隔时间 (MTBF) 模型有着强烈的需求。在本文中，我们将介绍这样一个通用且可扩展的模型，该模型在感知系统中的错误与车辆级故障（碰撞）之间建立联系。使用该模型，我们能够根据所需的车辆级 MTBF 推导出感知质量的要求，反之亦然，以获得给定特定任务概况和感知质量的 MTBF 值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种将自动驾驶汽车感知系统错误与车辆级故障（碰撞）关联的通用MTBF模型，用于评估AV安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶汽车需通过权威认证证明其安全性，但现有方法难以全面建模考虑所有误差和场景的碰撞率，亟需综合MTBF模型。
AI.method: 构建感知错误到车辆级故障的映射模型，通过任务配置和感知质量参数推导MTBF值或反推感知质量要求。
AI.result: 实现基于感知系统性能的MTBF量化分析，支持根据目标安全水平制定感知系统设计规范。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为自动驾驶汽车安全认证提供了可扩展的量化分析框架，促进其大规模部署。

authors_text: Fangfei Lin,Bing Bai,Kun Bai,Yazhou Ren,Peng Zhao,Zenglin Xu
title: Contrastive Multi-view Hyperbolic Hierarchical Clustering
title_zh: 对比多视图双曲层次聚类
comment: This work was accepted by IJCAI2022
comments: This work was accepted by IJCAI2022
abstract: Hierarchical clustering recursively partitions data at an increasingly finer granularity. In real-world applications, multi-view data have become increasingly important. This raises a less investigated problem, i.e., multi-view hierarchical clustering, to better understand the hierarchical structure of multi-view data. To this end, we propose a novel neural network-based model, namely Contrastive Multi-view Hyperbolic Hierarchical Clustering (CMHHC). It consists of three components, i.e., multi-view alignment learning, aligned feature similarity learning, and continuous hyperbolic hierarchical clustering. First, we align sample-level representations across multiple views in a contrastive way to capture the view-invariance information. Next, we utilize both the manifold and Euclidean similarities to improve the metric property. Then, we embed the representations into a hyperbolic space and optimize the hyperbolic embeddings via a continuous relaxation of hierarchical clustering loss. Finally, a binary clustering tree is decoded from optimized hyperbolic embeddings. Experimental results on five real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and its components.

This raises a less investigated problem, i.e., multi-view hierarchical clustering, to better understand the hierarchical structure of multi-view data. To this end, we propose a novel neural network-based model, namely Contrastive Multi-view Hyperbolic Hierarchical Clustering (CMHHC). It consists of three components, i.e., multi-view alignment learning, aligned feature similarity learning, and continuous hyperbolic hierarchical clustering. First, we align sample-level representations across multiple views in a contrastive way to capture the view-invariance information. Next, we utilize both the manifold and Euclidean similarities to improve the metric property. Then, we embed the representations into a hyperbolic space and optimize the hyperbolic embeddings via a continuous relaxation of hierarchical clustering loss. Finally, a binary clustering tree is decoded from optimized hyperbolic embeddings. Experimental results on five real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and its components.
abstract_zh: 层次聚类以越来越细的粒度递归地划分数据。在现实应用中，多视图数据变得越来越重要。这就提出了一个较少研究的问题，即多视图层次聚类，以更好地理解多视图数据的层次结构。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的基于神经网络的模型，即对比多视图双曲层次聚类（CMHHC）。它由三个部分组成，即多视图对齐学习、对齐特征相似性学习和连续双曲层次聚类。首先，我们以对比的方式跨多个视图对齐样本级表示，以捕获视图不变性信息。接下来，我们利用流形相似性和欧几里得相似性来改进度量属性。然后，我们将表示嵌入到双曲空间中，并通过层次聚类损失的连续松弛来优化双曲嵌入。最后，从优化的双曲嵌入解码二叉聚类树。五个真实世界数据集的实验结果证明了所提出的方法及其组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的多视角双曲层次聚类方法CMHHC，用于更好地理解多视角数据的层次结构。
AI.motivation: 现实应用中多视角数据日益重要，但多视角层次聚类问题研究不足，现有方法难以有效捕捉跨视角的层次结构信息。
AI.method: CMHHC包含三个组件：多视角对比对齐学习、对齐特征相似性学习和连续双曲层次聚类，通过对比学习对齐跨视角表示，结合流形与欧氏相似性优化度量，并在双曲空间中松弛层次聚类损失进行嵌入优化。
AI.result: 在五个真实数据集上的实验验证了该方法及其组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CMHHC通过双曲空间建模和对比学习有效提升了多视角层次聚类性能，各组件设计合理且具有实际效果。

authors_text: Gaurav Kumar Nayak,Ruchit Rawal,Rohit Lal,Himanshu Patil,Anirban Chakraborty
title: Holistic Approach to Measure Sample-level Adversarial Vulnerability and its Utility in Building Trustworthy Systems
title_zh: 衡量样本级对抗性漏洞的整体方法及其在构建可信系统中的效用
comment: Accepted in CVPR Workshop 2022 on Human-centered Intelligent Services: Safe and Trustworthy
comments: Accepted in CVPR Workshop 2022 on Human-centered Intelligent Services: Safe and Trustworthy
abstract: Adversarial attack perturbs an image with an imperceptible noise, leading to incorrect model prediction. Recently, a few works showed inherent bias associated with such attack (robustness bias), where certain subgroups in a dataset (e.g. based on class, gender, etc.) are less robust than others. This bias not only persists even after adversarial training, but often results in severe performance discrepancies across these subgroups. Existing works characterize the subgroup's robustness bias by only checking individual sample's proximity to the decision boundary. In this work, we argue that this measure alone is not sufficient and validate our argument via extensive experimental analysis. It has been observed that adversarial attacks often corrupt the high-frequency components of the input image. We, therefore, propose a holistic approach for quantifying adversarial vulnerability of a sample by combining these different perspectives, i.e., degree of model's reliance on high-frequency features and the (conventional) sample-distance to the decision boundary. We demonstrate that by reliably estimating adversarial vulnerability at the sample level using the proposed holistic metric, it is possible to develop a trustworthy system where humans can be alerted about the incoming samples that are highly likely to be misclassified at test time. This is achieved with better precision when our holistic metric is used over individual measures. To further corroborate the utility of the proposed holistic approach, we perform knowledge distillation in a limited-sample setting. We observe that the student network trained with the subset of samples selected using our combined metric performs better than both the competing baselines, viz., where samples are selected randomly or based on their distances to the decision boundary.
summary: Adversarial attack perturbs an image with an imperceptible noise, leading to incorrect model prediction. Recently, a few works showed inherent bias associated with such attack (robustness bias), where certain subgroups in a dataset (e.g. based on class, gender, etc.) are less robust than others. This bias not only persists even after adversarial training, but often results in severe performance discrepancies across these subgroups. Existing works characterize the subgroup's robustness bias by only checking individual sample's proximity to the decision boundary. In this work, we argue that this measure alone is not sufficient and validate our argument via extensive experimental analysis. It has been observed that adversarial attacks often corrupt the high-frequency components of the input image. We, therefore, propose a holistic approach for quantifying adversarial vulnerability of a sample by combining these different perspectives, i.e., degree of model's reliance on high-frequency features and the (conventional) sample-distance to the decision boundary. We demonstrate that by reliably estimating adversarial vulnerability at the sample level using the proposed holistic metric, it is possible to develop a trustworthy system where humans can be alerted about the incoming samples that are highly likely to be misclassified at test time. This is achieved with better precision when our holistic metric is used over individual measures. To further corroborate the utility of the proposed holistic approach, we perform knowledge distillation in a limited-sample setting. We observe that the student network trained with the subset of samples selected using our combined metric performs better than both the competing baselines, viz., where samples are selected randomly or based on their distances to the decision boundary.
abstract_zh: 对抗性攻击会用难以察觉的噪声扰乱图像，导致模型预测不正确。最近，一些研究显示了与此类攻击相关的固有偏差（稳健性偏差），其中数据集中的某些子组（例如基于类别、性别等）的稳健性低于其他子组。这种偏见不仅在对抗性训练后仍然存在，而且常常导致这些亚组之间的严重表现差异。现有的工作通过仅检查单个样本与决策边界的接近程度来表征子组的鲁棒性偏差。在这项工作中，我们认为仅靠这种措施是不够的，并通过广泛的实验分析验证了我们的论点。据观察，对抗性攻击通常会破坏输入图像的高频分量。因此，我们提出了一种通过结合这些不同观点（即模型对高频特征的依赖程度以及到决策边界的（传统）样本距离）来量化样本的对抗性脆弱性的整体方法。我们证明，通过使用所提出的整体指标可靠地估计样本级别的对抗性漏洞，可以开发一个值得信赖的系统，在该系统中，可以向人类发出有关在测试时极有可能被错误分类的传入样本的警报。当我们使用整体指标而不是单独的指标时，可以更精确地实现这一点。为了进一步证实所提出的整体方法的实用性，我们在有限样本设置中进行知识蒸馏。我们观察到，使用我们的组合指标选择的样本子集训练的学生网络比两个竞争基线（即随机选择样本或根据其与决策边界的距离选择样本）表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种综合方法，通过结合模型对高频特征的依赖程度和样本到决策边界的距离，量化样本级对抗脆弱性，以构建可信赖的系统。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅通过样本到决策边界的距离衡量鲁棒性偏差，无法全面反映对抗攻击的影响，尤其忽视高频特征被破坏的特性。
AI.method: 提出综合指标，结合样本的高频特征依赖度与传统决策边界距离，用于更准确评估对抗脆弱性，并应用于知识蒸馏中的样本选择。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于综合指标的预警系统在精度上优于单一指标；在有限样本设置下，学生网络性能优于随机选择或仅基于距离的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 综合方法能更可靠地识别高风险样本，提升系统可信赖性，并在知识蒸馏任务中展现优越性，为对抗鲁棒性研究提供新视角。

authors_text: Mauro Castelli,Luca Manzoni,Luca Mariot,Giuliamaria Menara,Gloria Pietropolli
title: The Effect of Multi-Generational Selection in Geometric Semantic Genetic Programming
title_zh: 几何语义遗传规划中多代选择的效果
comment: 19 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to Applied Sciences
comments: 19 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Submitted to Applied Sciences
abstract: Among the evolutionary methods, one that is quite prominent is Genetic Programming, and, in recent years, a variant called Geometric Semantic Genetic Programming (GSGP) has shown to be successfully applicable to many real-world problems. Due to a peculiarity in its implementation, GSGP needs to store all the evolutionary history, i.e., all populations from the first one. We exploit this stored information to define a multi-generational selection scheme that is able to use individuals from older populations. We show that a limited ability to use "old" generations is actually useful for the search process, thus showing a zero-cost way of improving the performances of GSGP.
summary: Among the evolutionary methods, one that is quite prominent is Genetic Programming, and, in recent years, a variant called Geometric Semantic Genetic Programming (GSGP) has shown to be successfully applicable to many real-world problems. Due to a peculiarity in its implementation, GSGP needs to store all the evolutionary history, i.e., all populations from the first one. We exploit this stored information to define a multi-generational selection scheme that is able to use individuals from older populations. We show that a limited ability to use "old" generations is actually useful for the search process, thus showing a zero-cost way of improving the performances of GSGP.
abstract_zh: 在进化方法中，相当突出的是遗传编程，近年来，一种称为几何语义遗传编程（GSGP）的变体已被证明可以成功地应用于许多现实世界的问题。由于其实现的特殊性，GSGP 需要存储所有进化历史，即从第一个种群开始的所有种群。我们利用这些存储的信息来定义一个多代选择方案，该方案能够使用来自老年人群的个体。我们证明，使用“旧”代的有限能力实际上对搜索过程有用，从而展示了一种提高 GSGP 性能的零成本方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多代选择方案，通过利用几何语义遗传编程（GSGP）中存储的历史种群信息来提升算法性能。
AI.motivation: GSGP在进化过程中需要存储所有历史种群，但传统方法未有效利用这些数据。作者认为利用历史种群可能有助于改进搜索过程。
AI.method: 设计了一种多代选择机制，允许在当前种群中引入来自早期世代的个体，无需额外计算成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，有限地使用历史种群信息能有效提升GSGP的搜索效率和解的质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过零成本利用历史进化数据，为GSGP提供了一种简单有效的性能改进方案。
