search_text: The Effect of Multi-Generational Selection in Geometric Semantic Genetic Programming 几何语义遗传规划中多代选择的效果 Among the evolutionary methods, one that is quite prominent is Genetic Programming, and, in recent years, a variant called Geometric Semantic Genetic Programming (GSGP) has shown to be successfully applicable to many real-world problems. Due to a peculiarity in its implementation, GSGP needs to store all the evolutionary history, i.e., all populations from the first one. We exploit this stored information to define a multi-generational selection scheme that is able to use individuals from older populations. We show that a limited ability to use "old" generations is actually useful for the search process, thus showing a zero-cost way of improving the performances of GSGP. 在进化方法中，相当突出的是遗传编程，近年来，一种称为几何语义遗传编程（GSGP）的变体已被证明可以成功地应用于许多现实世界的问题。由于其实现的特殊性，GSGP 需要存储所有进化历史，即从第一个种群开始的所有种群。我们利用这些存储的信息来定义一个多代选择方案，该方案能够使用来自老年人群的个体。我们证明，使用“旧”代的有限能力实际上对搜索过程有用，从而展示了一种提高 GSGP 性能的零成本方法。 本文提出了一种多代选择方案，通过利用几何语义遗传编程（GSGP）中存储的历史种群信息来提升算法性能。 Mauro Castelli,Luca Manzoni,Luca Mariot,Giuliamaria Menara,Gloria Pietropolli cs.NE

authors_text: M. Arana-Catania,Elena Kochkina,Arkaitz Zubiaga,Maria Liakata,Rob Procter,Yulan He
title: Natural Language Inference with Self-Attention for Veracity Assessment of Pandemic Claims
title_zh: 使用自注意力的自然语言推理来评估流行病声明的真实性
comment: 16 pages, 1 figure, 8 tables, presented in NAACL 2022
comments: 16 pages, 1 figure, 8 tables, presented in NAACL 2022
abstract: We present a comprehensive work on automated veracity assessment from dataset creation to developing novel methods based on Natural Language Inference (NLI), focusing on misinformation related to the COVID-19 pandemic. We first describe the construction of the novel PANACEA dataset consisting of heterogeneous claims on COVID-19 and their respective information sources. The dataset construction includes work on retrieval techniques and similarity measurements to ensure a unique set of claims. We then propose novel techniques for automated veracity assessment based on Natural Language Inference including graph convolutional networks and attention based approaches. We have carried out experiments on evidence retrieval and veracity assessment on the dataset using the proposed techniques and found them competitive with SOTA methods, and provided a detailed discussion.
summary: We present a comprehensive work on automated veracity assessment from dataset creation to developing novel methods based on Natural Language Inference (NLI), focusing on misinformation related to the COVID-19 pandemic. We first describe the construction of the novel PANACEA dataset consisting of heterogeneous claims on COVID-19 and their respective information sources. The dataset construction includes work on retrieval techniques and similarity measurements to ensure a unique set of claims. We then propose novel techniques for automated veracity assessment based on Natural Language Inference including graph convolutional networks and attention based approaches. We have carried out experiments on evidence retrieval and veracity assessment on the dataset using the proposed techniques and found them competitive with SOTA methods, and provided a detailed discussion.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项关于自动准确性评估的全面工作，从数据集创建到开发基于自然语言推理 (NLI) 的新方法，重点关注与 COVID-19 大流行相关的错误信息。我们首先描述了新颖的 PANACEA 数据集的构建，该数据集包含有关 COVID-19 的异构声明及其各自的信息源。数据集构建包括检索技术和相似性测量方面的工作，以确保一组独特的声明。然后，我们提出基于自然语言推理的自动准确性评估的新技术，包括图卷积网络和基于注意力的方法。我们使用所提出的技术对数据集进行了证据检索和准确性评估实验，发现它们与 SOTA 方法具有竞争力，并提供了详细的讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自然语言推理（NLI）和自注意力机制的方法，用于评估与新冠疫情相关的虚假信息的真实性，并构建了新型PANACEA数据集。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情中虚假信息广泛传播，亟需自动化工具进行有效识别和真实性评估。
AI.method: 构建包含异构新冠声明及来源的PANACEA数据集，结合图卷积网络和注意力机制开发新型NLI模型，并进行证据检索与真实性评估实验。
AI.result: 提出的模型在证据检索和真实性评估任务中表现与当前最优方法相当，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于NLI和自注意力的方法为疫情虚假信息检测提供了可行方案，数据集和模型为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Yinbo Yu,Jiajia Liu,Shouqing Li,Kepu Huang,Xudong Feng
title: A Temporal-Pattern Backdoor Attack to Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 对深度强化学习的时间模式后门攻击
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has made significant achievements in many real-world applications. But these real-world applications typically can only provide partial observations for making decisions due to occlusions and noisy sensors. However, partial state observability can be used to hide malicious behaviors for backdoors. In this paper, we explore the sequential nature of DRL and propose a novel temporal-pattern backdoor attack to DRL, whose trigger is a set of temporal constraints on a sequence of observations rather than a single observation, and effect can be kept in a controllable duration rather than in the instant. We validate our proposed backdoor attack to a typical job scheduling task in cloud computing. Numerous experimental results show that our backdoor can achieve excellent effectiveness, stealthiness, and sustainability. Our backdoor's average clean data accuracy and attack success rate can reach 97.8% and 97.5%, respectively.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has made significant achievements in many real-world applications. But these real-world applications typically can only provide partial observations for making decisions due to occlusions and noisy sensors. However, partial state observability can be used to hide malicious behaviors for backdoors. In this paper, we explore the sequential nature of DRL and propose a novel temporal-pattern backdoor attack to DRL, whose trigger is a set of temporal constraints on a sequence of observations rather than a single observation, and effect can be kept in a controllable duration rather than in the instant. We validate our proposed backdoor attack to a typical job scheduling task in cloud computing. Numerous experimental results show that our backdoor can achieve excellent effectiveness, stealthiness, and sustainability. Our backdoor's average clean data accuracy and attack success rate can reach 97.8% and 97.5%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）在许多实际应用中取得了重大成就。但由于遮挡和噪声传感器，这些现实世界的应用通常只能提供部分观察结果以做出决策。然而，部分状态可观察性可用于隐藏后门的恶意行为。在本文中，我们探讨了 DRL 的顺序性质，并提出了一种新颖的 DRL 时间模式后门攻击，其触发是对一系列观察而不是单个观察的一组时间约束，并且效果可以保持在可控持续时间内而不是即时。我们针对云计算中的典型作业调度任务验证了我们提出的后门攻击。大量的实验结果表明，我们的后门能够实现出色的有效性、隐秘性和可持续性。我们的后门平均干净数据准确率和攻击成功率分别可以达到97.8%和97.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对深度强化学习的时序模式后门攻击方法，利用部分可观测性隐藏恶意行为。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中DRL系统常因传感器噪声或遮挡导致部分可观测，攻击者可借此隐藏后门行为，但现有攻击方法效果有限。
AI.method: 设计基于时序约束的触发器，通过连续观测序列的约束条件触发后门，使攻击效果在可控时间段内持续生效。
AI.result: 在云计算任务调度实验中，后门攻击在保持高隐蔽性的同时，平均干净数据准确率和攻击成功率分别达97.8%和97.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有效性、隐蔽性和可持续性方面表现优异，揭示了DRL系统在部分可观测场景下的新型安全威胁。

authors_text: Meiling Fang,Fadi Boutros,Naser Damer
title: Intra and Cross-spectrum Iris Presentation Attack Detection in the NIR and Visible Domains
title_zh: 近红外和可见光域内和跨谱虹膜呈现攻击检测
comment: Chapter of the Handbook of Biometric Anti-Spoofing (Third Edition). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.14845
comments: Chapter of the Handbook of Biometric Anti-Spoofing (Third Edition). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.14845
abstract: Iris Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) is essential to secure iris recognition systems. Recent iris PAD solutions achieved good performance by leveraging deep learning techniques. However, most results were reported under intra-database scenarios and it is unclear if such solutions can generalize well across databases and capture spectra. These PAD methods run the risk of overfitting because of the binary label supervision during the network training, which serves global information learning but weakens the capture of local discriminative features. This chapter presents a novel attention-based deep pixel-wise binary supervision (A-PBS) method. A-PBS utilizes pixel-wise supervision to capture the fine-grained pixel/patch-level cues and attention mechanism to guide the network to automatically find regions where most contribute to an accurate PAD decision. Extensive experiments are performed on six NIR and one visible-light iris databases to show the effectiveness and robustness of proposed A-PBS methods. We additionally conduct extensive experiments under intra-/cross-database and intra-/cross-spectrum for detailed analysis. The results of our experiments indicates the generalizability of the A-PBS iris PAD approach.
summary: Iris Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) is essential to secure iris recognition systems. Recent iris PAD solutions achieved good performance by leveraging deep learning techniques. However, most results were reported under intra-database scenarios and it is unclear if such solutions can generalize well across databases and capture spectra. These PAD methods run the risk of overfitting because of the binary label supervision during the network training, which serves global information learning but weakens the capture of local discriminative features. This chapter presents a novel attention-based deep pixel-wise binary supervision (A-PBS) method. A-PBS utilizes pixel-wise supervision to capture the fine-grained pixel/patch-level cues and attention mechanism to guide the network to automatically find regions where most contribute to an accurate PAD decision. Extensive experiments are performed on six NIR and one visible-light iris databases to show the effectiveness and robustness of proposed A-PBS methods. We additionally conduct extensive experiments under intra-/cross-database and intra-/cross-spectrum for detailed analysis. The results of our experiments indicates the generalizability of the A-PBS iris PAD approach.
abstract_zh: 虹膜呈现攻击检测 (PAD) 对于保护虹膜识别系统至关重要。最近的 iris PAD 解决方案通过利用深度学习技术取得了良好的性能。然而，大多数结果是在数据库内情况下报告的，目前尚不清楚此类解决方案是否可以很好地跨数据库泛化并捕获光谱。由于网络训练期间的二元标签监督，这些 PAD 方法存在过度拟合的风险，这服务于全局信息学习，但削弱了对局部判别特征的捕获。本章提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的深度像素级二元监督（A-PBS）方法。 A-PBS 利用像素级监督来捕获细粒度像素/补丁级线索和注意机制，以引导网络自动找到最有助于准确 PAD 决策的区域。在 6 个近红外虹膜数据库和 1 个可见光虹膜数据库上进行了大量实验，以证明所提出的 A-PBS 方法的有效性和鲁棒性。我们还在数据库内/跨数据库和内部/交叉谱下进行了广泛的实验以进行详细分析。我们的实验结果表明 A-PBS 虹膜 PAD 方法的普适性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的像素级二值监督方法（A-PBS），用于在近红外（NIR）和可见光域内实现跨数据库和跨光谱的虹膜防伪攻击检测。
AI.motivation: 现有虹膜防伪攻击检测方法因依赖二值标签监督易过拟合，且难以跨数据库和跨光谱泛化，无法有效捕捉局部判别特征。
AI.method: 设计A-PBS方法，结合像素级二值监督与注意力机制，通过细粒度像素/块级线索学习和自动定位关键区域，提升模型对局部攻击特征的感知能力。
AI.result: 在6个NIR和1个可见光虹膜数据库上实验表明，A-PBS方法在跨数据库和跨光谱场景下均表现出优越的鲁棒性和检测性能。
AI.conclusion: A-PBS方法通过像素级监督与注意力机制有效解决了传统方法的过拟合问题，为跨域虹膜防伪攻击检测提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

search_text: Intra and Cross-spectrum Iris Presentation Attack Detection in the NIR and Visible Domains 近红外和可见光域内和跨谱虹膜呈现攻击检测 Iris Presentation Attack Detection (PAD) is essential to secure iris recognition systems. Recent iris PAD solutions achieved good performance by leveraging deep learning techniques. However, most results were reported under intra-database scenarios and it is unclear if such solutions can generalize well across databases and capture spectra. These PAD methods run the risk of overfitting because of the binary label supervision during the network training, which serves global information learning but weakens the capture of local discriminative features. This chapter presents a novel attention-based deep pixel-wise binary supervision (A-PBS) method. A-PBS utilizes pixel-wise supervision to capture the fine-grained pixel/patch-level cues and attention mechanism to guide the network to automatically find regions where most contribute to an accurate PAD decision. Extensive experiments are performed on six NIR and one visible-light iris databases to show the effectiveness and robustness of proposed A-PBS methods. We additionally conduct extensive experiments under intra-/cross-database and intra-/cross-spectrum for detailed analysis. The results of our experiments indicates the generalizability of the A-PBS iris PAD approach. 虹膜呈现攻击检测 (PAD) 对于保护虹膜识别系统至关重要。最近的 iris PAD 解决方案通过利用深度学习技术取得了良好的性能。然而，大多数结果是在数据库内情况下报告的，目前尚不清楚此类解决方案是否可以很好地跨数据库泛化并捕获光谱。由于网络训练期间的二元标签监督，这些 PAD 方法存在过度拟合的风险，这服务于全局信息学习，但削弱了对局部判别特征的捕获。本章提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的深度像素级二元监督（A-PBS）方法。 A-PBS 利用像素级监督来捕获细粒度像素/补丁级线索和注意机制，以引导网络自动找到最有助于准确 PAD 决策的区域。在 6 个近红外虹膜数据库和 1 个可见光虹膜数据库上进行了大量实验，以证明所提出的 A-PBS 方法的有效性和鲁棒性。我们还在数据库内/跨数据库和内部/交叉谱下进行了广泛的实验以进行详细分析。我们的实验结果表明 A-PBS 虹膜 PAD 方法的普适性。 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的像素级二值监督方法（A-PBS），用于在近红外（NIR）和可见光域内实现跨数据库和跨光谱的虹膜防伪攻击检测。 Meiling Fang,Fadi Boutros,Naser Damer cs.CV

authors_text: Mihir Durve,Adriano Tiribocchi,Fabio Bonaccorso,Andrea Montessori,Marco Lauricella,Michal Bogdan,Jan Guzowski,Sauro Succi
title: DropTrack -- automatic droplet tracking using deep learning for microfluidic applications
title_zh: DropTrack——使用深度学习进行微流体应用的自动液滴跟踪
abstract: Deep neural networks are rapidly emerging as data analysis tools, often outperforming the conventional techniques used in complex microfluidic systems. One fundamental analysis frequently desired in microfluidic experiments is counting and tracking the droplets. Specifically, droplet tracking in dense emulsions is challenging as droplets move in tightly packed configurations. Sometimes the individual droplets in these dense clusters are hard to resolve, even for a human observer. Here, two deep learning-based cutting-edge algorithms for object detection (YOLO) and object tracking (DeepSORT) are combined into a single image analysis tool, DropTrack, to track droplets in microfluidic experiments. DropTrack analyzes input videos, extracts droplets' trajectories, and infers other observables of interest, such as droplet numbers. Training an object detector network for droplet recognition with manually annotated images is a labor-intensive task and a persistent bottleneck. This work partly resolves this problem by training object detector networks (YOLOv5) with hybrid datasets containing real and synthetic images. We present an analysis of a double emulsion experiment as a case study to measure DropTrack's performance. For our test case, the YOLO networks trained with 60% synthetic images show similar performance in droplet counting as with the one trained using 100% real images, meanwhile saving the image annotation work by 60%. DropTrack's performance is measured in terms of mean average precision (mAP), mean square error in counting the droplets, and inference speed. The fastest configuration of DropTrack runs inference at about 30 frames per second, well within the standards for real-time image analysis.
summary: Deep neural networks are rapidly emerging as data analysis tools, often outperforming the conventional techniques used in complex microfluidic systems. One fundamental analysis frequently desired in microfluidic experiments is counting and tracking the droplets. Specifically, droplet tracking in dense emulsions is challenging as droplets move in tightly packed configurations. Sometimes the individual droplets in these dense clusters are hard to resolve, even for a human observer. Here, two deep learning-based cutting-edge algorithms for object detection (YOLO) and object tracking (DeepSORT) are combined into a single image analysis tool, DropTrack, to track droplets in microfluidic experiments. DropTrack analyzes input videos, extracts droplets' trajectories, and infers other observables of interest, such as droplet numbers. Training an object detector network for droplet recognition with manually annotated images is a labor-intensive task and a persistent bottleneck. This work partly resolves this problem by training object detector networks (YOLOv5) with hybrid datasets containing real and synthetic images. We present an analysis of a double emulsion experiment as a case study to measure DropTrack's performance. For our test case, the YOLO networks trained with 60% synthetic images show similar performance in droplet counting as with the one trained using 100% real images, meanwhile saving the image annotation work by 60%. DropTrack's performance is measured in terms of mean average precision (mAP), mean square error in counting the droplets, and inference speed. The fastest configuration of DropTrack runs inference at about 30 frames per second, well within the standards for real-time image analysis.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络正在迅速成为数据分析工具，其性能通常优于复杂微流体系统中使用的传统技术。微流体实验中经常需要的一项基本分析是对液滴进行计数和跟踪。具体来说，由于液滴在紧密堆积的结构中移动，致密乳液中的液滴跟踪具有挑战性。有时，即使对于人类观察者来说，这些密集簇中的单个液滴也很难分辨。在这里，用于对象检测 (YOLO) 和对象跟踪 (DeepSORT) 的两种基于深度学习的尖端算法被组合到一个图像分析工具 DropTrack 中，以跟踪微流体实验中的液滴。 DropTrack 分析输入视频，提取液滴的轨迹，并推断其他感兴趣的可观测值，例如液滴数量。使用手动注释的图像训练用于液滴识别的对象检测器网络是一项劳动密集型任务，也是一个持续的瓶颈。这项工作通过使用包含真实图像和合成图像的混合数据集训练对象检测器网络（YOLOv5）部分解决了这个问题。我们对双乳液实验进行了分析，作为衡量 DropTrack 性能的案例研究。对于我们的测试用例，使用 60% 合成图像训练的 YOLO 网络在液滴计数方面表现出与使用 100% 真实图像训练的网络类似的性能，同时节省了 60% 的图像标注工作。 DropTrack 的性能是根据平均精度 (mAP)、液滴计数的均方误差和推理速度来衡量的。 DropTrack 最快的配置以每秒约 30 帧的速度运行推理，完全符合实时图像分析的标准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动液滴跟踪工具DropTrack，用于微流控实验中的液滴计数与轨迹分析。
AI.motivation: 微流控实验中密集乳液的液滴跟踪存在个体分辨困难且人工标注耗时的问题，传统方法难以高效处理。
AI.method: 结合YOLO（目标检测）与DeepSORT（目标跟踪）算法，利用包含真实与合成图像的混合数据集训练YOLOv5模型，实现液滴自动识别与跟踪。
AI.result: 使用60%合成图像训练的模型在液滴计数性能上与全真实图像模型相当，减少60%标注工作量，最快配置下推理速度达30帧/秒。
AI.conclusion: DropTrack通过混合数据集训练有效降低了标注成本，同时满足实时分析需求，为微流控实验提供了高效可靠的图像分析方案。

authors_text: Sian Gooding,Manuel Tragut
title: One Size Does Not Fit All: The Case for Personalised Word Complexity Models
title_zh: 一种方法并不适用于所有情况：个性化单词复杂度模型的案例
abstract: Complex Word Identification (CWI) aims to detect words within a text that a reader may find difficult to understand. It has been shown that CWI systems can improve text simplification, readability prediction and vocabulary acquisition modelling. However, the difficulty of a word is a highly idiosyncratic notion that depends on a reader's first language, proficiency and reading experience. In this paper, we show that personal models are best when predicting word complexity for individual readers. We use a novel active learning framework that allows models to be tailored to individuals and release a dataset of complexity annotations and models as a benchmark for further research.
summary: Complex Word Identification (CWI) aims to detect words within a text that a reader may find difficult to understand. It has been shown that CWI systems can improve text simplification, readability prediction and vocabulary acquisition modelling. However, the difficulty of a word is a highly idiosyncratic notion that depends on a reader's first language, proficiency and reading experience. In this paper, we show that personal models are best when predicting word complexity for individual readers. We use a novel active learning framework that allows models to be tailored to individuals and release a dataset of complexity annotations and models as a benchmark for further research.
abstract_zh: 复杂单词识别 (CWI) 旨在检测文本中读者可能难以理解的单词。事实证明，CWI 系统可以改进文本简化、可读性预测和词汇习得建模。然而，单词的难度是一个非常特殊的概念，取决于读者的母语、熟练程度和阅读经验。在本文中，我们表明个人模型在预测个体读者的单词复杂性时是最好的。我们使用一种新颖的主动学习框架，该框架允许为个人量身定制模型，并发布复杂性注释和模型的数据集作为进一步研究的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出个性化词复杂度模型，以更准确地预测不同读者的困难词汇。
AI.motivation: 传统词复杂度识别方法无法满足不同读者的个体差异需求，需针对性优化以提升文本简化等应用效果。
AI.method: 采用主动学习框架构建个性化模型，并发布包含复杂度注释和模型的数据集作为基准。
AI.result: 实验证明个性化模型在预测个体读者词复杂度任务中表现优于通用模型。
AI.conclusion: 个性化模型能有效提升词复杂度预测准确性，数据集为后续研究提供重要参考。

search_text: One Size Does Not Fit All: The Case for Personalised Word Complexity Models 一种方法并不适用于所有情况：个性化单词复杂度模型的案例 Complex Word Identification (CWI) aims to detect words within a text that a reader may find difficult to understand. It has been shown that CWI systems can improve text simplification, readability prediction and vocabulary acquisition modelling. However, the difficulty of a word is a highly idiosyncratic notion that depends on a reader's first language, proficiency and reading experience. In this paper, we show that personal models are best when predicting word complexity for individual readers. We use a novel active learning framework that allows models to be tailored to individuals and release a dataset of complexity annotations and models as a benchmark for further research. 复杂单词识别 (CWI) 旨在检测文本中读者可能难以理解的单词。事实证明，CWI 系统可以改进文本简化、可读性预测和词汇习得建模。然而，单词的难度是一个非常特殊的概念，取决于读者的母语、熟练程度和阅读经验。在本文中，我们表明个人模型在预测个体读者的单词复杂性时是最好的。我们使用一种新颖的主动学习框架，该框架允许为个人量身定制模型，并发布复杂性注释和模型的数据集作为进一步研究的基准。 本文提出个性化词复杂度模型，以更准确地预测不同读者的困难词汇。 Sian Gooding,Manuel Tragut cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Annet Onnes
title: Monitoring AI systems: A Problem Analysis, Framework and Outlook
title_zh: 监控人工智能系统：问题分析、框架和展望
abstract: Knowledge-based systems have been used to monitor machines and processes in the real world. In this paper we propose the use of knowledge-based systems to monitor other AI systems in operation. We motivate and provide a problem analysis of this novel setting and subsequently propose a framework that allows for structuring future research related to this setting. Several directions for further research are also discussed.
summary: Knowledge-based systems have been used to monitor machines and processes in the real world. In this paper we propose the use of knowledge-based systems to monitor other AI systems in operation. We motivate and provide a problem analysis of this novel setting and subsequently propose a framework that allows for structuring future research related to this setting. Several directions for further research are also discussed.
abstract_zh: 基于知识的系统已用于监控现实世界中的机器和流程。在本文中，我们建议使用基于知识的系统来监控其他运行中的人工智能系统。我们激发并提供了这种新颖设置的问题分析，随后提出了一个框架，允许构建与此设置相关的未来研究。还讨论了进一步研究的几个方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用知识型系统监控运行中的AI系统，并构建了一个框架以指导未来相关研究
AI.motivation: 现有知识型系统主要用于监控物理系统，但AI系统的复杂性和自主性需要新的监控方法，因此需要探索这一新场景
AI.method: 通过问题分析和框架设计，结构化未来研究方向
AI.result: 提出了一个用于监控AI系统的框架，并探讨了多个未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 本文填补了AI系统监控领域的研究空白，提出的框架为未来研究提供了结构化方向

authors_text: Prathibha Varghese,G. Arockia Selva Saroja
title: Biologically inspired deep residual networks for computer vision applications
title_zh: 用于计算机视觉应用的受生物学启发的深度残差网络
abstract: Deep neural network has been ensured as a key technology in the field of many challenging and vigorously researched computer vision tasks. Furthermore, classical ResNet is thought to be a state-of-the-art convolutional neural network (CNN) and was observed to capture features which can have good generalization ability. In this work, we propose a biologically inspired deep residual neural network where the hexagonal convolutions are introduced along the skip connections. The performance of different ResNet variants using square and hexagonal convolution are evaluated with the competitive training strategy mentioned by [1]. We show that the proposed approach advances the baseline image classification accuracy of vanilla ResNet architectures on CIFAR-10 and the same was observed over multiple subsets of the ImageNet 2012 dataset. We observed an average improvement by 1.35% and 0.48% on baseline top-1 accuracies for ImageNet 2012 and CIFAR-10, respectively. The proposed biologically inspired deep residual networks were observed to have improved generalized performance and this could be a potential research direction to improve the discriminative ability of state-of-the-art image classification networks.
summary: Deep neural network has been ensured as a key technology in the field of many challenging and vigorously researched computer vision tasks. Furthermore, classical ResNet is thought to be a state-of-the-art convolutional neural network (CNN) and was observed to capture features which can have good generalization ability. In this work, we propose a biologically inspired deep residual neural network where the hexagonal convolutions are introduced along the skip connections. The performance of different ResNet variants using square and hexagonal convolution are evaluated with the competitive training strategy mentioned by [1]. We show that the proposed approach advances the baseline image classification accuracy of vanilla ResNet architectures on CIFAR-10 and the same was observed over multiple subsets of the ImageNet 2012 dataset. We observed an average improvement by 1.35% and 0.48% on baseline top-1 accuracies for ImageNet 2012 and CIFAR-10, respectively. The proposed biologically inspired deep residual networks were observed to have improved generalized performance and this could be a potential research direction to improve the discriminative ability of state-of-the-art image classification networks.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络已被确保作为许多具有挑战性和大力研究的计算机视觉任务领域的关键技术。此外，经典的 ResNet 被认为是最先进的卷积神经网络（CNN），并且被观察到捕获具有良好泛化能力的特征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种受生物学启发的深度残差神经网络，其中沿着跳跃连接引入六边形卷积。使用方形和六边形卷积的不同 ResNet 变体的性能通过[1]中提到的竞争性训练策略进行评估。我们表明，所提出的方法提高了 CIFAR-10 上普通 ResNet 架构的基线图像分类精度，并且在 ImageNet 2012 数据集的多个子集上观察到了同样的结果。我们观察到 ImageNet 2012 和 CIFAR-10 的基线 top-1 准确率平均提高了 1.35% 和 0.48%。所提出的受生物学启发的深度残差网络被观察到具有改进的广义性能，这可能是提高最先进的图像分类网络的判别能力的潜在研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受生物学启发的深度残差网络，通过在残差连接中引入六边形卷积，提升计算机视觉任务中的图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 经典ResNet虽具良好泛化能力，但受限于传统方形卷积的局部感知特性，难以完全模拟生物视觉系统的高效特征提取机制。
AI.method: 在ResNet残差连接中引入六边形卷积核，结合竞争性训练策略，对比分析不同卷积形式（方形/六边形）在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上的表现差异。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上分类准确率提升0.48%，ImageNet 2012数据集平均提升1.35%，验证了六边形卷积对模型泛化能力的增强效果。
AI.conclusion: 生物学启发的六边形卷积可有效提升残差网络的特征判别能力，为改进主流图像分类网络提供新研究方向。

authors_text: Tom Knoll,Francesco Moramarco,Alex Papadopoulos Korfiatis,Rachel Young,Claudia Ruffini,Mark Perera,Christian Perstl,Ehud Reiter,Anya Belz,Aleksandar Savkov
title: User-Driven Research of Medical Note Generation Software
title_zh: 医疗笔记生成软件的用户驱动研究
abstract: A growing body of work uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods to automatically generate medical notes from audio recordings of doctor-patient consultations. However, there are very few studies on how such systems could be used in clinical practice, how clinicians would adjust to using them, or how system design should be influenced by such considerations. In this paper, we present three rounds of user studies, carried out in the context of developing a medical note generation system. We present, analyse and discuss the participating clinicians' impressions and views of how the system ought to be adapted to be of value to them. Next, we describe a three-week test run of the system in a live telehealth clinical practice. Major findings include (i) the emergence of five different note-taking behaviours; (ii) the importance of the system generating notes in real time during the consultation; and (iii) the identification of a number of clinical use cases that could prove challenging for automatic note generation systems.
summary: A growing body of work uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods to automatically generate medical notes from audio recordings of doctor-patient consultations. However, there are very few studies on how such systems could be used in clinical practice, how clinicians would adjust to using them, or how system design should be influenced by such considerations. In this paper, we present three rounds of user studies, carried out in the context of developing a medical note generation system. We present, analyse and discuss the participating clinicians' impressions and views of how the system ought to be adapted to be of value to them. Next, we describe a three-week test run of the system in a live telehealth clinical practice. Major findings include (i) the emergence of five different note-taking behaviours; (ii) the importance of the system generating notes in real time during the consultation; and (iii) the identification of a number of clinical use cases that could prove challenging for automatic note generation systems.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的工作使用自然语言处理（NLP）方法从医患咨询的录音中自动生成医疗记录。然而，关于如何在临床实践中使用此类系统、临床医生如何适应使用它们或系统设计应如何受到此类考虑的影响的研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了在开发医疗记录生成系统的背景下进行的三轮用户研究。我们提出、分析和讨论参与的临床医生对于如何调整该系统以使其对他们有价值的印象和观点。接下来，我们描述了该系统在现场远程医疗临床实践中为期三周的测试运行。主要发现包括（i）出现了五种不同的记笔记行为； (ii) 咨询期间实时生成笔记的系统的重要性； (iii) 识别一些可能对自动笔记生成系统具有挑战性的临床用例。

AI.tldr: 本文通过用户研究探讨医疗笔记生成系统的临床应用与设计优化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对自动医疗笔记系统在临床实践中的适用性及医生适应性分析。
AI.method: 开展三轮用户研究并进行三周真实远程医疗场景测试，分析医生使用行为与系统需求。
AI.result: 发现五种笔记行为模式，强调实时生成需求，并识别出对自动系统具有挑战性的临床场景。
AI.conclusion: 系统设计需结合用户行为特征与实时性需求，同时需针对性解决特定临床场景的生成难题。

search_text: User-Driven Research of Medical Note Generation Software 医疗笔记生成软件的用户驱动研究 A growing body of work uses Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods to automatically generate medical notes from audio recordings of doctor-patient consultations. However, there are very few studies on how such systems could be used in clinical practice, how clinicians would adjust to using them, or how system design should be influenced by such considerations. In this paper, we present three rounds of user studies, carried out in the context of developing a medical note generation system. We present, analyse and discuss the participating clinicians' impressions and views of how the system ought to be adapted to be of value to them. Next, we describe a three-week test run of the system in a live telehealth clinical practice. Major findings include (i) the emergence of five different note-taking behaviours; (ii) the importance of the system generating notes in real time during the consultation; and (iii) the identification of a number of clinical use cases that could prove challenging for automatic note generation systems. 越来越多的工作使用自然语言处理（NLP）方法从医患咨询的录音中自动生成医疗记录。然而，关于如何在临床实践中使用此类系统、临床医生如何适应使用它们或系统设计应如何受到此类考虑的影响的研究很少。在本文中，我们提出了在开发医疗记录生成系统的背景下进行的三轮用户研究。我们提出、分析和讨论参与的临床医生对于如何调整该系统以使其对他们有价值的印象和观点。接下来，我们描述了该系统在现场远程医疗临床实践中为期三周的测试运行。主要发现包括（i）出现了五种不同的记笔记行为； (ii) 咨询期间实时生成笔记的系统的重要性； (iii) 识别一些可能对自动笔记生成系统具有挑战性的临床用例。 本文通过用户研究探讨医疗笔记生成系统的临床应用与设计优化。 Tom Knoll,Francesco Moramarco,Alex Papadopoulos Korfiatis,Rachel Young,Claudia Ruffini,Mark Perera,Christian Perstl,Ehud Reiter,Anya Belz,Aleksandar Savkov cs.HC,cs.CL

authors_text: Naresh Saini,Promodh Pinto,Aravinth Bheemaraj,Deepak Kumar,Dhiraj Daga,Saurabh Yadav,Srihari Nagaraj
title: OCR Synthetic Benchmark Dataset for Indic Languages
title_zh: 印度语 OCR 综合基准数据集
abstract: We present the largest publicly available synthetic OCR benchmark dataset for Indic languages. The collection contains a total of 90k images and their ground truth for 23 Indic languages. OCR model validation in Indic languages require a good amount of diverse data to be processed in order to create a robust and reliable model. Generating such a huge amount of data would be difficult otherwise but with synthetic data, it becomes far easier. It can be of great importance to fields like Computer Vision or Image Processing where once an initial synthetic data is developed, model creation becomes easier. Generating synthetic data comes with the flexibility to adjust its nature and environment as and when required in order to improve the performance of the model. Accuracy for labeled real-time data is sometimes quite expensive while accuracy for synthetic data can be easily achieved with a good score.
summary: We present the largest publicly available synthetic OCR benchmark dataset for Indic languages. The collection contains a total of 90k images and their ground truth for 23 Indic languages. OCR model validation in Indic languages require a good amount of diverse data to be processed in order to create a robust and reliable model. Generating such a huge amount of data would be difficult otherwise but with synthetic data, it becomes far easier. It can be of great importance to fields like Computer Vision or Image Processing where once an initial synthetic data is developed, model creation becomes easier. Generating synthetic data comes with the flexibility to adjust its nature and environment as and when required in order to improve the performance of the model. Accuracy for labeled real-time data is sometimes quite expensive while accuracy for synthetic data can be easily achieved with a good score.
abstract_zh: 我们提供最大的印度语公开合成 OCR 基准数据集。该集合总共包含 9 万张图像及其 23 种印度语言的基本事实。印度语言的 OCR 模型验证需要处理大量不同的数据，才能创建强大且可靠的模型。否则，生成如此大量的数据会很困难，但使用合成数据，就会变得容易得多。它对于计算机视觉或图像处理等领域非常重要，一旦开发了初始合成数据，模型创建就会变得更加容易。生成合成数据可以根据需要灵活地调整其性质和环境，以提高模型的性能。标记实时数据的准确性有时相当昂贵，而合成数据的准确性可以通过良好的分数轻松实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个包含90k张图像和23种印度语言标注的合成OCR基准数据集，用于提升OCR模型在印度语言上的性能。
AI.motivation: 印度语言OCR模型开发缺乏足够多样的真实数据，且获取标注数据成本高昂，合成数据能提供灵活可控的训练环境。
AI.method: 通过生成合成图像并调整文本样式、背景环境等参数，构建大规模标注数据集以训练和验证OCR模型。
AI.result: 创建了当前最大的印度语言合成OCR数据集，为计算机视觉和图像处理领域提供标准化测试基准。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据集有效解决了印度语言OCR数据稀缺问题，显著降低模型开发成本并提升性能优化灵活性。

authors_text: Xiangjun Tang,He Wang,Bo Hu,Xu Gong,Ruifan Yi,Qilong Kou,Xiaogang Jin
title: Real-time Controllable Motion Transition for Characters
title_zh: 角色实时可控运动过渡
abstract: Real-time in-between motion generation is universally required in games and highly desirable in existing animation pipelines. Its core challenge lies in the need to satisfy three critical conditions simultaneously: quality, controllability and speed, which renders any methods that need offline computation (or post-processing) or cannot incorporate (often unpredictable) user control undesirable. To this end, we propose a new real-time transition method to address the aforementioned challenges. Our approach consists of two key components: motion manifold and conditional transitioning. The former learns the important low-level motion features and their dynamics; while the latter synthesizes transitions conditioned on a target frame and the desired transition duration. We first learn a motion manifold that explicitly models the intrinsic transition stochasticity in human motions via a multi-modal mapping mechanism. Then, during generation, we design a transition model which is essentially a sampling strategy to sample from the learned manifold, based on the target frame and the aimed transition duration. We validate our method on different datasets in tasks where no post-processing or offline computation is allowed. Through exhaustive evaluation and comparison, we show that our method is able to generate high-quality motions measured under multiple metrics. Our method is also robust under various target frames (with extreme cases).
summary: Real-time in-between motion generation is universally required in games and highly desirable in existing animation pipelines. Its core challenge lies in the need to satisfy three critical conditions simultaneously: quality, controllability and speed, which renders any methods that need offline computation (or post-processing) or cannot incorporate (often unpredictable) user control undesirable. To this end, we propose a new real-time transition method to address the aforementioned challenges. Our approach consists of two key components: motion manifold and conditional transitioning. The former learns the important low-level motion features and their dynamics; while the latter synthesizes transitions conditioned on a target frame and the desired transition duration. We first learn a motion manifold that explicitly models the intrinsic transition stochasticity in human motions via a multi-modal mapping mechanism. Then, during generation, we design a transition model which is essentially a sampling strategy to sample from the learned manifold, based on the target frame and the aimed transition duration. We validate our method on different datasets in tasks where no post-processing or offline computation is allowed. Through exhaustive evaluation and comparison, we show that our method is able to generate high-quality motions measured under multiple metrics. Our method is also robust under various target frames (with extreme cases).
abstract_zh: 游戏中普遍需要实时中间运动生成，并且在现有动画管道中非常需要。其核心挑战在于需要同时满足三个关键条件：质量、可控性和速度，这使得任何需要离线计算（或后处理）或无法纳入（通常不可预测）用户控制的方法都是不可取的。为此，我们提出了一种新的实时转换方法来解决上述挑战。我们的方法由两个关键组成部分组成：运动流形和条件转换。前者学习重要的低级运动特征及其动态；而后者根据目标帧和所需的过渡持续时间合成过渡。我们首先学习一个运动流形，它通过多模态映射机制显式地模拟人体运动中的内在过渡随机性。然后，在生成过程中，我们设计了一个转换模型，它本质上是一种采样策略，根据目标框架和目标转换持续时间从学习的流形中进行采样。我们在不允许后处理或离线计算的任务中的不同数据集上验证我们的方法。通过详尽的评估和比较，我们表明我们的方法能够生成在多个指标下测量的高质量运动。我们的方法在各种目标框架下（极端情况）也具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时可控的角色运动过渡方法，能够在不依赖离线计算或后期处理的情况下生成高质量运动。
AI.motivation: 现有动画流程中实时生成中间运动的挑战在于需同时满足质量、可控性和速度要求，而传统方法常因依赖离线计算或无法处理用户控制而不足。
AI.method: 方法包含两个核心组件：运动流形（学习低级运动特征及动态）和条件过渡（基于目标帧与过渡时长生成过渡）。通过多模态映射机制建模运动的内在随机性，并设计采样策略从流形中生成过渡。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证表明，该方法在无需后期处理的情况下生成的运动质量优于现有方法，且对极端目标帧具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了实时运动过渡的质量、可控性与速度矛盾，为游戏和动画领域提供了高效的解决方案。

We validate our method on different datasets in tasks where no post-processing or offline computation is allowed. Through exhaustive evaluation and comparison, we show that our method is able to generate high-quality motions measured under multiple metrics. Our method is also robust under various target frames (with extreme cases). 游戏中普遍需要实时中间运动生成，并且在现有动画管道中非常需要。其核心挑战在于需要同时满足三个关键条件：质量、可控性和速度，这使得任何需要离线计算（或后处理）或无法纳入（通常不可预测）用户控制的方法都是不可取的。为此，我们提出了一种新的实时转换方法来解决上述挑战。我们的方法由两个关键组成部分组成：运动流形和条件转换。前者学习重要的低级运动特征及其动态；而后者根据目标帧和所需的过渡持续时间合成过渡。我们首先学习一个运动流形，它通过多模态映射机制显式地模拟人体运动中的内在过渡随机性。然后，在生成过程中，我们设计了一个转换模型，它本质上是一种采样策略，根据目标框架和目标转换持续时间从学习的流形中进行采样。我们在不允许后处理或离线计算的任务中的不同数据集上验证我们的方法。通过详尽的评估和比较，我们表明我们的方法能够生成在多个指标下测量的高质量运动。我们的方法在各种目标框架下（极端情况）也具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种实时可控的角色运动过渡方法，能够在不依赖离线计算或后期处理的情况下生成高质量运动。 Xiangjun Tang,He Wang,Bo Hu,Xu Gong,Ruifan Yi,Qilong Kou,Xiaogang Jin cs.GR,cs.CV

authors_text: Xiangjun Tang,Wenxin Sun,Yong-Liang Yang,Xiaogang Jin
title: Parametric Reshaping of Portraits in Videos
title_zh: 视频中肖像的参数化重塑
comment: ef:MM'21: Proceedings of the 29th ACM International Conference on MultimediaOctober 2021
comments: ef:MM'21: Proceedings of the 29th ACM International Conference on MultimediaOctober 2021
abstract: Sharing short personalized videos to various social media networks has become quite popular in recent years. This raises the need for digital retouching of portraits in videos. However, applying portrait image editing directly on portrait video frames cannot generate smooth and stable video sequences. To this end, we present a robust and easy-to-use parametric method to reshape the portrait in a video to produce smooth retouched results. Given an input portrait video, our method consists of two main stages: stabilized face reconstruction, and continuous video reshaping. In the first stage, we start by estimating face rigid pose transformations across video frames. Then we jointly optimize multiple frames to reconstruct an accurate face identity, followed by recovering face expressions over the entire video. In the second stage, we first reshape the reconstructed 3D face using a parametric reshaping model reflecting the weight change of the face, and then utilize the reshaped 3D face to guide the warping of video frames. We develop a novel signed distance function based dense mapping method for the warping between face contours before and after reshaping, resulting in stable warped video frames with minimum distortions. In addition, we use the 3D structure of the face to correct the dense mapping to achieve temporal consistency. We generate the final result by minimizing the background distortion through optimizing a content-aware warping mesh. Extensive experiments show that our method is able to create visually pleasing results by adjusting a simple reshaping parameter, which facilitates portrait video editing for social media and visual effects.

Then we jointly optimize multiple frames to reconstruct an accurate face identity, followed by recovering face expressions over the entire video. In the second stage, we first reshape the reconstructed 3D face using a parametric reshaping model reflecting the weight change of the face, and then utilize the reshaped 3D face to guide the warping of video frames. We develop a novel signed distance function based dense mapping method for the warping between face contours before and after reshaping, resulting in stable warped video frames with minimum distortions. In addition, we use the 3D structure of the face to correct the dense mapping to achieve temporal consistency. We generate the final result by minimizing the background distortion through optimizing a content-aware warping mesh. Extensive experiments show that our method is able to create visually pleasing results by adjusting a simple reshaping parameter, which facilitates portrait video editing for social media and visual effects.
abstract_zh: 近年来，将个性化短视频分享到各种社交媒体网络已变得相当流行。这就提出了对视频中的肖像进行数字修饰的需求。然而，直接对人像视频帧进行人像图像编辑并不能生成流畅稳定的视频序列。为此，我们提出了一种强大且易于使用的参数化方法来重塑视频中的肖像，以产生平滑的修饰结果。给定输入肖像视频，我们的方法由两个主要阶段组成：稳定的面部重建和连续视频重塑。在第一阶段，我们首先估计跨视频帧的面部刚性姿势变换。然后，我们联合优化多个帧以重建准确的面部身份，然后恢复整个视频的面部表情。在第二阶段，我们首先使用反映面部权重变化的参数重塑模型重塑重建的3D面部，然后利用重塑的3D面部来指导视频帧的扭曲。我们开发了一种新颖的基于符号距离函数的密集映射方法，用于整形前后面部轮廓之间的扭曲，从而产生具有最小失真的稳定扭曲视频帧。此外，我们使用人脸的3D结构来校正密集映射以实现时间一致性。我们通过优化内容感知扭曲网格来最小化背景失真，从而生成最终结果。大量的实验表明，我们的方法能够通过调整简单的重塑参数来创建视觉上令人愉悦的结果，这有助于社交媒体和视觉效果的肖像视频编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数化方法，用于在视频中平滑重塑人像，解决直接编辑视频帧导致的不稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 随着短视频在社交媒体的流行，用户需要对视频中的人像进行数字修饰，但直接编辑视频帧难以生成稳定结果。
AI.method: 方法分为两阶段：首先通过估计面部刚性变换并优化多帧重建准确面部身份与表情；其次利用参数化模型重塑3D面部，并结合符号距离函数和3D结构引导视频帧变形，最终通过内容感知网格优化背景。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法通过简单参数调整即可生成视觉效果佳的稳定视频，适用于社交媒体和视觉特效。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的参数化方法有效解决了视频人像编辑的稳定性问题，为动态修饰提供了高效方案。

authors_text: Arash Amini,Arul Selvam Periyasamy,Sven Behnke
title: YOLOPose: Transformer-based Multi-Object 6D Pose Estimation using Keypoint Regression
title_zh: YOLOPose：使用关键点回归的基于 Transformer 的多对象 6D 姿态估计
abstract: 6D object pose estimation is a crucial prerequisite for autonomous robot manipulation applications. The state-of-the-art models for pose estimation are convolutional neural network (CNN)-based. Lately, Transformers, an architecture originally proposed for natural language processing, is achieving state-of-the-art results in many computer vision tasks as well. Equipped with the multi-head self-attention mechanism, Transformers enable simple single-stage end-to-end architectures for learning object detection and 6D object pose estimation jointly. In this work, we propose YOLOPose (short form for You Only Look Once Pose estimation), a Transformer-based multi-object 6D pose estimation method based on keypoint regression. In contrast to the standard heatmaps for predicting keypoints in an image, we directly regress the keypoints. Additionally, we employ a learnable orientation estimation module to predict the orientation from the keypoints. Along with a separate translation estimation module, our model is end-to-end differentiable. Our method is suitable for real-time applications and achieves results comparable to state-of-the-art methods.
summary: 6D object pose estimation is a crucial prerequisite for autonomous robot manipulation applications. The state-of-the-art models for pose estimation are convolutional neural network (CNN)-based. Lately, Transformers, an architecture originally proposed for natural language processing, is achieving state-of-the-art results in many computer vision tasks as well. Equipped with the multi-head self-attention mechanism, Transformers enable simple single-stage end-to-end architectures for learning object detection and 6D object pose estimation jointly. In this work, we propose YOLOPose (short form for You Only Look Once Pose estimation), a Transformer-based multi-object 6D pose estimation method based on keypoint regression. In contrast to the standard heatmaps for predicting keypoints in an image, we directly regress the keypoints. Additionally, we employ a learnable orientation estimation module to predict the orientation from the keypoints. Along with a separate translation estimation module, our model is end-to-end differentiable. Our method is suitable for real-time applications and achieves results comparable to state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 6D 物体姿态估计是自主机器人操纵应用的重要先决条件。最先进的姿态估计模型是基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的。最近，Transformers（一种最初为自然语言处理而提出的架构）也在许多计算机视觉任务中取得了最先进的结果。 Transformers 配备多头自注意力机制，可实现简单的单级端到端架构，用于联合学习对象检测和 6D 对象姿态估计。在这项工作中，我们提出了 YOLOPose（You Only Look Once Poseestimation 的缩写），一种基于 Transformer 的基于关键点回归的多对象 6D 姿态估计方法。与预测图像中关键点的标准热图相比，我们直接对关键点进行回归。此外，我们采用可学习的方向估计模块来根据关键点预测方向。加上单独的翻译估计模块，我们的模型是端到端可微分的。我们的方法适合实时应用，并取得与最先进的方法相当的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOLOPose，一种基于Transformer的多物体6D位姿估计方法，通过关键点回归实现端到端实时位姿估计。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在位姿估计中占主导地位，但Transformer在计算机视觉中展现潜力，尤其通过自注意力机制实现单阶段联合检测与位姿估计，需探索其在实时位姿估计中的有效性。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构，直接回归图像关键点而非传统热图，并引入可学习方向估计模块与独立平移估计模块，构建端到端可微模型。
AI.result: 方法在实时应用中表现优异，结果与当前最先进的位姿估计方法相当。
AI.conclusion: YOLOPose验证了Transformer在6D位姿估计中的有效性，为实时机器人操作提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Ning Wang
title: M2R2: Missing-Modality Robust emotion Recognition framework with iterative data augmentation
title_zh: M2R2：具有迭代数据增强的缺失模态鲁棒情感识别框架
abstract: This paper deals with the utterance-level modalities missing problem with uncertain patterns on emotion recognition in conversation (ERC) task. Present models generally predict the speaker's emotions by its current utterance and context, which is degraded by modality missing considerably. Our work proposes a framework Missing-Modality Robust emotion Recognition (M2R2), which trains emotion recognition model with iterative data augmentation by learned common representation. Firstly, a network called Party Attentive Network (PANet) is designed to classify emotions, which tracks all the speakers' states and context. Attention mechanism between speaker with other participants and dialogue topic is used to decentralize dependence on multi-time and multi-party utterances instead of the possible incomplete one. Moreover, the Common Representation Learning (CRL) problem is defined for modality-missing problem. Data imputation methods improved by the adversarial strategy are used here to construct extra features to augment data. Extensive experiments and case studies validate the effectiveness of our methods over baselines for modality-missing emotion recognition on two different datasets.
summary: This paper deals with the utterance-level modalities missing problem with uncertain patterns on emotion recognition in conversation (ERC) task. Present models generally predict the speaker's emotions by its current utterance and context, which is degraded by modality missing considerably. Our work proposes a framework Missing-Modality Robust emotion Recognition (M2R2), which trains emotion recognition model with iterative data augmentation by learned common representation. Firstly, a network called Party Attentive Network (PANet) is designed to classify emotions, which tracks all the speakers' states and context. Attention mechanism between speaker with other participants and dialogue topic is used to decentralize dependence on multi-time and multi-party utterances instead of the possible incomplete one. Moreover, the Common Representation Learning (CRL) problem is defined for modality-missing problem. Data imputation methods improved by the adversarial strategy are used here to construct extra features to augment data. Extensive experiments and case studies validate the effectiveness of our methods over baselines for modality-missing emotion recognition on two different datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了对话中情感识别（ERC）任务中具有不确定模式的话语级模态缺失问题。目前的模型通常通过当前的话语和上下文来预测说话者的情绪，而模态的缺失会导致这种情绪的降低。我们的工作提出了一个框架缺失模态鲁棒情感识别（M2R2），它通过学习的共同表示来训练具有迭代数据增强的情感识别模型。首先，设计了一个名为“当事人关注网络”（PANet）的网络来对情绪进行分类，该网络跟踪所有发言者的状态和上下文。利用说话者与其他参与者以及对话主题之间的注意力机制来分散对多时间、多方话语的依赖，而不是可能的不完整话语。此外，公共表示学习（CRL）问题是针对模态缺失问题定义的。这里使用通过对抗策略改进的数据插补方法来构造额外的特征来增强数据。大量的实验和案例研究验证了我们的方法在两个不同数据集上模态缺失情感识别基线上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出M2R2框架，解决对话情绪识别中因模态缺失导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在模态缺失时依赖不完整数据，导致情绪识别效果显著下降，需提升模型对缺失模态的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计Party Attentive Network（PANet）捕捉多说话者状态与上下文，结合对抗策略改进的共同表示学习（CRL）进行数据增强，通过迭代填补缺失模态特征。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实验表明，M2R2在模态缺失场景下优于基线模型，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: M2R2框架通过注意力机制与数据增强有效应对模态缺失，为鲁棒情绪识别提供新思路。

authors_text: Jiri Vlasak,Michal Sojka,Zdeněk Hanzálek
title: Parallel Parking: Optimal Entry and Minimum Slot Dimensions
title_zh: 平行停车：最佳入口和最小停车位尺寸
comment: 14 pages (title + 9 of paper + 4 of appendix), 11 (paper) + 4 (appendix) figures, sent to VEHITS 2022 conference
comments: 14 pages (title + 9 of paper + 4 of appendix), 11 (paper) + 4 (appendix) figures, sent to VEHITS 2022 conference
abstract: The problem of path planning for automated parking is usually presented as finding a collision-free path from initial to goal positions, where three out of four parking slot edges represent obstacles. We rethink the path planning problem for parallel parking by decomposing it into two independent parts. The topic of this paper is finding optimal parking slot entry positions. Path planning from initial to entry position is out of scope here. We show the relation between entry positions, parking slot dimensions, and the number of backward-forward direction changes. This information can be used as an input to optimize other parts of the automated parking process.
summary: The problem of path planning for automated parking is usually presented as finding a collision-free path from initial to goal positions, where three out of four parking slot edges represent obstacles. We rethink the path planning problem for parallel parking by decomposing it into two independent parts. The topic of this paper is finding optimal parking slot entry positions. Path planning from initial to entry position is out of scope here. We show the relation between entry positions, parking slot dimensions, and the number of backward-forward direction changes. This information can be used as an input to optimize other parts of the automated parking process.
abstract_zh: 自动停车的路径规划问题通常表现为寻找一条从初始位置到目标位置的无碰撞路径，其中四个停车位边缘中的三个代表障碍物。我们通过将平行停车的路径规划问题分解为两个独立的部分来重新思考它。本文的主题是寻找最佳停车位入口位置。从初始位置到进入位置的路径规划超出了此处的范围。我们展示了入口位置、停车位尺寸和前后方向变化次数之间的关系。该信息可用作优化自动停车过程其他部分的输入。

AI.tldr: 本文重新分解平行停车路径规划问题，研究最佳停车车位入口位置及其与车位尺寸和方向变化次数的关系。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将路径规划视为单一问题，而本文通过分解为独立部分，旨在优化自动化停车过程中的入口位置选择。
AI.method: 通过将路径规划问题分解为入口位置选择和后续路径规划，分析入口位置与车位尺寸、方向变化次数之间的关系。
AI.result: 确定了最佳入口位置与车位尺寸及方向变化次数的关系，为自动化停车的其他优化提供输入。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解问题并优化入口位置选择，本文的方法为自动化停车过程提供了更高效的优化途径。

authors_text: Hervé Chabannne,Vincent Despiegel,Linda Guiga
title: One Picture is Worth a Thousand Words: A New Wallet Recovery Process
title_zh: 一图胜千言：新的钱包恢复流程
abstract: We introduce a new wallet recovery process. Our solution associates 1) visual passwords: a photograph of a secretly picked object (Chabanne et al., 2013) with 2) ImageNet classifiers transforming images into binary vectors and, 3) obfuscated fuzzy matching (Galbraith and Zobernig, 2019) for the storage of visual passwords/retrieval of wallet seeds. Our experiments show that the replacement of long seed phrases by a photograph is possible.
summary: We introduce a new wallet recovery process. Our solution associates 1) visual passwords: a photograph of a secretly picked object (Chabanne et al., 2013) with 2) ImageNet classifiers transforming images into binary vectors and, 3) obfuscated fuzzy matching (Galbraith and Zobernig, 2019) for the storage of visual passwords/retrieval of wallet seeds. Our experiments show that the replacement of long seed phrases by a photograph is possible.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了新的钱包恢复流程。我们的解决方案将 1) 视觉密码：秘密挑选的物体的照片 (Chabanne 等人，2013) 与 2) 将图像转换为二进制向量的 ImageNet 分类器以及 3) 混淆的模糊匹配 (Galbraith 和 Zobernig，2019) 关联起来，用于存储视觉密码/检索钱包种子。我们的实验表明，用照片替换长种子短语是可能的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像的钱包恢复方法，通过照片替代传统长种子短语实现安全存储与恢复。
AI.motivation: 传统钱包种子短语难以记忆且存在安全风险，需更便捷安全的恢复方式。
AI.method: 结合视觉密码、ImageNet图像分类器生成二进制向量，以及模糊匹配技术实现照片与钱包种子的关联存储与检索。
AI.result: 实验验证了用照片替代传统种子短语的可行性，实现了安全高效的钱包恢复。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为数字货币钱包提供了更安全便捷的恢复方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Chuanxing Geng,Aiyang Han,Songcan Chen
title: Explicit View-labels Matter: A Multifacet Complementarity Study of Multi-view Clustering
title_zh: 显式视图标签很重要：多视图聚类的多方面互补性研究
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Accepted by IEEE TPAMI2024
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Accepted by IEEE TPAMI2024
abstract: Consistency and complementarity are two key ingredients for boosting multi-view clustering (MVC). Recently with the introduction of popular contrastive learning, the consistency learning of views has been further enhanced in MVC, leading to promising performance. However, by contrast, the complementarity has not received sufficient attention except just in the feature facet, where the Hilbert Schmidt Independence Criterion term or the independent encoder-decoder network is usually adopted to capture view-specific information. This motivates us to reconsider the complementarity learning of views comprehensively from multiple facets including the feature-, view-label- and contrast- facets, while maintaining the view consistency. We empirically find that all the facets contribute to the complementarity learning, especially the view-label facet, which is usually neglected by existing methods. Based on this, a simple yet effective \underline{M}ultifacet \underline{C}omplementarity learning framework for \underline{M}ulti-\underline{V}iew \underline{C}lustering (MCMVC) is naturally developed, which fuses multifacet complementarity information, especially explicitly embedding the view-label information. To our best knowledge, it is the first time to use view-labels explicitly to guide the complementarity learning of views. Compared with the SOTA baselines, MCMVC achieves remarkable improvements, e.g., by average margins over $5.00\%$ and $7.00\%$ respectively in complete and incomplete MVC settings on Caltech101-20 in terms of three evaluation metrics.
summary: Consistency and complementarity are two key ingredients for boosting multi-view clustering (MVC). Recently with the introduction of popular contrastive learning, the consistency learning of views has been further enhanced in MVC, leading to promising performance. However, by contrast, the complementarity has not received sufficient attention except just in the feature facet, where the Hilbert Schmidt Independence Criterion term or the independent encoder-decoder network is usually adopted to capture view-specific information. This motivates us to reconsider the complementarity learning of views comprehensively from multiple facets including the feature-, view-label- and contrast- facets, while maintaining the view consistency. We empirically find that all the facets contribute to the complementarity learning, especially the view-label facet, which is usually neglected by existing methods. Based on this, a simple yet effective \underline{M}ultifacet \underline{C}omplementarity learning framework for \underline{M}ulti-\underline{V}iew \underline{C}lustering (MCMVC) is naturally developed, which fuses multifacet complementarity information, especially explicitly embedding the view-label information. To our best knowledge, it is the first time to use view-labels explicitly to guide the complementarity learning of views. Compared with the SOTA baselines, MCMVC achieves remarkable improvements, e.g., by average margins over $5.00\%$ and $7.00\%$ respectively in complete and incomplete MVC settings on Caltech101-20 in terms of three evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 一致性和互补性是促进多视图聚类 (MVC) 的两个关键因素。最近，随着流行的对比学习的引入，视图的一致性学习在 MVC 中得到了进一步增强，从而带来了可喜的性能。然而，相比之下，除了特征方面之外，互补性并未受到足够的重视，其中通常采用希尔伯特施密特独立准则项或独立的编码器-解码器网络来捕获特定于视图的信息。这促使我们从特征、视图标签和对比度等多个方面全面重新考虑视图的互补性学习，同时保持视图的一致性。我们凭经验发现所有方面都有助于互补性学习，尤其是视图标签方面，它通常被现有方法忽略。基于此，自然地开发了一个简单而有效的\underline{M}ultifacet \underline{C}complementarity学习框架，用于\underline{M}ulti-\underline{V}iew \underline{C}lustering（MCMVC），它融合了多方面的互补信息，特别是显式地嵌入视图标签信息。据我们所知，这是第一次明确使用视图标签来指导视图的互补性学习。与 SOTA 基线相比，MCMVC 取得了显着的改进，例如，在 Caltech101-20 上完整和不完整的 MVC 设置中，在三个评估指标方面，平均利润分别超过 $5.00\%$ 和 $7.00\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角聚类方法，通过融合特征、视角标签和对比等多个方面的互补性信息，提升多视角聚类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注视角一致性及特征层面的互补性，忽视了视角标签等其他关键互补性信息，导致多视角聚类效果受限。
AI.method: 设计MCMVC框架，首次显式引入视角标签信息，从特征、视角标签和对比三个维度综合学习视角互补性，并融合多方面信息优化聚类结果。
AI.result: 在Caltech101-20数据集上，MCMVC在完整和不完整多视角设置下分别平均超越现有方法5.00%和7.00%。
AI.conclusion: 显式利用视角标签的多维度互补性学习能显著提升多视角聚类效果，为该领域提供新思路。

search_text: Explicit View-labels Matter: A Multifacet Complementarity Study of Multi-view Clustering 显式视图标签很重要：多视图聚类的多方面互补性研究 Consistency and complementarity are two key ingredients for boosting multi-view clustering (MVC). Recently with the introduction of popular contrastive learning, the consistency learning of views has been further enhanced in MVC, leading to promising performance. However, by contrast, the complementarity has not received sufficient attention except just in the feature facet, where the Hilbert Schmidt Independence Criterion term or the independent encoder-decoder network is usually adopted to capture view-specific information. This motivates us to reconsider the complementarity learning of views comprehensively from multiple facets including the feature-, view-label- and contrast- facets, while maintaining the view consistency. We empirically find that all the facets contribute to the complementarity learning, especially the view-label facet, which is usually neglected by existing methods. Based on this, a simple yet effective \underline{M}ultifacet \underline{C}omplementarity learning framework for \underline{M}ulti-\underline{V}iew \underline{C}lustering (MCMVC) is naturally developed, which fuses multifacet complementarity information, especially explicitly embedding the view-label information. To our best knowledge, it is the first time to use view-labels explicitly to guide the complementarity learning of views. Compared with the SOTA baselines, MCMVC achieves remarkable improvements, e.g., by average margins over $5.00\%$ and $7.00\%$ respectively in complete and incomplete MVC settings on Caltech101-20 in terms of three evaluation metrics. 一致性和互补性是促进多视图聚类 (MVC) 的两个关键因素。最近，随着流行的对比学习的引入，视图的一致性学习在 MVC 中得到了进一步增强，从而带来了可喜的性能。然而，相比之下，除了特征方面之外，互补性并未受到足够的重视，其中通常采用希尔伯特施密特独立准则项或独立的编码器-解码器网络来捕获特定于视图的信息。这促使我们从特征、视图标签和对比度等多个方面全面重新考虑视图的互补性学习，同时保持视图的一致性。我们凭经验发现所有方面都有助于互补性学习，尤其是视图标签方面，它通常被现有方法忽略。基于此，自然地开发了一个简单而有效的\underline{M}ultifacet \underline{C}complementarity学习框架，用于\underline{M}ulti-\underline{V}iew \underline{C}lustering（MCMVC），它融合了多方面的互补信息，特别是显式地嵌入视图标签信息。据我们所知，这是第一次明确使用视图标签来指导视图的互补性学习。与 SOTA 基线相比，MCMVC 取得了显着的改进，例如，在 Caltech101-20 上完整和不完整的 MVC 设置中，在三个评估指标方面，平均利润分别超过 $5.00\%$ 和 $7.00\%$。 本文提出一种多视角聚类方法，通过融合特征、视角标签和对比等多个方面的互补性信息，提升多视角聚类性能。 Chuanxing Geng,Aiyang Han,Songcan Chen cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Eklavya Sarkar,Pavel Korshunov,Laurent Colbois,Sébastien Marcel
title: Are GAN-based Morphs Threatening Face Recognition?
title_zh: 基于 GAN 的变形是否会威胁人脸识别？
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.05344
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2012.05344
abstract: Morphing attacks are a threat to biometric systems where the biometric reference in an identity document can be altered. This form of attack presents an important issue in applications relying on identity documents such as border security or access control. Research in generation of face morphs and their detection is developing rapidly, however very few datasets with morphing attacks and open-source detection toolkits are publicly available. This paper bridges this gap by providing two datasets and the corresponding code for four types of morphing attacks: two that rely on facial landmarks based on OpenCV and FaceMorpher, and two that use StyleGAN 2 to generate synthetic morphs. We also conduct extensive experiments to assess the vulnerability of four state-of-the-art face recognition systems, including FaceNet, VGG-Face, ArcFace, and ISV. Surprisingly, the experiments demonstrate that, although visually more appealing, morphs based on StyleGAN 2 do not pose a significant threat to the state to face recognition systems, as these morphs were outmatched by the simple morphs that are based facial landmarks.
summary: Morphing attacks are a threat to biometric systems where the biometric reference in an identity document can be altered. This form of attack presents an important issue in applications relying on identity documents such as border security or access control. Research in generation of face morphs and their detection is developing rapidly, however very few datasets with morphing attacks and open-source detection toolkits are publicly available. This paper bridges this gap by providing two datasets and the corresponding code for four types of morphing attacks: two that rely on facial landmarks based on OpenCV and FaceMorpher, and two that use StyleGAN 2 to generate synthetic morphs. We also conduct extensive experiments to assess the vulnerability of four state-of-the-art face recognition systems, including FaceNet, VGG-Face, ArcFace, and ISV. Surprisingly, the experiments demonstrate that, although visually more appealing, morphs based on StyleGAN 2 do not pose a significant threat to the state to face recognition systems, as these morphs were outmatched by the simple morphs that are based facial landmarks.
abstract_zh: 变形攻击对生物识别系统构成威胁，其中身份证件中的生物识别参考可以被更改。这种形式的攻击在依赖身份证件的应用程序（例如边境安全或访问控制）中提出了一个重要问题。人脸变形生成及其检测的研究正在迅速发展，但是公开的具有变形攻击的数据集和开源检测工具包却很少。本文通过提供两个数据集和四种变形攻击的相应代码来弥补这一差距：两种攻击依赖于基于 OpenCV 和 FaceMorpher 的面部标志，另两种使用 StyleGAN 2 生成合成变形。我们还进行了大量的实验来评估四种最先进的人脸识别系统的漏洞，包括 FaceNet、VGG-Face、ArcFace 和 ISV。令人惊讶的是，实验表明，虽然视觉上更有吸引力，但基于 StyleGAN 2 的变形不会对人脸识别系统的状态构成重大威胁，因为这些变形被基于面部标志的简单变形所超越。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于GAN的面部形态攻击对人脸识别系统的威胁，并构建数据集与检测工具进行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的形态攻击数据集和检测工具匮乏，且需明确GAN生成的形态攻击是否构成实际威胁。
AI.method: 构建两个形态攻击数据集，包含基于面部标志点（OpenCV/FaceMorpher）和StyleGAN 2生成的四种攻击类型，并测试FaceNet、VGG-Face等四类人脸识别系统的抗攻击能力。
AI.result: 实验显示，视觉效果更佳的StyleGAN 2生成攻击未显著威胁现有系统，而基于面部标志点的简单攻击更具破坏性。
AI.conclusion: 当前主流人脸识别系统对StyleGAN 2生成的形态攻击具有较强鲁棒性，但传统基于标志点的攻击仍需警惕。

authors_text: Guozheng Li,Xu Chen,Peng Wang,Jiafeng Xie,Qiqing Luo
title: FastRE: Towards Fast Relation Extraction with Convolutional Encoder and Improved Cascade Binary Tagging Framework
title_zh: FastRE：使用卷积编码器和改进的级联二进制标记框架实现快速关系提取
abstract: Recent work for extracting relations from texts has achieved excellent performance. However, most existing methods pay less attention to the efficiency, making it still challenging to quickly extract relations from massive or streaming text data in realistic scenarios. The main efficiency bottleneck is that these methods use a Transformer-based pre-trained language model for encoding, which heavily affects the training speed and inference speed. To address this issue, we propose a fast relation extraction model (FastRE) based on convolutional encoder and improved cascade binary tagging framework. Compared to previous work, FastRE employs several innovations to improve efficiency while also keeping promising performance. Concretely, FastRE adopts a novel convolutional encoder architecture combined with dilated convolution, gated unit and residual connection, which significantly reduces the computation cost of training and inference, while maintaining the satisfactory performance. Moreover, to improve the cascade binary tagging framework, FastRE first introduces a type-relation mapping mechanism to accelerate tagging efficiency and alleviate relation redundancy, and then utilizes a position-dependent adaptive thresholding strategy to obtain higher tagging accuracy and better model generalization. Experimental results demonstrate that FastRE is well balanced between efficiency and performance, and achieves 3-10x training speed, 7-15x inference speed faster, and 1/100 parameters compared to the state-of-the-art models, while the performance is still competitive.
summary: Recent work for extracting relations from texts has achieved excellent performance. However, most existing methods pay less attention to the efficiency, making it still challenging to quickly extract relations from massive or streaming text data in realistic scenarios. The main efficiency bottleneck is that these methods use a Transformer-based pre-trained language model for encoding, which heavily affects the training speed and inference speed. To address this issue, we propose a fast relation extraction model (FastRE) based on convolutional encoder and improved cascade binary tagging framework. Compared to previous work, FastRE employs several innovations to improve efficiency while also keeping promising performance. Concretely, FastRE adopts a novel convolutional encoder architecture combined with dilated convolution, gated unit and residual connection, which significantly reduces the computation cost of training and inference, while maintaining the satisfactory performance. Moreover, to improve the cascade binary tagging framework, FastRE first introduces a type-relation mapping mechanism to accelerate tagging efficiency and alleviate relation redundancy, and then utilizes a position-dependent adaptive thresholding strategy to obtain higher tagging accuracy and better model generalization. Experimental results demonstrate that FastRE is well balanced between efficiency and performance, and achieves 3-10x training speed, 7-15x inference speed faster, and 1/100 parameters compared to the state-of-the-art models, while the performance is still competitive.
abstract_zh: 最近从文本中提取关系的工作取得了出色的性能。然而，大多数现有方法不太关注效率，这使得在现实场景中从海量或流式文本数据中快速提取关系仍然具有挑战性。主要的效率瓶颈是这些方法使用基于Transformer的预训练语言模型进行编码，这严重影响了训练速度和推理速度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于卷积编码器和改进的级联二进制标记框架的快速关系提取模型（FastRE）。与之前的工作相比，FastRE 采用了多项创新来提高效率，同时保持良好的性能。具体来说，FastRE采用了一种新颖的卷积编码器架构，结合了扩张卷积、门控单元和残差连接，显着降低了训练和推理的计算成本，同时保持了令人满意的性能。此外，为了改进级联二进制标记框架，FastRE首先引入类型关系映射机制来加速标记效率并减轻关系冗余，然后利用位置相关的自适应阈值策略来获得更高的标记精度和更好的模型泛化能力。实验结果表明，FastRE在效率和性能之间取得了很好的平衡，与最先进的模型相比，训练速度提高了3-10倍，推理速度提高了7-15倍，参数减少了1/100，而性能仍然具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FastRE的快速关系抽取模型，通过卷积编码器和改进的级联二值标记框架，在保持性能的同时显著提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有关系抽取方法依赖Transformer编码器，导致训练和推理速度慢，难以处理大规模或流式文本数据，亟需兼顾效率与性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用包含空洞卷积、门控单元和残差连接的卷积编码器以降低计算成本，并引入类型-关系映射机制和位置自适应阈值策略优化级联二值标记框架。
AI.result: FastRE相较最先进模型训练速度提升3-10倍，推理速度提升7-15倍，参数量减少至1/100，同时保持竞争力的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: FastRE通过架构创新在效率与性能间取得良好平衡，为大规模文本关系抽取提供了高效可行的解决方案。

search_text: FastRE: Towards Fast Relation Extraction with Convolutional Encoder and Improved Cascade Binary Tagging Framework FastRE：使用卷积编码器和改进的级联二进制标记框架实现快速关系提取 Recent work for extracting relations from texts has achieved excellent performance. However, most existing methods pay less attention to the efficiency, making it still challenging to quickly extract relations from massive or streaming text data in realistic scenarios. The main efficiency bottleneck is that these methods use a Transformer-based pre-trained language model for encoding, which heavily affects the training speed and inference speed. To address this issue, we propose a fast relation extraction model (FastRE) based on convolutional encoder and improved cascade binary tagging framework. Compared to previous work, FastRE employs several innovations to improve efficiency while also keeping promising performance. Concretely, FastRE adopts a novel convolutional encoder architecture combined with dilated convolution, gated unit and residual connection, which significantly reduces the computation cost of training and inference, while maintaining the satisfactory performance. Moreover, to improve the cascade binary tagging framework, FastRE first introduces a type-relation mapping mechanism to accelerate tagging efficiency and alleviate relation redundancy, and then utilizes a position-dependent adaptive thresholding strategy to obtain higher tagging accuracy and better model generalization. Experimental results demonstrate that FastRE is well balanced between efficiency and performance, and achieves 3-10x training speed, 7-15x inference speed faster, and 1/100 parameters compared to the state-of-the-art models, while the performance is still competitive. 最近从文本中提取关系的工作取得了出色的性能。然而，大多数现有方法不太关注效率，这使得在现实场景中从海量或流式文本数据中快速提取关系仍然具有挑战性。主要的效率瓶颈是这些方法使用基于Transformer的预训练语言模型进行编码，这严重影响了训练速度和推理速度。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于卷积编码器和改进的级联二进制标记框架的快速关系提取模型（FastRE）。与之前的工作相比，FastRE 采用了多项创新来提高效率，同时保持良好的性能。具体来说，FastRE采用了一种新颖的卷积编码器架构，结合了扩张卷积、门控单元和残差连接，显着降低了训练和推理的计算成本，同时保持了令人满意的性能。此外，为了改进级联二进制标记框架，FastRE首先引入类型关系映射机制来加速标记效率并减轻关系冗余，然后利用位置相关的自适应阈值策略来获得更高的标记精度和更好的模型泛化能力。实验结果表明，FastRE在效率和性能之间取得了很好的平衡，与最先进的模型相比，训练速度提高了3-10倍，推理速度提高了7-15倍，参数减少了1/100，而性能仍然具有竞争力。 本文提出一种名为FastRE的快速关系抽取模型，通过卷积编码器和改进的级联二值标记框架，在保持性能的同时显著提升效率。 Guozheng Li,Xu Chen,Peng Wang,Jiafeng Xie,Qiqing Luo cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kai Cheng,Hao Chen,Wei Yin,Guangkai Xu,Xuejin Chen
title: Exploiting Correspondences with All-pairs Correlations for Multi-view Depth Estimation
title_zh: 利用全对相关性进行多视图深度估计
abstract: Multi-view depth estimation plays a critical role in reconstructing and understanding the 3D world. Recent learning-based methods have made significant progress in it. However, multi-view depth estimation is fundamentally a correspondence-based optimization problem, but previous learning-based methods mainly rely on predefined depth hypotheses to build correspondence as the cost volume and implicitly regularize it to fit depth prediction, deviating from the essence of iterative optimization based on stereo correspondence. Thus, they suffer unsatisfactory precision and generalization capability. In this paper, we are the first to explore more general image correlations to establish correspondences dynamically for depth estimation. We design a novel iterative multi-view depth estimation framework mimicking the optimization process, which consists of 1) a correlation volume construction module that models the pixel similarity between a reference image and source images as all-to-all correlations; 2) a flow-based depth initialization module that estimates the depth from the 2D optical flow; 3) a novel correlation-guided depth refinement module that reprojects points in different views to effectively fetch relevant correlations for further fusion and integrate the fused correlation for iterative depth update. Without predefined depth hypotheses, the fused correlations establish multi-view correspondence in an efficient way and guide the depth refinement heuristically. We conduct sufficient experiments on ScanNet, DeMoN, ETH3D, and 7Scenes to demonstrate the superiority of our method on multi-view depth estimation and its best generalization ability.
summary: Multi-view depth estimation plays a critical role in reconstructing and understanding the 3D world. Recent learning-based methods have made significant progress in it. However, multi-view depth estimation is fundamentally a correspondence-based optimization problem, but previous learning-based methods mainly rely on predefined depth hypotheses to build correspondence as the cost volume and implicitly regularize it to fit depth prediction, deviating from the essence of iterative optimization based on stereo correspondence. Thus, they suffer unsatisfactory precision and generalization capability. In this paper, we are the first to explore more general image correlations to establish correspondences dynamically for depth estimation. We design a novel iterative multi-view depth estimation framework mimicking the optimization process, which consists of 1) a correlation volume construction module that models the pixel similarity between a reference image and source images as all-to-all correlations; 2) a flow-based depth initialization module that estimates the depth from the 2D optical flow; 3) a novel correlation-guided depth refinement module that reprojects points in different views to effectively fetch relevant correlations for further fusion and integrate the fused correlation for iterative depth update. Without predefined depth hypotheses, the fused correlations establish multi-view correspondence in an efficient way and guide the depth refinement heuristically. We conduct sufficient experiments on ScanNet, DeMoN, ETH3D, and 7Scenes to demonstrate the superiority of our method on multi-view depth estimation and its best generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 多视图深度估计在重建和理解 3D 世界中起着至关重要的作用。最近基于学习的方法在这方面取得了重大进展。然而，多视深度估计本质上是一个基于对应的优化问题，但之前的基于学习的方法主要依靠预定义的深度假设来构建对应作为成本量，并隐式正则化它以适应深度预测，背离了基于立体对应的迭代优化的本质。因此，它们的精度和泛化能力不能令人满意。在本文中，我们首次探索更一般的图像相关性，以动态建立对应关系以进行深度估计。我们设计了一种模仿优化过程的新颖的迭代多视图深度估计框架，其中包括：1）相关体构建模块，将参考图像和源图像之间的像素相似性建模为全部相关性； 2）基于流的深度初始化模块，从2D光流估计深度； 3）一种新颖的相关性引导深度细化模块，可以重新投影不同视图中的点，以有效获取相关相关性以进一步融合，并整合融合相关性以进行迭代深度更新。在没有预定义深度假设的情况下，融合相关性可以有效地建立多视图对应，并启发式地指导深度细化。我们在 ScanNet、DeMoN、ETH3D 和 7Scenes 上进行了充分的实验，以证明我们的方法在多视图深度估计方面的优越性及其最佳泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全对关联的多视角深度估计框架，通过动态建立对应关系提升深度预测精度与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有学习方法依赖预定义深度假设构建代价体，偏离了基于立体匹配的迭代优化本质，导致精度与泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 设计包含全关联体积构建、光流初始化与关联引导深度优化三模块的迭代框架，无需预设深度假设即可高效建立多视角对应关系。
AI.result: 在ScanNet、ETH3D等数据集上验证了方法在多视角深度估计任务中的优越性及最佳泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态利用全对图像关联，所提框架有效实现了更精准的多视角深度估计，为基于对应关系的优化方法提供了新方向。

search_text: Exploiting Correspondences with All-pairs Correlations for Multi-view Depth Estimation 利用全对相关性进行多视图深度估计 Multi-view depth estimation plays a critical role in reconstructing and understanding the 3D world. Recent learning-based methods have made significant progress in it. However, multi-view depth estimation is fundamentally a correspondence-based optimization problem, but previous learning-based methods mainly rely on predefined depth hypotheses to build correspondence as the cost volume and implicitly regularize it to fit depth prediction, deviating from the essence of iterative optimization based on stereo correspondence. Thus, they suffer unsatisfactory precision and generalization capability. In this paper, we are the first to explore more general image correlations to establish correspondences dynamically for depth estimation. We design a novel iterative multi-view depth estimation framework mimicking the optimization process, which consists of 1) a correlation volume construction module that models the pixel similarity between a reference image and source images as all-to-all correlations; 2) a flow-based depth initialization module that estimates the depth from the 2D optical flow; 3) a novel correlation-guided depth refinement module that reprojects points in different views to effectively fetch relevant correlations for further fusion and integrate the fused correlation for iterative depth update. Without predefined depth hypotheses, the fused correlations establish multi-view correspondence in an efficient way and guide the depth refinement heuristically. We conduct sufficient experiments on ScanNet, DeMoN, ETH3D, and 7Scenes to demonstrate the superiority of our method on multi-view depth estimation and its best generalization ability. 多视图深度估计在重建和理解 3D 世界中起着至关重要的作用。最近基于学习的方法在这方面取得了重大进展。然而，多视深度估计本质上是一个基于对应的优化问题，但之前的基于学习的方法主要依靠预定义的深度假设来构建对应作为成本量，并隐式正则化它以适应深度预测，背离了基于立体对应的迭代优化的本质。因此，它们的精度和泛化能力不能令人满意。在本文中，我们首次探索更一般的图像相关性，以动态建立对应关系以进行深度估计。我们设计了一种模仿优化过程的新颖的迭代多视图深度估计框架，其中包括：1）相关体构建模块，将参考图像和源图像之间的像素相似性建模为全部相关性； 2）基于流的深度初始化模块，从2D光流估计深度； 3）一种新颖的相关性引导深度细化模块，可以重新投影不同视图中的点，以有效获取相关相关性以进一步融合，并整合融合相关性以进行迭代深度更新。在没有预定义深度假设的情况下，融合相关性可以有效地建立多视图对应，并启发式地指导深度细化。我们在 ScanNet、DeMoN、ETH3D 和 7Scenes 上进行了充分的实验，以证明我们的方法在多视图深度估计方面的优越性及其最佳泛化能力。 本文提出一种基于全对关联的多视角深度估计框架，通过动态建立对应关系提升深度预测精度与泛化能力。 Kai Cheng,Hao Chen,Wei Yin,Guangkai Xu,Xuejin Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Neeraj Chhimwal,Anirudh Gupta,Rishabh Gaur,Harveen Singh Chadha,Priyanshi Shah,Ankur Dhuriya,Vivek Raghavan
title: Speaker Recognition in the Wild
title_zh: 野外说话人识别
comment: This paper was submitted to Interspeech 2022
comments: This paper was submitted to Interspeech 2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a pipeline to find the number of speakers, as well as audios belonging to each of these now identified speakers in a source of audio data where number of speakers or speaker labels are not known a priori. We used this approach as a part of our Data Preparation pipeline for Speech Recognition in Indic Languages (https://github.com/Open-Speech-EkStep/vakyansh-wav2vec2-experimentation). To understand and evaluate the accuracy of our proposed pipeline, we introduce two metrics: Cluster Purity, and Cluster Uniqueness. Cluster Purity quantifies how "pure" a cluster is. Cluster Uniqueness, on the other hand, quantifies what percentage of clusters belong only to a single dominant speaker. We discuss more on these metrics in section \ref{sec:metrics}. Since we develop this utility to aid us in identifying data based on speaker IDs before training an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model, and since most of this data takes considerable effort to scrape, we also conclude that 98\% of data gets mapped to the top 80\% of clusters (computed by removing any clusters with less than a fixed number of utterances -- we do this to get rid of some very small clusters and use this threshold as 30), in the test set chosen.
summary: In this paper, we propose a pipeline to find the number of speakers, as well as audios belonging to each of these now identified speakers in a source of audio data where number of speakers or speaker labels are not known a priori. We used this approach as a part of our Data Preparation pipeline for Speech Recognition in Indic Languages (https://github.com/Open-Speech-EkStep/vakyansh-wav2vec2-experimentation). To understand and evaluate the accuracy of our proposed pipeline, we introduce two metrics: Cluster Purity, and Cluster Uniqueness. Cluster Purity quantifies how "pure" a cluster is. Cluster Uniqueness, on the other hand, quantifies what percentage of clusters belong only to a single dominant speaker. We discuss more on these metrics in section \ref{sec:metrics}. Since we develop this utility to aid us in identifying data based on speaker IDs before training an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model, and since most of this data takes considerable effort to scrape, we also conclude that 98\% of data gets mapped to the top 80\% of clusters (computed by removing any clusters with less than a fixed number of utterances -- we do this to get rid of some very small clusters and use this threshold as 30), in the test set chosen.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种管道来查找说话者的数量，以及属于音频数据源中现在识别出的每个说话者的音频，其中说话者的数量或说话者标签事先未知。我们使用这种方法作为印度语言语音识别数据准备管道的一部分 (https://github.com/Open-Speech-EkStep/vakyansh-wav2vec2-experimentation)。为了理解和评估我们提出的管道的准确性，我们引入了两个指标：集群纯度和集群唯一性。簇纯度量化了簇的“纯度”程度。另一方面，集群唯一性量化了集群中仅属于单个主导说话者的百分比。我们在 \ref{sec:metrics} 节中讨论有关这些指标的更多信息。由于我们开发此实用程序是为了帮助我们在训练自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型之前根据说话者 ID 识别数据，并且由于大多数数据需要花费大量精力来抓取，因此我们还得出结论，在所选测试集中，98\% 的数据被映射到前 80\% 的集群（通过删除任何少于固定数量话语的集群来计算 - 我们这样做是为了摆脱一些非常小的集群，并将此阈值设置为 30）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需预先知道说话人数量和标签的音频数据说话人识别流水线，用于语音识别的数据准备。
AI.motivation: 在训练自动语音识别（ASR）模型前，需要根据说话人ID对数据进行分类，而采集这些数据成本较高，因此需要高效的识别方法。
AI.method: 通过聚类算法将音频数据分组，并引入聚类纯度（Cluster Purity）和聚类唯一性（Cluster Uniqueness）两个指标评估聚类效果。
AI.result: 测试集中的98%数据被映射到保留的80%聚类（去除utterance数量少于30的小聚类）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效识别主要说话人聚类，为后续ASR训练提供高质量数据支持。
