search_text: Speaker Recognition in the Wild 野外说话人识别 In this paper, we propose a pipeline to find the number of speakers, as well as audios belonging to each of these now identified speakers in a source of audio data where number of speakers or speaker labels are not known a priori. We used this approach as a part of our Data Preparation pipeline for Speech Recognition in Indic Languages (https://github.com/Open-Speech-EkStep/vakyansh-wav2vec2-experimentation). To understand and evaluate the accuracy of our proposed pipeline, we introduce two metrics: Cluster Purity, and Cluster Uniqueness. Cluster Purity quantifies how "pure" a cluster is. Cluster Uniqueness, on the other hand, quantifies what percentage of clusters belong only to a single dominant speaker. We discuss more on these metrics in section \ref{sec:metrics}. Since we develop this utility to aid us in identifying data based on speaker IDs before training an Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model, and since most of this data takes considerable effort to scrape, we also conclude that 98\% of data gets mapped to the top 80\% of clusters (computed by removing any clusters with less than a fixed number of utterances -- we do this to get rid of some very small clusters and use this threshold as 30), in the test set chosen. 在本文中，我们提出了一种管道来查找说话者的数量，以及属于音频数据源中现在识别出的每个说话者的音频，其中说话者的数量或说话者标签事先未知。我们使用这种方法作为印度语言语音识别数据准备管道的一部分 (https://github.com/Open-Speech-EkStep/vakyansh-wav2vec2-experimentation)。为了理解和评估我们提出的管道的准确性，我们引入了两个指标：集群纯度和集群唯一性。簇纯度量化了簇的“纯度”程度。另一方面，集群唯一性量化了集群中仅属于单个主导说话者的百分比。我们在 \ref{sec:metrics} 节中讨论有关这些指标的更多信息。由于我们开发此实用程序是为了帮助我们在训练自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型之前根据说话者 ID 识别数据，并且由于大多数数据需要花费大量精力来抓取，因此我们还得出结论，在所选测试集中，98\% 的数据被映射到前 80\% 的集群（通过删除任何少于固定数量话语的集群来计算 - 我们这样做是为了摆脱一些非常小的集群，并将此阈值设置为 30）。 本文提出了一种无需预先知道说话人数量和标签的音频数据说话人识别流水线，用于语音识别的数据准备。 Neeraj Chhimwal,Anirudh Gupta,Rishabh Gaur,Harveen Singh Chadha,Priyanshi Shah,Ankur Dhuriya,Vivek Raghavan cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Chi-Yeh Chen
title: Scheduling Coflows with Precedence Constraints for Minimizing the Total Weighted Completion Time in Identical Parallel Networks
title_zh: 具有优先约束的协流调度，以最小化相同并行网络中的总加权完成时间
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.02651; text overlap with arXiv:2204.07799
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.02651; text overlap with arXiv:2204.07799
abstract: Coflow is a recently proposed network abstraction for data-parallel computing applications. This paper considers scheduling coflows with precedence constraints in identical parallel networks, such as to minimize the total weighted completion time of coflows. The identical parallel network is an architecture based on multiple network cores running in parallel. In the divisible coflow scheduling problem, the proposed algorithm achieves $(6-\frac{2}{m})μ$ and $(5-\frac{2}{m})μ$ approximate ratios for arbitrary release time and zero release time, respectively, where $m$ is the number of network cores and $μ$ is the coflow number of the longest path in the precedence graph. In the indivisible coflow scheduling problem, the proposed algorithm achieves $(4m+1)μ$ and $4mμ$ approximate ratios for arbitrary release time and zero release time, respectively. In the single network core scheduling problem, we propose a $5μ$-approximation algorithm with arbitrary release times, and a $4μ$-approximation without release time. Moreover, the proposed algorithm can be modified to solve the coflows of multi-stage jobs scheduling problem. In multi-stage jobs, coflow is transferred between servers to enable starting of next stage. This means that there are precedence constraints between coflows of job. Our result represents an improvement upon the previous best approximation ratio of $O(\tildeμ \log(N)/ \log(\log(N)))$ where $\tildeμ$ is the maximum number of coflows in a job and $N$ is the number of servers.
summary: Coflow is a recently proposed network abstraction for data-parallel computing applications. This paper considers scheduling coflows with precedence constraints in identical parallel networks, such as to minimize the total weighted completion time of coflows. The identical parallel network is an architecture based on multiple network cores running in parallel. In the divisible coflow scheduling problem, the proposed algorithm achieves $(6-\frac{2}{m})μ$ and $(5-\frac{2}{m})μ$ approximate ratios for arbitrary release time and zero release time, respectively, where $m$ is the number of network cores and $μ$ is the coflow number of the longest path in the precedence graph. In the indivisible coflow scheduling problem, the proposed algorithm achieves $(4m+1)μ$ and $4mμ$ approximate ratios for arbitrary release time and zero release time, respectively. In the single network core scheduling problem, we propose a $5μ$-approximation algorithm with arbitrary release times, and a $4μ$-approximation without release time. Moreover, the proposed algorithm can be modified to solve the coflows of multi-stage jobs scheduling problem. In multi-stage jobs, coflow is transferred between servers to enable starting of next stage. This means that there are precedence constraints between coflows of job. Our result represents an improvement upon the previous best approximation ratio of $O(\tildeμ \log(N)/ \log(\log(N)))$ where $\tildeμ$ is the maximum number of coflows in a job and $N$ is the number of servers.
abstract_zh: Coflow 是最近提出的数据并行计算应用程序的网络抽象。本文考虑在相同的并行网络中调度具有优先约束的协流，例如最小化协流的总加权完成时间。同并行网络是基于多个网络核心并行运行的架构。在可分协流调度问题中，该算法在任意释放时间和零释放时间上分别实现$(6-\frac{2}{m})μ$和$(5-\frac{2}{m})μ$近似比率，其中$m$是网络核心数，$μ$是优先图中最长路径的协流数。在不可分协流调度问题中，该算法对于任意释放时间和零释放时间分别实现了$(4m+1)μ$和$4mμ$近似比率。在单网络核心调度问题中，我们提出了具有任意释放时间的$5μ$近似算法和无释放时间的$4μ$近似算法。此外，可以修改所提出的算法来解决多阶段作业调度问题的协流。在多阶段作业中，协流在服务器之间传输，以启动下一阶段。这意味着作业协同流之间存在优先级约束。我们的结果代表了之前最佳近似率 $O(\tildeμ \log(N)/ \log(\log(N)))$ 的改进，其中 $\tildeμ$ 是作业中协同流的最大数量，$N$ 是服务器数量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在相同并行网络中调度具有优先级约束的coflow，以最小化总加权完成时间。
AI.motivation: 数据并行计算应用中，coflow调度需处理优先级约束和多核并行网络的复杂性，传统方法难以高效满足最小化总加权完成时间的需求。
AI.method: 提出针对可分与不可分coflow的调度算法，结合网络核心数和优先级图最长路径参数μ，设计不同释放时间场景的近似比方案，并扩展至多阶段作业调度。
AI.result: 可分coflow算法在任意释放时间下达到(6-2/m)μ近似比，在零释放时间下为(5-2/m)μ；不可分coflow算法分别为(4m+1)μ和4mμ；单核场景下分别达到5μ和4μ近似比，优于先前O(μ̃ log N / log log N)的复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 本文算法通过优化近似比，显著提升了具有优先级约束的coflow在并行网络中的调度效率，为多阶段作业调度提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jiongyu Guo,Defang Chen,Can Wang
title: Alignahead: Online Cross-Layer Knowledge Extraction on Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: Alignhead：图神经网络上的在线跨层知识提取
abstract: Existing knowledge distillation methods on graph neural networks (GNNs) are almost offline, where the student model extracts knowledge from a powerful teacher model to improve its performance. However, a pre-trained teacher model is not always accessible due to training cost, privacy, etc. In this paper, we propose a novel online knowledge distillation framework to resolve this problem. Specifically, each student GNN model learns the extracted local structure from another simultaneously trained counterpart in an alternating training procedure. We further develop a cross-layer distillation strategy by aligning ahead one student layer with the layer in different depth of another student model, which theoretically makes the structure information spread over all layers. Experimental results on five datasets including PPI, Coauthor-CS/Physics and Amazon-Computer/Photo demonstrate that the student performance is consistently boosted in our collaborative training framework without the supervision of a pre-trained teacher model. In addition, we also find that our alignahead technique can accelerate the model convergence speed and its effectiveness can be generally improved by increasing the student numbers in training. Code is available: https://github.com/GuoJY-eatsTG/Alignahead
summary: Existing knowledge distillation methods on graph neural networks (GNNs) are almost offline, where the student model extracts knowledge from a powerful teacher model to improve its performance. However, a pre-trained teacher model is not always accessible due to training cost, privacy, etc. In this paper, we propose a novel online knowledge distillation framework to resolve this problem. Specifically, each student GNN model learns the extracted local structure from another simultaneously trained counterpart in an alternating training procedure. We further develop a cross-layer distillation strategy by aligning ahead one student layer with the layer in different depth of another student model, which theoretically makes the structure information spread over all layers. Experimental results on five datasets including PPI, Coauthor-CS/Physics and Amazon-Computer/Photo demonstrate that the student performance is consistently boosted in our collaborative training framework without the supervision of a pre-trained teacher model. In addition, we also find that our alignahead technique can accelerate the model convergence speed and its effectiveness can be generally improved by increasing the student numbers in training. Code is available: https://github.com/GuoJY-eatsTG/Alignahead
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）上现有的知识蒸馏方法几乎是离线的，其中学生模型从强大的教师模型中提取知识以提高其性能。然而，由于训练成本、隐私等原因，预训练的教师模型并不总是可用的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的在线知识蒸馏框架来解决这个问题。具体来说，每个学生 GNN 模型在交替训练过程中从另一个同时训练的对应模型中学习提取的局部结构。我们进一步开发了一种跨层蒸馏策略，将一个学生层与另一个学生模型不同深度的层对齐，理论上使结构信息分布在所有层上。在包括 PPI、Coauthor-CS/Physics 和 Amazon-Computer/Photo 在内的五个数据集上的实验结果表明，在没有预先训练的教师模型的监督的情况下，在我们的协作培训框架中学生的表现持续得到提高。此外，我们还发现我们的alignahead技术可以加快模型收敛速度，并且通过增加训练中的学生数量可以普遍提高其有效性。代码可用：https://github.com/GuoJY-eatsTG/Alignahead

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线跨层知识蒸馏框架Alignahead，解决图神经网络中无预训练教师模型时的知识提取问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN知识蒸馏方法依赖预训练教师模型，但实际场景中因训练成本或隐私问题难以获取教师模型。
AI.method: 通过交替训练多个学生模型，使学生模型间相互提取局部结构知识，并采用跨层对齐策略提前匹配不同深度的模型层。
AI.result: 在五个数据集实验中，学生模型性能显著提升且收敛速度加快，增加学生数量可进一步增强效果。
AI.conclusion: Alignahead框架无需预训练教师模型即可实现有效知识蒸馏，且多学生协作训练能提升整体性能。

motivation: 现有GNN知识蒸馏方法依赖预训练教师模型，但实际场景中因训练成本或隐私问题难以获取教师模型。
method: 通过交替训练多个学生模型，使学生模型间相互提取局部结构知识，并采用跨层对齐策略提前匹配不同深度的模型层。
result: 在五个数据集实验中，学生模型性能显著提升且收敛速度加快，增加学生数量可进一步增强效果。
conclusion: Alignahead框架无需预训练教师模型即可实现有效知识蒸馏，且多学生协作训练能提升整体性能。
search_text: Alignahead: Online Cross-Layer Knowledge Extraction on Graph Neural Networks Alignhead：图神经网络上的在线跨层知识提取 Existing knowledge distillation methods on graph neural networks (GNNs) are almost offline, where the student model extracts knowledge from a powerful teacher model to improve its performance. However, a pre-trained teacher model is not always accessible due to training cost, privacy, etc. In this paper, we propose a novel online knowledge distillation framework to resolve this problem. Specifically, each student GNN model learns the extracted local structure from another simultaneously trained counterpart in an alternating training procedure. We further develop a cross-layer distillation strategy by aligning ahead one student layer with the layer in different depth of another student model, which theoretically makes the structure information spread over all layers. Experimental results on five datasets including PPI, Coauthor-CS/Physics and Amazon-Computer/Photo demonstrate that the student performance is consistently boosted in our collaborative training framework without the supervision of a pre-trained teacher model. In addition, we also find that our alignahead technique can accelerate the model convergence speed and its effectiveness can be generally improved by increasing the student numbers in training. Code is available: https://github.com/GuoJY-eatsTG/Alignahead 图神经网络（GNN）上现有的知识蒸馏方法几乎是离线的，其中学生模型从强大的教师模型中提取知识以提高其性能。然而，由于训练成本、隐私等原因，预训练的教师模型并不总是可用的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的在线知识蒸馏框架来解决这个问题。具体来说，每个学生 GNN 模型在交替训练过程中从另一个同时训练的对应模型中学习提取的局部结构。我们进一步开发了一种跨层蒸馏策略，将一个学生层与另一个学生模型不同深度的层对齐，理论上使结构信息分布在所有层上。在包括 PPI、Coauthor-CS/Physics 和 Amazon-Computer/Photo 在内的五个数据集上的实验结果表明，在没有预先训练的教师模型的监督的情况下，在我们的协作培训框架中学生的表现持续得到提高。此外，我们还发现我们的alignahead技术可以加快模型收敛速度，并且通过增加训练中的学生数量可以普遍提高其有效性。代码可用：https://github.com/GuoJY-eatsTG/Alignahead 本文提出了一种在线跨层知识蒸馏框架Alignahead，解决图神经网络中无预训练教师模型时的知识提取问题。 Jiongyu Guo,Defang Chen,Can Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Feng Sun,Cong Bai
title: MMINR: Multi-frame-to-Multi-frame Inference with Noise Resistance for Precipitation Nowcasting with Radar
title_zh: MMINR：利用雷达进行临近降水预报的具有抗噪性的多帧到多帧推理
abstract: Precipitation nowcasting based on radar echo maps is essential in meteorological research. Recently, Convolutional RNNs based methods dominate this field, but they cannot be solved by parallel computation resulting in longer inference time. FCN based methods adopt a multi-frame-to-single-frame inference (MSI) strategy to avoid this problem. They feedback into the model again to predict the next time step to get multi-frame nowcasting results in the prediction phase, which will lead to the accumulation of prediction errors. In addition, precipitation noise is a crucial factor contributing to high prediction errors because of its unpredictability. To address this problem, we propose a novel Multi-frame-to-Multi-frame Inference (MMI) model with Noise Resistance (NR) named MMINR. It avoids error accumulation and resists precipitation noiseś negative effect in parallel computation. NR contains a Noise Dropout Module (NDM) and a Semantic Restore Module (SRM). NDM deliberately dropout noise simple yet efficient, and SRM supplements semantic information of features to alleviate the problem of semantic information mistakenly lost by NDM. Experimental results demonstrate that MMINR can attain competitive scores compared with other SOTAs. The ablation experiments show that the proposed NDM and SRM can solve the aforementioned problems.
summary: Precipitation nowcasting based on radar echo maps is essential in meteorological research. Recently, Convolutional RNNs based methods dominate this field, but they cannot be solved by parallel computation resulting in longer inference time. FCN based methods adopt a multi-frame-to-single-frame inference (MSI) strategy to avoid this problem. They feedback into the model again to predict the next time step to get multi-frame nowcasting results in the prediction phase, which will lead to the accumulation of prediction errors. In addition, precipitation noise is a crucial factor contributing to high prediction errors because of its unpredictability. To address this problem, we propose a novel Multi-frame-to-Multi-frame Inference (MMI) model with Noise Resistance (NR) named MMINR. It avoids error accumulation and resists precipitation noiseś negative effect in parallel computation. NR contains a Noise Dropout Module (NDM) and a Semantic Restore Module (SRM). NDM deliberately dropout noise simple yet efficient, and SRM supplements semantic information of features to alleviate the problem of semantic information mistakenly lost by NDM. Experimental results demonstrate that MMINR can attain competitive scores compared with other SOTAs. The ablation experiments show that the proposed NDM and SRM can solve the aforementioned problems.
abstract_zh: 基于雷达回波图的降水临近预报在气象研究中至关重要。最近，基于卷积 RNN 的方法在该领域占据主导地位，但它们无法通过并行计算来解决，从而导致推理时间更长。基于 FCN 的方法采用多帧到单帧推理（MSI）策略来避免这个问题。它们在预测阶段再次反馈到模型中以预测下一个时间步以获得多帧临近预报结果，这将导致预测误差的累积。此外，降水噪声因其不可预测性而成为导致高预测误差的关键因素。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的具有抗噪（NR）的多帧到多帧推理（MMI）模型，名为 MMINR。避免了并行计算中的误差累积并抵抗降水噪声的负面影响。 NR 包含噪声丢失模块 (NDM) 和语义恢复模块 (SRM)。 NDM故意丢弃噪声，简单而高效，SRM补充特征的语义信息，以缓解NDM错误丢失语义信息的问题。实验结果表明，与其他 SOTA 相比，MMINR 可以获得有竞争力的分数。消融实验表明，所提出的NDM和SRM可以解决上述问题。

AI.tldr: 提出MMINR模型，通过多帧到多帧推理和噪声抵抗机制，提升雷达降水临近预报的准确性与时效性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在推理时间长、误差累积及降水噪声影响预测精度的问题。
AI.method: 提出MMINR模型，包含多帧到多帧推理（MMI）和噪声抵抗（NR）机制，其中NR由噪声丢弃模块（NDM）和语义恢复模块（SRM）组成。
AI.result: 实验表明MMINR在精度上优于其他SOTA方法，消融实验验证了NDM和SRM的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MMINR有效解决了误差累积和噪声干扰问题，提升了降水临近预报的性能。

authors_text: Yuhang Liu,Wei Wei,Daowan Peng,Feida Zhu
title: Declaration-based Prompt Tuning for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 基于声明的视觉问答提示调整
comment: Accepted to IJCAI2022, data and codes are available at https://github.com/CCIIPLab/DPT
comments: Accepted to IJCAI2022, data and codes are available at https://github.com/CCIIPLab/DPT
abstract: In recent years, the pre-training-then-fine-tuning paradigm has yielded immense success on a wide spectrum of cross-modal tasks, such as visual question answering (VQA), in which a visual-language (VL) model is first optimized via self-supervised task objectives, e.g., masked language modeling (MLM) and image-text matching (ITM), and then fine-tuned to adapt to downstream task (e.g., VQA) via a brand-new objective function, e.g., answer prediction. The inconsistency of the objective forms not only severely limits the generalization of pre-trained VL models to downstream tasks, but also requires a large amount of labeled data for fine-tuning. To alleviate the problem, we propose an innovative VL fine-tuning paradigm (named Declaration-based Prompt Tuning, abbreviated as DPT), which jointly optimizes the objectives of pre-training and fine-tuning of VQA model, boosting the effective adaptation of pre-trained VL models to the downstream task. Specifically, DPT reformulates the objective form of VQA task via (1) textual adaptation, which converts the given questions into declarative sentence-form for prompt-tuning, and (2) task adaptation, which optimizes the objective function of VQA problem in the manner of pre-training phase. Experimental results on GQA dataset show that DPT outperforms the fine-tuned counterpart by a large margin regarding accuracy in both fully-supervised (2.68%) and zero-shot/few-shot (over 31%) settings. All the data and codes will be available to facilitate future research.
summary: In recent years, the pre-training-then-fine-tuning paradigm has yielded immense success on a wide spectrum of cross-modal tasks, such as visual question answering (VQA), in which a visual-language (VL) model is first optimized via self-supervised task objectives, e.g., masked language modeling (MLM) and image-text matching (ITM), and then fine-tuned to adapt to downstream task (e.g., VQA) via a brand-new objective function, e.g., answer prediction. The inconsistency of the objective forms not only severely limits the generalization of pre-trained VL models to downstream tasks, but also requires a large amount of labeled data for fine-tuning. To alleviate the problem, we propose an innovative VL fine-tuning paradigm (named Declaration-based Prompt Tuning, abbreviated as DPT), which jointly optimizes the objectives of pre-training and fine-tuning of VQA model, boosting the effective adaptation of pre-trained VL models to the downstream task. Specifically, DPT reformulates the objective form of VQA task via (1) textual adaptation, which converts the given questions into declarative sentence-form for prompt-tuning, and (2) task adaptation, which optimizes the objective function of VQA problem in the manner of pre-training phase. Experimental results on GQA dataset show that DPT outperforms the fine-tuned counterpart by a large margin regarding accuracy in both fully-supervised (2.68%) and zero-shot/few-shot (over 31%) settings. All the data and codes will be available to facilitate future research.
abstract_zh: 近年来，预训练然后微调范式在广泛的跨模态任务上取得了巨大的成功，例如视觉问答（VQA），其中视觉语言（VL）模型首先通过自监督任务目标（例如掩码语言建模（MLM）和图像文本匹配（ITM））进行优化，然后通过全新的目标函数进行微调以适应下游任务（例如VQA），例如，答案预测。目标形式的不一致不仅严重限制了预训练的VL模型向下游任务的推广，而且还需要大量的标记数据进行微调。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种创新的VL微调范式（名为Declaration-based Prompt Tuning，简称DPT），它联合优化了VQA模型预训练和微调的目标，促进了预训练VL模型对下游任务的有效适应。具体来说，DPT通过以下方式重新制定VQA任务的目标形式：（1）文本适应，将给定的问题转换为陈述句形式以进行提示调整；（2）任务适应，以预训练阶段的方式优化VQA问题的目标函数。 GQA 数据集上的实验结果表明，在完全监督（2.68%）和零样本/少样本（超过 31%）设置下，DPT 的准确性大幅优于微调的对应模型。所有数据和代码都将可用于促进未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于声明的提示调优方法（DPT），通过联合优化预训练和微调目标，提升视觉问答（VQA）模型对下游任务的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统预训练-微调范式中，预训练与微调目标形式的不一致性限制了视觉语言模型的泛化能力，并需要大量标注数据进行微调。
AI.method: DPT通过两方面改进：1）文本适配，将问题转换为陈述句形式进行提示调优；2）任务适配，以预训练阶段的方式优化VQA目标函数。
AI.result: 在GQA数据集上，DPT在全监督设置下比微调方法准确率提升2.68%，在零样本/少样本设置下提升超过31%。
AI.conclusion: DPT通过统一预训练与微调目标，有效提升了VQA模型性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现显著，且开源数据和代码促进后续研究。

Specifically, DPT reformulates the objective form of VQA task via (1) textual adaptation, which converts the given questions into declarative sentence-form for prompt-tuning, and (2) task adaptation, which optimizes the objective function of VQA problem in the manner of pre-training phase. Experimental results on GQA dataset show that DPT outperforms the fine-tuned counterpart by a large margin regarding accuracy in both fully-supervised (2.68%) and zero-shot/few-shot (over 31%) settings. All the data and codes will be available to facilitate future research. 近年来，预训练然后微调范式在广泛的跨模态任务上取得了巨大的成功，例如视觉问答（VQA），其中视觉语言（VL）模型首先通过自监督任务目标（例如掩码语言建模（MLM）和图像文本匹配（ITM））进行优化，然后通过全新的目标函数进行微调以适应下游任务（例如VQA），例如，答案预测。目标形式的不一致不仅严重限制了预训练的VL模型向下游任务的推广，而且还需要大量的标记数据进行微调。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种创新的VL微调范式（名为Declaration-based Prompt Tuning，简称DPT），它联合优化了VQA模型预训练和微调的目标，促进了预训练VL模型对下游任务的有效适应。具体来说，DPT通过以下方式重新制定VQA任务的目标形式：（1）文本适应，将给定的问题转换为陈述句形式以进行提示调整；（2）任务适应，以预训练阶段的方式优化VQA问题的目标函数。 GQA 数据集上的实验结果表明，在完全监督（2.68%）和零样本/少样本（超过 31%）设置下，DPT 的准确性大幅优于微调的对应模型。所有数据和代码都将可用于促进未来的研究。 本文提出了一种基于声明的提示调优方法（DPT），通过联合优化预训练和微调目标，提升视觉问答（VQA）模型对下游任务的适应能力。 Yuhang Liu,Wei Wei,Daowan Peng,Feida Zhu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Abhinav Joshi,Ashwani Bhat,Ayush Jain,Atin Vikram Singh,Ashutosh Modi
title: COGMEN: COntextualized GNN based Multimodal Emotion recognitioN
title_zh: COGMEN：基于上下文 GNN 的多模态情感识别
comment: 17 pages (9 main + 8 appendix). Accepted at NAACL 2022
comments: 17 pages (9 main + 8 appendix). Accepted at NAACL 2022
abstract: Emotions are an inherent part of human interactions, and consequently, it is imperative to develop AI systems that understand and recognize human emotions. During a conversation involving various people, a person's emotions are influenced by the other speaker's utterances and their own emotional state over the utterances. In this paper, we propose COntextualized Graph Neural Network based Multimodal Emotion recognitioN (COGMEN) system that leverages local information (i.e., inter/intra dependency between speakers) and global information (context). The proposed model uses Graph Neural Network (GNN) based architecture to model the complex dependencies (local and global information) in a conversation. Our model gives state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on IEMOCAP and MOSEI datasets, and detailed ablation experiments show the importance of modeling information at both levels.
summary: Emotions are an inherent part of human interactions, and consequently, it is imperative to develop AI systems that understand and recognize human emotions. During a conversation involving various people, a person's emotions are influenced by the other speaker's utterances and their own emotional state over the utterances. In this paper, we propose COntextualized Graph Neural Network based Multimodal Emotion recognitioN (COGMEN) system that leverages local information (i.e., inter/intra dependency between speakers) and global information (context). The proposed model uses Graph Neural Network (GNN) based architecture to model the complex dependencies (local and global information) in a conversation. Our model gives state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on IEMOCAP and MOSEI datasets, and detailed ablation experiments show the importance of modeling information at both levels.
abstract_zh: 情感是人类互动的固有组成部分，因此，开发能够理解和识别人类情感的人工智能系统势在必行。在涉及不同人的谈话中，一个人的情绪会受到对方的话语以及话语中自己的情绪状态的影响。在本文中，我们提出了基于上下文图神经网络的多模态情感识别（COGMEN）系统，该系统利用局部信息（即说话者之间的相互/内部依赖性）和全局信息（上下文）。所提出的模型使用基于图神经网络（GNN）的架构来对对话中的复杂依赖关系（本地和全局信息）进行建模。我们的模型在 IEMOCAP 和 MOSEI 数据集上给出了最先进的 (SOTA) 结果，详细的消融实验显示了两个级别上建模信息的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COGMEN系统，利用图神经网络（GNN）建模对话中的局部和全局信息，实现多模态情感识别。
AI.motivation: 人类情绪受对话中他人发言及自身状态影响，现有方法未能充分建模局部交互与全局上下文的复杂依赖关系。
AI.method: 基于GNN架构，同时建模说话人之间的局部依赖关系（如交互与自身情绪变化）及全局对话上下文信息。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和MOSEI数据集上取得最先进（SOTA）结果，消融实验证明局部与全局信息建模均不可或缺。
AI.conclusion: COGMEN通过整合局部交互与全局上下文信息，有效提升多模态情感识别性能，方法有效性得到实验验证。

authors_text: Fan Zhang,Qiuying Peng,Yulin Wu,Zheng Pan,Rong Zeng,Da Lin,Yue Qi
title: Multi-Graph based Multi-Scenario Recommendation in Large-scale Online Video Services
title_zh: 大规模在线视频服务中基于多图的多场景推荐
comment: Accepted to WWW 2022 Graph Learning workshop
comments: Accepted to WWW 2022 Graph Learning workshop
abstract: Recently, industrial recommendation services have been boosted by the continual upgrade of deep learning methods. However, they still face de-biasing challenges such as exposure bias and cold-start problem, where circulations of machine learning training on human interaction history leads algorithms to repeatedly suggest exposed items while ignoring less-active ones. Additional problems exist in multi-scenario platforms, e.g. appropriate data fusion from subsidiary scenarios, which we observe could be alleviated through graph structured data integration via message passing. In this paper, we present a multi-graph structured multi-scenario recommendation solution, which encapsulates interaction data across scenarios with multi-graph and obtains representation via graph learning. Extensive offline and online experiments on real-world datasets are conducted where the proposed method demonstrates an increase of 0.63% and 0.71% in CTR and Video Views per capita on new users over deployed set of baselines and outperforms regular method in increasing the number of outer-scenario videos by 25% and video watches by 116%, validating its superiority in activating cold videos and enriching target recommendation.
summary: Recently, industrial recommendation services have been boosted by the continual upgrade of deep learning methods. However, they still face de-biasing challenges such as exposure bias and cold-start problem, where circulations of machine learning training on human interaction history leads algorithms to repeatedly suggest exposed items while ignoring less-active ones. Additional problems exist in multi-scenario platforms, e.g. appropriate data fusion from subsidiary scenarios, which we observe could be alleviated through graph structured data integration via message passing. In this paper, we present a multi-graph structured multi-scenario recommendation solution, which encapsulates interaction data across scenarios with multi-graph and obtains representation via graph learning. Extensive offline and online experiments on real-world datasets are conducted where the proposed method demonstrates an increase of 0.63% and 0.71% in CTR and Video Views per capita on new users over deployed set of baselines and outperforms regular method in increasing the number of outer-scenario videos by 25% and video watches by 116%, validating its superiority in activating cold videos and enriching target recommendation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习方法的不断升级助推了行业推荐服务。然而，它们仍然面临着去偏见的挑战，例如暴露偏差和冷启动问题，其中关于人类交互历史的机器学习训练的循环导致算法重复建议暴露的项目，同时忽略不太活跃的项目。多场景平台还存在其他问题，例如我们观察到，来自附属场景的适当数据融合可以通过消息传递的图结构化数据集成来缓解。在本文中，我们提出了一种多图结构的多场景推荐解决方案，该解决方案用多图封装跨场景的交互数据，并通过图学习获得表示。在真实数据集上进行了大量的离线和在线实验，结果表明，所提出的方法在超过部署的一组基线时，新用户的点击率和人均视频观看次数分别增加了 0.63% 和 0.71%，并且在外场景视频数量增加 25% 和视频观看次数增加 116% 方面优于常规方法，验证了其在激活冷视频和丰富目标推荐方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多图结构的多场景推荐方法，解决大规模在线视频服务中的去偏和跨场景数据融合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统存在曝光偏差、冷启动问题及多场景数据难以有效融合的挑战，传统方法无法充分激活冷视频或提升跨场景推荐效果。
AI.method: 构建多图结构整合跨场景交互数据，通过图学习获取节点表示，并利用消息传递机制实现多场景信息融合。
AI.result: 新用户CTR提升0.63%，人均视频观看量增加0.71%，外场景视频播放量提升25%且视频观看次数增长116%。
AI.conclusion: 多图结构方法有效缓解了推荐偏差，显著激活冷视频并提升跨场景推荐效果，验证了其在工业场景中的优越性。

search_text: Multi-Graph based Multi-Scenario Recommendation in Large-scale Online Video Services 大规模在线视频服务中基于多图的多场景推荐 Recently, industrial recommendation services have been boosted by the continual upgrade of deep learning methods. However, they still face de-biasing challenges such as exposure bias and cold-start problem, where circulations of machine learning training on human interaction history leads algorithms to repeatedly suggest exposed items while ignoring less-active ones. Additional problems exist in multi-scenario platforms, e.g. appropriate data fusion from subsidiary scenarios, which we observe could be alleviated through graph structured data integration via message passing. In this paper, we present a multi-graph structured multi-scenario recommendation solution, which encapsulates interaction data across scenarios with multi-graph and obtains representation via graph learning. Extensive offline and online experiments on real-world datasets are conducted where the proposed method demonstrates an increase of 0.63% and 0.71% in CTR and Video Views per capita on new users over deployed set of baselines and outperforms regular method in increasing the number of outer-scenario videos by 25% and video watches by 116%, validating its superiority in activating cold videos and enriching target recommendation. 近年来，深度学习方法的不断升级助推了行业推荐服务。然而，它们仍然面临着去偏见的挑战，例如暴露偏差和冷启动问题，其中关于人类交互历史的机器学习训练的循环导致算法重复建议暴露的项目，同时忽略不太活跃的项目。多场景平台还存在其他问题，例如我们观察到，来自附属场景的适当数据融合可以通过消息传递的图结构化数据集成来缓解。在本文中，我们提出了一种多图结构的多场景推荐解决方案，该解决方案用多图封装跨场景的交互数据，并通过图学习获得表示。在真实数据集上进行了大量的离线和在线实验，结果表明，所提出的方法在超过部署的一组基线时，新用户的点击率和人均视频观看次数分别增加了 0.63% 和 0.71%，并且在外场景视频数量增加 25% 和视频观看次数增加 116% 方面优于常规方法，验证了其在激活冷视频和丰富目标推荐方面的优越性。 本文提出一种基于多图结构的多场景推荐方法，解决大规模在线视频服务中的去偏和跨场景数据融合问题。 Fan Zhang,Qiuying Peng,Yulin Wu,Zheng Pan,Rong Zeng,Da Lin,Yue Qi cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Rong Ye,Mingxuan Wang,Lei Li
title: Cross-modal Contrastive Learning for Speech Translation
title_zh: 语音翻译的跨模态对比学习
abstract: How can we learn unified representations for spoken utterances and their written text? Learning similar representations for semantically similar speech and text is important for speech translation. To this end, we propose ConST, a cross-modal contrastive learning method for end-to-end speech-to-text translation. We evaluate ConST and a variety of previous baselines on a popular benchmark MuST-C. Experiments show that the proposed ConST consistently outperforms the previous methods on, and achieves an average BLEU of 29.4. The analysis further verifies that ConST indeed closes the representation gap of different modalities -- its learned representation improves the accuracy of cross-modal speech-text retrieval from 4% to 88%. Code and models are available at https://github.com/ReneeYe/ConST.
summary: How can we learn unified representations for spoken utterances and their written text? Learning similar representations for semantically similar speech and text is important for speech translation. To this end, we propose ConST, a cross-modal contrastive learning method for end-to-end speech-to-text translation. We evaluate ConST and a variety of previous baselines on a popular benchmark MuST-C. Experiments show that the proposed ConST consistently outperforms the previous methods on, and achieves an average BLEU of 29.4. The analysis further verifies that ConST indeed closes the representation gap of different modalities -- its learned representation improves the accuracy of cross-modal speech-text retrieval from 4% to 88%. Code and models are available at https://github.com/ReneeYe/ConST.
abstract_zh: 我们如何学习口语及其书面文本的统一表示？学习语义相似的语音和文本的相似表示对于语音翻译很重要。为此，我们提出了ConST，一种用于端到端语音到文本翻译的跨模态对比学习方法。我们在流行的基准 MuST-C 上评估 ConST 和各种先前的基线。实验表明，所提出的 ConST 始终优于之前的方法，平均 BLEU 为 29.4。分析进一步验证了 ConST 确实缩小了不同模态的表示差距——其学习的表示将跨模态语音文本检索的准确性从 4% 提高到 88%。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ReneeYe/ConST 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态对比学习方法ConST，用于端到端的语音到文本翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 语音与文本的语义表示存在模态差异，如何学习统一的跨模态表示是提升语音翻译性能的关键。
AI.method: 设计跨模态对比学习框架ConST，通过对比学习对齐语音与文本的语义表示，缩小模态间表征差距。
AI.result: 在MuST-C基准测试中，ConST平均BLEU达到29.4，跨模态检索准确率从4%提升至88%。
AI.conclusion: ConST有效解决了语音与文本的跨模态表征对齐问题，显著提升了语音翻译与检索性能。

search_text: Cross-modal Contrastive Learning for Speech Translation 语音翻译的跨模态对比学习 How can we learn unified representations for spoken utterances and their written text? Learning similar representations for semantically similar speech and text is important for speech translation. To this end, we propose ConST, a cross-modal contrastive learning method for end-to-end speech-to-text translation. We evaluate ConST and a variety of previous baselines on a popular benchmark MuST-C. Experiments show that the proposed ConST consistently outperforms the previous methods on, and achieves an average BLEU of 29.4. The analysis further verifies that ConST indeed closes the representation gap of different modalities -- its learned representation improves the accuracy of cross-modal speech-text retrieval from 4% to 88%. Code and models are available at https://github.com/ReneeYe/ConST. 我们如何学习口语及其书面文本的统一表示？学习语义相似的语音和文本的相似表示对于语音翻译很重要。为此，我们提出了ConST，一种用于端到端语音到文本翻译的跨模态对比学习方法。我们在流行的基准 MuST-C 上评估 ConST 和各种先前的基线。实验表明，所提出的 ConST 始终优于之前的方法，平均 BLEU 为 29.4。分析进一步验证了 ConST 确实缩小了不同模态的表示差距——其学习的表示将跨模态语音文本检索的准确性从 4% 提高到 88%。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/ReneeYe/ConST 获取。 本文提出一种跨模态对比学习方法ConST，用于端到端的语音到文本翻译任务。 Rong Ye,Mingxuan Wang,Lei Li cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Qinghe Tian,Jean-Claude Franchitti
title: Text to artistic image generation
title_zh: 文本到艺术图像生成
abstract: Painting is one of the ways for people to express their ideas, but what if people with disabilities in hands want to paint? To tackle this challenge, we create an end-to-end solution that can generate artistic images from text descriptions. However, due to the lack of datasets with paired text description and artistic images, it is hard to directly train an algorithm which can create art based on text input. To address this issue, we split our task into three steps: (1) Generate a realistic image from a text description by using Dynamic Memory Generative Adversarial Network (arXiv:1904.01310), (2) Classify the image as a genre that exists in the WikiArt dataset using Resnet (arXiv: 1512.03385), (3) Select a style that is compatible with the genre and transfer it to the generated image by using neural artistic stylization network (arXiv:1705.06830).
summary: Painting is one of the ways for people to express their ideas, but what if people with disabilities in hands want to paint? To tackle this challenge, we create an end-to-end solution that can generate artistic images from text descriptions. However, due to the lack of datasets with paired text description and artistic images, it is hard to directly train an algorithm which can create art based on text input. To address this issue, we split our task into three steps: (1) Generate a realistic image from a text description by using Dynamic Memory Generative Adversarial Network (arXiv:1904.01310), (2) Classify the image as a genre that exists in the WikiArt dataset using Resnet (arXiv: 1512.03385), (3) Select a style that is compatible with the genre and transfer it to the generated image by using neural artistic stylization network (arXiv:1705.06830).
abstract_zh: 绘画是人们表达思想的方式之一，但如果手部有残疾的人想画画怎么办？为了应对这一挑战，我们创建了一个端到端解决方案，可以从文本描述生成艺术图像。然而，由于缺乏具有配对文本描述和艺术图像的数据集，很难直接训练可以基于文本输入创建艺术的算法。为了解决这个问题，我们将任务分为三个步骤：（1）使用动态记忆生成对抗网络（arXiv：1904.01310）根据文本描述生成真实图像，（2）使用Resnet（arXiv：1512.03385）将图像分类为WikiArt数据集中存在的流派，（3）选择与该流派兼容的风格并使用神经艺术将其传输到生成的图像风格化网络（arXiv：1705.06830）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端解决方案，通过文本描述生成艺术图像，帮助手部残疾人士实现绘画表达。
AI.motivation: 手部残疾人士难以通过传统方式绘画，而现有算法缺乏配对的文本-艺术图像数据集，无法直接生成艺术图像。
AI.method: 分三步实现：1) 用Dynamic Memory GAN生成真实图像；2) 用Resnet将图像分类为WikiArt风格；3) 用神经艺术风格迁移网络将兼容风格应用到图像。
AI.result: 成功生成符合文本描述且具有特定艺术风格的图像，验证了分阶段方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为文本到艺术图像生成提供了可行方案，但受限于现有数据集质量，未来需改进数据获取方式。

To tackle this challenge, we create an end-to-end solution that can generate artistic images from text descriptions. However, due to the lack of datasets with paired text description and artistic images, it is hard to directly train an algorithm which can create art based on text input. authors_text: Budmonde Duinkharjav,Praneeth Chakravarthula,Rachel Brown,Anjul Patney,Qi Sun
title: Image Features Influence Reaction Time: A Learned Probabilistic Perceptual Model for Saccade Latency
title_zh: 图像特征影响反应时间：眼跳延迟的学习概率感知模型
abstract: We aim to ask and answer an essential question "how quickly do we react after observing a displayed visual target?" To this end, we present psychophysical studies that characterize the remarkable disconnect between human saccadic behaviors and spatial visual acuity. Building on the results of our studies, we develop a perceptual model to predict temporal gaze behavior, particularly saccadic latency, as a function of the statistics of a displayed image. Specifically, we implement a neurologically-inspired probabilistic model that mimics the accumulation of confidence that leads to a perceptual decision. We validate our model with a series of objective measurements and user studies using an eye-tracked VR display. The results demonstrate that our model prediction is in statistical alignment with real-world human behavior. Further, we establish that many sub-threshold image modifications commonly introduced in graphics pipelines may significantly alter human reaction timing, even if the differences are visually undetectable. Finally, we show that our model can serve as a metric to predict and alter reaction latency of users in interactive computer graphics applications, thus may improve gaze-contingent rendering, design of virtual experiences, and player performance in e-sports. We illustrate this with two examples: estimating competition fairness in a video game with two different team colors, and tuning display viewing distance to minimize player reaction time.
summary: We aim to ask and answer an essential question "how quickly do we react after observing a displayed visual target?" To this end, we present psychophysical studies that characterize the remarkable disconnect between human saccadic behaviors and spatial visual acuity. Building on the results of our studies, we develop a perceptual model to predict temporal gaze behavior, particularly saccadic latency, as a function of the statistics of a displayed image. Specifically, we implement a neurologically-inspired probabilistic model that mimics the accumulation of confidence that leads to a perceptual decision. We validate our model with a series of objective measurements and user studies using an eye-tracked VR display. The results demonstrate that our model prediction is in statistical alignment with real-world human behavior. Further, we establish that many sub-threshold image modifications commonly introduced in graphics pipelines may significantly alter human reaction timing, even if the differences are visually undetectable. Finally, we show that our model can serve as a metric to predict and alter reaction latency of users in interactive computer graphics applications, thus may improve gaze-contingent rendering, design of virtual experiences, and player performance in e-sports. We illustrate this with two examples: estimating competition fairness in a video game with two different team colors, and tuning display viewing distance to minimize player reaction time.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是提出并回答一个基本问题“观察显示的视觉目标后我们的反应速度有多快？”为此，我们提出了心理物理学研究，这些研究描述了人类扫视行为与空间视敏度之间显着的脱节。基于我们的研究结果，我们开发了一个感知模型来预测时间凝视行为，特别是扫视潜伏期，作为显示图像的统计数据的函数。具体来说，我们实现了一种受神经学启发的概率模型，该模型模仿导致感知决策的信心积累。我们使用眼动追踪 VR 显示器进行一系列客观测量和用户研究来验证我们的模型。结果表明，我们的模型预测与现实世界的人类行为在统计上是一致的。此外，我们还发现，图形管道中常见的许多亚阈值图像修改可能会显着改变人类的反应时间，即使这些差异在视觉上无法察觉。最后，我们表明，我们的模型可以作为预测和改变交互式计算机图形应用程序中用户反应延迟的指标，从而可以改善注视相关渲染、虚拟体验设计和电子竞技中玩家的表现。我们用两个例子来说明这一点：评估具有两种不同球队颜色的视频游戏中的竞争公平性，以及调整显示器观看距离以最大限度地缩短玩家的反应时间。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于图像特征的感知模型，用于预测人类注视反应时间（眼动延迟）。
AI.motivation: 人类对视觉目标的反应速度与空间视觉敏锐度存在显著差异，而现有研究难以解释这种差异，且图像中细微的视觉修改可能影响反应时间，这对交互式图形应用（如VR、电竞）具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过心理物理学实验和眼动追踪VR验证，构建了一个神经启发的贝叶斯概率模型，模拟感知决策中置信度积累过程，将图像统计特征与眼动延迟关联。
AI.result: 模型预测结果与人类行为统计一致，证明了图像中不可察觉的微小修改会显著影响反应时间，并展示了模型在游戏公平性评估和显示参数优化中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为交互式图形应用提供了量化预测工具，可优化基于注视的渲染技术、虚拟体验设计及电竞表现。

Further, we establish that many sub-threshold image modifications commonly introduced in graphics pipelines may significantly alter human reaction timing, even if the differences are visually undetectable. Finally, we show that our model can serve as a metric to predict and alter reaction latency of users in interactive computer graphics applications, thus may improve gaze-contingent rendering, design of virtual experiences, and player performance in e-sports. We illustrate this with two examples: estimating competition fairness in a video game with two different team colors, and tuning display viewing distance to minimize player reaction time. 我们的目标是提出并回答一个基本问题“观察显示的视觉目标后我们的反应速度有多快？”为此，我们提出了心理物理学研究，这些研究描述了人类扫视行为与空间视敏度之间显着的脱节。基于我们的研究结果，我们开发了一个感知模型来预测时间凝视行为，特别是扫视潜伏期，作为显示图像的统计数据的函数。具体来说，我们实现了一种受神经学启发的概率模型，该模型模仿导致感知决策的信心积累。我们使用眼动追踪 VR 显示器进行一系列客观测量和用户研究来验证我们的模型。结果表明，我们的模型预测与现实世界的人类行为在统计上是一致的。此外，我们还发现，图形管道中常见的许多亚阈值图像修改可能会显着改变人类的反应时间，即使这些差异在视觉上无法察觉。最后，我们表明，我们的模型可以作为预测和改变交互式计算机图形应用程序中用户反应延迟的指标，从而可以改善注视相关渲染、虚拟体验设计和电子竞技中玩家的表现。我们用两个例子来说明这一点：评估具有两种不同球队颜色的视频游戏中的竞争公平性，以及调整显示器观看距离以最大限度地缩短玩家的反应时间。 该论文提出了一种基于图像特征的感知模型，用于预测人类注视反应时间（眼动延迟）。 Budmonde Duinkharjav,Praneeth Chakravarthula,Rachel Brown,Anjul Patney,Qi Sun cs.HC,cs.GR

authors_text: Song Wang,Yushun Dong,Xiao Huang,Chen Chen,Jundong Li
title: FAITH: Few-Shot Graph Classification with Hierarchical Task Graphs
title_zh: FAITH：使用分层任务图进行少样本图分类
abstract: Few-shot graph classification aims at predicting classes for graphs, given limited labeled graphs for each class. To tackle the bottleneck of label scarcity, recent works propose to incorporate few-shot learning frameworks for fast adaptations to graph classes with limited labeled graphs. Specifically, these works propose to accumulate meta-knowledge across diverse meta-training tasks, and then generalize such meta-knowledge to the target task with a disjoint label set. However, existing methods generally ignore task correlations among meta-training tasks while treating them independently. Nevertheless, such task correlations can advance the model generalization to the target task for better classification performance. On the other hand, it remains non-trivial to utilize task correlations due to the complex components in a large number of meta-training tasks. To deal with this, we propose a novel few-shot learning framework FAITH that captures task correlations via constructing a hierarchical task graph at different granularities. Then we further design a loss-based sampling strategy to select tasks with more correlated classes. Moreover, a task-specific classifier is proposed to utilize the learned task correlations for few-shot classification. Extensive experiments on four prevalent few-shot graph classification datasets demonstrate the superiority of FAITH over other state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Few-shot graph classification aims at predicting classes for graphs, given limited labeled graphs for each class. To tackle the bottleneck of label scarcity, recent works propose to incorporate few-shot learning frameworks for fast adaptations to graph classes with limited labeled graphs. Specifically, these works propose to accumulate meta-knowledge across diverse meta-training tasks, and then generalize such meta-knowledge to the target task with a disjoint label set. However, existing methods generally ignore task correlations among meta-training tasks while treating them independently. Nevertheless, such task correlations can advance the model generalization to the target task for better classification performance. On the other hand, it remains non-trivial to utilize task correlations due to the complex components in a large number of meta-training tasks. To deal with this, we propose a novel few-shot learning framework FAITH that captures task correlations via constructing a hierarchical task graph at different granularities. Then we further design a loss-based sampling strategy to select tasks with more correlated classes. Moreover, a task-specific classifier is proposed to utilize the learned task correlations for few-shot classification. Extensive experiments on four prevalent few-shot graph classification datasets demonstrate the superiority of FAITH over other state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 少镜头图分类旨在预测图的类别，给定每个类别的有限标记图。为了解决标签稀缺的瓶颈，最近的工作提出结合小样本学习框架来快速适应具有有限标签图的图类。具体来说，这些工作建议在不同的元训练任务中积累元知识，然后将这些元知识推广到具有不相交标签集的目标任务。然而，现有方法通常忽略元训练任务之间的任务相关性，同时独立处理它们。尽管如此，这种任务相关性可以将模型泛化到目标任务，以获得更好的分类性能。另一方面，由于大量元训练任务中的复杂组成部分，利用任务相关性仍然很重要。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的少样本学习框架 FAITH，它通过构建不同粒度的分层任务图来捕获任务相关性。然后我们进一步设计基于损失的采样策略来选择具有更多相关类别的任务。此外，提出了一种特定于任务的分类器，以利用学习到的任务相关性进行少样本分类。对四个流行的少镜头图分类数据集的广泛实验证明了 FAITH 相对于其他最先进基线的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FAITH的少样本图分类框架，通过构建分层任务图来捕捉任务间的相关性，以提高分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的少样本图分类方法在处理任务相关性时通常将任务视为独立，忽略了任务间的相关性，这限制了模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 该方法通过构建不同粒度的分层任务图来捕捉任务相关性，并设计了一种基于损失的采样策略来选择相关性更高的任务，同时提出了一种任务特定分类器来利用这些相关性。
AI.result: 在四个流行的少样本图分类数据集上进行了大量实验，结果表明FAITH优于其他最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FAITH通过有效利用任务相关性，显著提升了少样本图分类的性能，为未来的研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Guanzhou Li,Jianping Wu,Yujing He
title: HARL: A Novel Hierachical Adversary Reinforcement Learning for Automoumous Intersection Management
title_zh: HARL：一种用于自主交叉口管理的新型分层对抗性强化学习
abstract: As an emerging technology, Connected Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) are believed to have the ability to move through intersections in a faster and safer manner, through effective Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication and global observation. Autonomous intersection management is a key path to efficient crossing at intersections, which reduces unnecessary slowdowns and stops through adaptive decision process of each CAV, enabling fuller utilization of the intersection space. Distributed reinforcement learning (DRL) offers a flexible, end-to-end model for AIM, adapting for many intersection scenarios. While DRL is prone to collisions as the actions of multiple sides in the complicated interactions are sampled from a generic policy, restricting the application of DRL in realistic scenario. To address this, we propose a hierarchical RL framework where models at different levels vary in receptive scope, action step length, and feedback period of reward. The upper layer model accelerate CAVs to prevent them from being clashed, while the lower layer model adjust the trends from upper layer model to avoid the change of mobile state causing new conflicts. And the real action of CAV at each step is co-determined by the trends from both levels, forming a real-time balance in the adversarial process. The proposed model is proven effective in the experiment undertaken in a complicated intersection with 4 branches and 4 lanes each branch, and show better performance compared with baselines.
summary: As an emerging technology, Connected Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) are believed to have the ability to move through intersections in a faster and safer manner, through effective Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication and global observation. Autonomous intersection management is a key path to efficient crossing at intersections, which reduces unnecessary slowdowns and stops through adaptive decision process of each CAV, enabling fuller utilization of the intersection space. Distributed reinforcement learning (DRL) offers a flexible, end-to-end model for AIM, adapting for many intersection scenarios. While DRL is prone to collisions as the actions of multiple sides in the complicated interactions are sampled from a generic policy, restricting the application of DRL in realistic scenario. To address this, we propose a hierarchical RL framework where models at different levels vary in receptive scope, action step length, and feedback period of reward. The upper layer model accelerate CAVs to prevent them from being clashed, while the lower layer model adjust the trends from upper layer model to avoid the change of mobile state causing new conflicts. And the real action of CAV at each step is co-determined by the trends from both levels, forming a real-time balance in the adversarial process. The proposed model is proven effective in the experiment undertaken in a complicated intersection with 4 branches and 4 lanes each branch, and show better performance compared with baselines.
abstract_zh: 作为一项新兴技术，联网自动驾驶汽车 (CAV) 被认为能够通过有效的车对万物 (V2X) 通信和全球观测，以更快、更安全的方式穿过十字路口。自主交叉口管理是交叉口高效交叉的关键路径，它通过每个 CAV 的自适应决策过程减少不必要的减速和停车，从而更充分地利用交叉口空间。分布式强化学习 (DRL) 为 AIM 提供了灵活的端到端模型，适用于许多交叉路口场景。而DRL很容易发生冲突，因为复杂交互中多方的行为是从通用策略中采样的，限制了DRL在现实场景中的应用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个分层强化学习框架，其中不同级别的模型在接受范围、动作步长和奖励反馈周期方面有所不同。上层模型加速CAV以防止它们发生冲突，而下层模型调整上层模型的趋势以避免移动状态的变化引起新的冲突。而CAV每一步的实际行动都是由两个层面的趋势共同决定的，在对抗过程中形成实时平衡。在具有 4 个分支、每个分支 4 车道的复杂交叉口进行的实验中，所提出的模型被证明是有效的，并且与基线相比表现出更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层对抗强化学习框架HARL，用于自动驾驶交叉口管理，通过协调多智能体决策提升交叉口通行效率与安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式强化学习方法在复杂交叉口场景中易因多智能体交互导致碰撞，限制了其在现实场景中的应用。
AI.method: 设计分层RL架构：上层模型通过扩大感知范围和调整奖励反馈周期防止碰撞，下层模型通过缩短动作步长和动态趋势调整避免新冲突，双层协同实现对抗过程中的实时平衡。
AI.result: 在四向四车道复杂交叉口实验中，HARL相比基线方法显著降低碰撞率并提升通行效率。
AI.conclusion: 分层对抗强化学习框架有效解决了多智能体交叉口管理中的碰撞问题，为自动驾驶场景提供了更安全高效的决策方案。
